---

### Comparison to *rase*

We performed *rase* analyses on our simulated datasets, using the true tree and simulated ellipses at the tips. For each parameter plot, we only include datasets where the *rase* analysis had ESS $>50$ for that parameter, which excluded many of the $\sigma$ values.

```{r rase, echo=TRUE}
# SIMULATION RASE -- DO NOT RERUN WITHOUT NEW SIMULATIONS
if (RERUN) {
  params_list <- c("sigma_x","sigma_y","root_x","root_y")
  sim_data <- read.csv(paste0(simulation_output_directory,"sim_results.tsv"),sep="\t")
  sim_data <- sim_data[which(sim_data$ess >= 200),]
  sim_data <- sim_data[which(sim_data$param %in% params_list),]
  sim_data <- sim_data[,c(1:4)]
  sim_data <- cbind(sim_data,rep(NA,nrow(sim_data)),rep(NA,nrow(sim_data)),rep(NA,nrow(sim_data)))
  colnames(sim_data) <- c("sim","param","true","EMPIRE","rase","ess","mean_a")
  burnin <- 50000
  a_burnin <- 20000
  simulation_numbers <- sprintf("%03.0f", 1:100)
  nsims <- length(simulation_numbers)
  for (num in simulation_numbers) {
    cat("\r","Simulation ", num, " | ", round(as.numeric(num)/nsims*100,0), "%")
    directory <- paste0(sim_prefix,num,"/")
    if (file.exists(paste0(directory,"true.v.tsv"))) {
      a_logfile <- read.csv(paste0(directory,"true.v.tsv"),sep="\t",skipNul=TRUE)
      n_nodes <- nrow(a_logfile)
      n_tips <- (n_nodes + 1) / 2
      n_internal <- n_tips - 1
      a_mcmc <- a_logfile$a[(n_tips+1):n_nodes]
      mean_a <- mean(a_mcmc)
    } else {
      mean_a <- NA
    }
    if (file.exists(paste0(directory,"rase.csv"))) {
      logfile <- read.csv(paste0(directory,"rase.csv"),sep=",",skipNul=TRUE)
      root_node <- (ncol(logfile))/2 + 1
      root_x_colname <- paste0("n",root_node,"_x")
      root_y_colname <- paste0("n",root_node,"_y")
      root_x_ind <- which(colnames(logfile)==root_x_colname)
      root_y_ind <- which(colnames(logfile)==root_y_colname)
      sigma2x_ind <- which(colnames(logfile)=="sigma2x")
      sigma2y_ind <- which(colnames(logfile)=="sigma2y")
      mcmc <- logfile[-c(1:burnin),c(root_x_ind,root_y_ind,sigma2x_ind,sigma2y_ind)]
      colnames(mcmc) <- c("root_x","root_y","sigma2_x","sigma2_y")
      mcmc$sigma_x <- lapply(mcmc$sigma2_x,"sqrt")
      mcmc$sigma_y <- lapply(mcmc$sigma2_y,"sqrt")
      for (param in params_list) {
        row <- which(sim_data$sim==as.numeric(num) & sim_data$param==param)
        if (length(row)==1) {
          param_mcmc <- unlist(mcmc[[param]])
          param_est <- mean(param_mcmc)
          param_ess <- ess(param_mcmc)
          sim_data$rase[row] <- param_est
          sim_data$ess[row] <- param_ess
          sim_data$mean_a[row] <- mean_a
        }
      }
    }
  }
  sim_data <- sim_data[which(!is.na(sim_data$rase)),]
  sim_data$ratio <- abs((sim_data$rase - sim_data$true) / sim_data$true)
  write.table(sim_data,file=paste0(simulation_output_directory,"rase_results.tsv"),quote=FALSE,sep="\t",row.names=FALSE)
  RERUN <- FALSE
}
```

``` {r rase_plots, echo=TRUE} 
sim_data <- read.csv(paste0(simulation_output_directory,"rase_results.tsv"),sep="\t")
sim_data <- sim_data[which(sim_data$ess >= 50),]
sim_data$empire_ratio <- abs((sim_data$EMPIRE - sim_data$true) / sim_data$true)

plot_param <- function(param, name) {
  data_subset <- sim_data[which(sim_data$param == param),]
  model_data <- data.frame(cbind(true=c(data_subset$true,data_subset$true),est=c(data_subset$EMPIRE,data_subset$rase),model=c(rep("EMPIRE",nrow(data_subset)),rep("RASE",nrow(data_subset)))))
  model_data$true <- as.numeric(model_data$true)
  model_data$est <- as.numeric(model_data$est)
  min <- mean(model_data$true) - 4 * abs(sd(model_data$true))
  max <- mean(model_data$true) + 4 * abs(sd(model_data$true))
  keep <- c()
  outliers <- c()
  for (i in 1:nrow(model_data)) {
    #keep[i] <- TRUE
    if (model_data$est[i] > max) {
      #keep[i] <- FALSE
      outliers <- c(outliers,model_data$model[i])
    }
    if (model_data$est[i] < min) {
      #keep[i] <- FALSE
      outliers <- c(outliers,model_data$model[i])
    }
  }
  n_rase_outliers <- sum(outliers=="RASE")
  n_empire_outliers <- sum(outliers=="EMPIRE")
  bottom_text <- paste0(
    "RASE Outliers: ",n_rase_outliers,"\n",
    "EMPIRE Outliers: ",n_empire_outliers,"\n"
  )
  #model_data <- model_data[keep==TRUE,]
  model_data$model <- as.factor(model_data$model)
  plot <- ggplot(model_data, aes(x=true, y=est)) +
    geom_point(pch=16,aes(color=model)) +
    scale_color_manual(values=c(color_1,color_2)) +
    guides(color=guide_legend(override.aes=list(size=5))) +
    geom_abline(slope=1,linewidth=.25,color=lines_color) +
    labs(x=NULL,y=NULL,color="Model:") +
    annotate(geom="text",label=name,x=min,y=max,hjust="inward",vjust="inward",color=lines_color) +
    annotate(geom="text",label=bottom_text,x=max,y=min,hjust="inward",vjust="inward",color=lines_color) +
    lims(x=c(min,max),y=c(min,max)) +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(panel.border = element_rect(color=lines_color,linewidth=2),
          panel.background = element_rect(fill=background_color,color=NA),
          axis.text = element_text(color=lines_color),
          axis.ticks = element_line(color=lines_color),
          aspect.ratio=1,
          panel.grid.minor=element_blank(),
          panel.grid.major=element_blank(),
          legend.position="none",
          plot.margin=margin(5,5,5,5,"pt"))
  return(plot)
}

plot_sigma_x <- plot_param("sigma_x",bquote(sigma[x]))
plot_sigma_y <- plot_param("sigma_y",bquote(sigma[y]))
plot_root_x <- plot_param("root_x",bquote(root[x]))
plot_root_y <- plot_param("root_y",bquote(root[y]))

axis_plot <- ggplot() +
    labs(x="True (Simulated) Parameter Value",y="Posterior Mean") +
    theme_classic() +
    theme(plot.background=element_rect(fill=background_color,color=background_color),
          panel.background=element_rect(fill=background_color,color=background_color),
          line=element_blank(),
          axis.title=element_text(hjust=.5,size=14,color=lines_color),
          axis.text=element_text(color=lines_color),
          aspect.ratio=16/15)
inner_plot <- plot_sigma_x + plot_root_x + plot_sigma_y + plot_root_y + 
  plot_layout(ncol = 2, guides="collect") & 
  theme(legend.position="top",
        legend.background=element_rect(color=NA,fill=NA),
        legend.key=element_rect(fill=NA),
        legend.text=element_text(color=lines_color),
        legend.title=element_text(color=lines_color),
        plot.background=element_rect(fill=background_color,color=background_color))
rase_plot <- axis_plot + inset_element(inner_plot,left=0,bottom=0,right=1,top=1) & theme(plot.background=element_rect(fill=background_color,color=background_color))

ggsave(paste0(simulation_plot_directory,"rase.png"),rase_plot,dpi=600,width=7,height=7.5)

plot_error <- function(param, name) {
  data_subset <- sim_data[which(sim_data$param == param),]
  model_data <- data.frame(cbind(mean_a=c(data_subset$mean_a,data_subset$mean_a),error=c(data_subset$empire_ratio,data_subset$ratio),model=c(rep("EMPIRE",nrow(data_subset)),rep("RASE",nrow(data_subset)))))
  model_data$error <- as.numeric(model_data$error)
  model_data$mean_a <- as.numeric(model_data$mean_a)
  min <- 0
  max <- 10
  keep <- c()
  outliers <- c()
  for (i in 1:nrow(model_data)) {
    keep[i] <- TRUE
    if (model_data$error[i] > max) {
      keep[i] <- FALSE
      outliers <- c(outliers,model_data$model[i])
    }
    if (model_data$error[i] < min) {
      keep[i] <- FALSE
      outliers <- c(outliers,model_data$model[i])
    }
  }
  n_rase_outliers <- sum(outliers=="RASE")
  n_empire_outliers <- sum(outliers=="EMPIRE")
  bottom_text <- paste0(
    "RASE Outliers: ",n_rase_outliers,"\n",
    "EMPIRE Outliers: ",n_empire_outliers,"\n"
  )
  model_data <- model_data[keep==TRUE,]
  model_data$model <- as.factor(model_data$model)
  xmin <- min(model_data$mean_a)
  xmax <- max(model_data$mean_a)
  plot <- ggplot(model_data, aes(x=mean_a, y=error)) +
    geom_point(pch=16,aes(color=model)) +
    scale_color_manual(values=c(color_1,color_2)) +
    guides(color=guide_legend(override.aes=list(size=5))) +
    geom_smooth(method="lm",se=FALSE,aes(color=model)) +
    #geom_abline(slope=1,linewidth=.25,color=lines_color) +
    labs(x=NULL,y=NULL,color="Model:") +
    annotate(geom="text",label=name,x=xmin,y=max,hjust="inward",vjust="inward",color=lines_color) +
    annotate(geom="text",label=bottom_text,x=xmin,y=max-1,hjust="inward",vjust="inward",color=lines_color) +
    lims(x=c(xmin,xmax),y=c(min,max)) +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(panel.border = element_rect(color=lines_color,linewidth=2),
          panel.background = element_rect(fill=background_color,color=NA),
          axis.text = element_text(color=lines_color),
          axis.ticks = element_line(color=lines_color),
          aspect.ratio=1,
          panel.grid.minor=element_blank(),
          panel.grid.major=element_blank(),
          legend.position="none",
          plot.margin=margin(5,5,5,5,"pt"))
  return(plot)
}

plot_sigma_x <- plot_error("sigma_x",bquote(sigma[x]))
plot_sigma_y <- plot_error("sigma_y",bquote(sigma[y]))
plot_root_x <- plot_error("root_x",bquote(root[x]))
plot_root_y <- plot_error("root_y",bquote(root[y]))

axis_plot <- ggplot() +
    labs(x="Mean Log Area",y="Error Ratio") +
    theme_classic() +
    theme(plot.background=element_rect(fill=background_color,color=background_color),
          panel.background=element_rect(fill=background_color,color=background_color),
          line=element_blank(),
          axis.title=element_text(hjust=.5,size=14,color=lines_color),
          axis.text=element_text(color=lines_color),
          aspect.ratio=16/15)
inner_plot <- plot_sigma_x + plot_root_x + plot_sigma_y + plot_root_y + 
  plot_layout(ncol = 2, guides="collect") & 
  theme(legend.position="top",
        legend.background=element_rect(color=NA,fill=NA),
        legend.key=element_rect(fill=NA),
        legend.text=element_text(color=lines_color),
        legend.title=element_text(color=lines_color),
        plot.background=element_rect(fill=background_color,color=background_color))
rase_error_plot <- axis_plot + inset_element(inner_plot,left=0,bottom=0,right=1,top=1) & theme(plot.background=element_rect(fill=background_color,color=background_color))

ggsave(paste0(simulation_plot_directory,"rase_error.png"),rase_error_plot,dpi=600,width=7,height=7.5)
```

<div class = "row">
<div class = "col-md-6">

EMPIRE performs much better than RASE on data simulated under EMPIRE (to be expected). Interestingly, RASE not only overestimates rates (expected), but also misestimates root values substantially (somewhat expected). Here, I define "outlier" based on the standard deviation of true values explored -- if the estimate is more than 4 standard deviations in either direction, it is an outlier. Outliers are not shown on the plots.

``` {r rase_plots_show, eval=TRUE, results=TRUE} 
include_graphics(paste0(simulation_plot_directory,"rase.png"))
```

</div>
<div class = "col-md-6">

These are error ratios for each parameter estimate (the ratio of the absolute error to the true value) compared to the mean log area of all ancestral (non-tip) ellipses. When ellipses are (on average) very large, *rase* has much larger errors. This is not the case for EMPIRE. Here, I define "outlier" as a ratio greater than 10 (error is >10x the true value). Outliers are not shown on the plots or used for regressions.

``` {r rase_error_plots_show, eval=TRUE, results=TRUE} 
include_graphics(paste0(simulation_plot_directory,"rase_error.png"))
```

</div>
</div>

<!--
#####################################
#####################################
SKINK PARAMETERS: PARAMETER ESTIMATES
#####################################
#####################################
-->

## Skink Parameters

### Parameter Estimates

<div class = "row">
<div class = "col-md-4">

Here are the estimates for all model parameters related to the stochastic movement of ellipses over time.

```{r param_estimates, echo=TRUE}
# SKINK ANALYSIS -- DO NOT RERUN WITHOUT NEW DATA
if (RERUN) {
  param_list <- c("sigma_x","sigma_y","sigma_r","sigma_s","sigma_a","mu","kappa","halflife")
  burnin <- 20000
  length <- 200000
  data_model <- read.table(paste0(data_directory,"model_log.tsv"),sep="\t",header=TRUE)[burnin:length,]
  halflives <- log(2) / data_model$kappa
  data_model$halflife <- halflives
  model_results <- data.frame(matrix(NA,ncol=4,nrow=8))
  colnames(model_results) <- c("Parameter","Estimate","Lower 95% HPD","Upper 95% HPD")
  model_results$Parameter <- param_list
  for (i in 1:length(param_list)) {
    param <- param_list[i]
    index <- which(colnames(data_model)==param)
    model_results$Estimate[i] <- round(mean(data_model[,index]),3)
    model_results$`Lower 95% HPD`[i] <- round(HDInterval::hdi(data_model[,index])[[1]],3)
    model_results$`Upper 95% HPD`[i] <- round(HDInterval::hdi(data_model[,index])[[2]],3)
  }
  
  label_size <- 3.5
  param_size <- 5
  axis_size <- 10
  word_size <- 4
  
  plot_param <- function(param, name) {
    index <- which(colnames(data_model)==param)
    mean <- mean(data_model[,index])
    hdlow <- HDInterval::hdi(data_model[,index])[[1]]
    hdhigh <- HDInterval::hdi(data_model[,index])[[2]]
    min <- min(data_model[,index])
    max <- max(data_model[,index])
    ymax <- 1
    plot <- ggplot(data_model,aes_string(x=param,y="..scaled..")) +
      lims(x=c(min,max)) +
      labs(x=NULL,y=NULL) +
      geom_vline(xintercept=mean,color=vline_color,lwd=1) +
      geom_vline(xintercept=hdlow,color=lines_color,lty="11",lwd=1) +
      geom_vline(xintercept=hdhigh,color=lines_color,lty="11",lwd=1) +
      geom_density(color=lines_color,bounds=c(min,max),lwd=1) +
      annotate(geom="text",label=name,x=max,y=ymax,hjust="inward",vjust="inward",color=lines_color,size=param_size) +
      annotate(geom="label",label=round(mean,2),x=mean,y=.075,color=lines_color,fill=background_color,size=label_size,label.padding=unit(.15,"lines")) +
      theme_bw() +
      theme(panel.border = element_rect(color=lines_color,linewidth=2),
            panel.background = element_rect(fill=background_color,color=NA),
            plot.background = element_rect(fill=background_color,color=NA),
            axis.text = element_text(color=lines_color,size=axis_size),
            axis.ticks = element_line(color=lines_color),
            panel.grid.minor=element_blank(),
            panel.grid.major=element_blank(),
            aspect.ratio=1,
            legend.position="none",
            plot.margin=margin(8,8,8,8,"pt"))
    return(plot)
  }
  
  dummy_data <- data.frame(matrix(data=c(.5,.5,.5,.5,.5,.5,.5,.5),ncol=2,nrow=4))
  colnames(dummy_data) <- c("x","y")
  legend_plot <- ggplot(data=dummy_data,x=x,y=y) +
    lims(x=c(0,1),y=c(0,1)) +
    labs(x=NULL,y=NULL) +
    geom_segment(x=.2,y=.8,xend=.8,yend=.8,color=vline_color,lwd=1) +
    geom_segment(x=.2,y=.35,xend=.8,yend=.35,color=vline_color,lty="11",lwd=1) +
    annotate(geom="text",label="Posterior Mean",x=.5,y=.65,hjust=.5,color=lines_color,size=word_size) +
    annotate(geom="text",label="95% HPD Interval",x=.5,y=.2,hjust=.5,color=lines_color,size=word_size) +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(panel.border = element_rect(color=background_color,linewidth=2),
        panel.background = element_rect(fill=background_color,color=NA),
        plot.background = element_rect(fill=background_color,color=NA),
        axis.text = element_text(color=background_color),
        axis.ticks = element_line(color=background_color),
        panel.grid.minor=element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major=element_blank(),
        aspect.ratio=1,
        legend.position="none",
        plot.margin=margin(8,8,8,8,"pt"))
  
  plot_sigma_x <- plot_param("sigma_x",bquote(sigma[x]))
  plot_sigma_y <- plot_param("sigma_y",bquote(sigma[y]))
  plot_sigma_r <- plot_param("sigma_r",bquote(sigma[r]))
  plot_sigma_s <- plot_param("sigma_s",bquote(sigma[s]))
  plot_sigma_a <- plot_param("sigma_a",bquote(sigma[a]))
  plot_mu <- plot_param("mu",bquote(mu))
  plot_kappa <- plot_param("kappa",bquote(kappa))
  plot_halflife <- plot_param("halflife","Half-Life")
  
  parameter_plot <- plot_sigma_x + plot_sigma_y + plot_sigma_r + plot_sigma_s + plot_sigma_a + plot_mu + plot_halflife + legend_plot + plot_layout(ncol = 4) & theme(plot.background=element_rect(fill=background_color,color=NA))
  ggsave(paste0(other_plot_directory,"parameters.png"),parameter_plot,dpi=600,width=8.5,height=4)
  RERUN <- FALSE
}
```

---

### Ellipse Size

<div class = "row">
<div class = "col-md-4">

Here we compare the distributions of ellipse sizes for modern ellipses, ancestral ellipses, and the $\mu$ parameter (the size ellipses are attracted to according to the OU process on $a$).

```{r sizes, echo=TRUE}
# SKINK ANALYSIS -- DO NOT RERUN WITHOUT NEW DATA
if (RERUN) {
  node_data <- read.csv(paste0(skink_output_directory,"node_reconstructions.csv"),header=TRUE)

  xlims <- c(-3,6)
  ylims <- c(0,1)
  
  burnin <- 20000
  length <- 200000
  data_model <- read.table(paste0(data_directory,"model_log.tsv"),sep="\t",header=TRUE)[burnin:length,]
  
  label_size <- 3.5
  param_size <- 12
  axis_size <- 10

  plot_param <- function(param, name) {
    index <- which(colnames(data_model)==param)
    mean <- mean(data_model[,index])
    plot <- ggplot(data_model,aes_string(x=param,y="..scaled..")) +
      lims(x=xlims,y=ylims) +
      labs(x=NULL,y=NULL) +
      geom_density(color=lines_color,bounds=c(min(data_model[,index]),max(data_model[,index])),lwd=1) +
      geom_vline(xintercept=mean,color=vline_color,lwd=1) +
      ggtitle(label=name) +
      #annotate(geom="text",label=name,x=xlims[2],y=ylims[2],hjust="inward",vjust="inward",color=lines_color,size=param_size) +
      annotate(geom="label",label=round(mean,2),x=mean,y=.075,color=lines_color,fill=background_color,size=label_size,label.padding=unit(.15,"lines")) +
      theme_bw() +
      theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust=.5,color=lines_color,size=param_size),
            panel.border = element_rect(color=lines_color,linewidth=2),
            panel.background = element_rect(fill=background_color,color=NA),
            plot.background = element_rect(fill=background_color,color=NA),
            axis.text = element_text(color=lines_color,size=axis_size),
            axis.ticks = element_line(color=lines_color),
            panel.grid.minor=element_blank(),
            panel.grid.major=element_blank(),
            aspect.ratio=1,
            legend.position="none",
            plot.margin=margin(8,8,8,8,"pt"))
    return(plot)
  }
  plot_mu_2 <- plot_param("mu","Long-Term Mean")
  
  plot_modern <- function(param, name) {
    index <- which(colnames(ellipse_data)==param)
    mean <- mean(ellipse_data[,index])
    plot <- ggplot(ellipse_data,aes_string(x=param,y="..scaled..")) +
      lims(x=xlims,y=ylims) +
      labs(x=NULL,y=NULL) +
      geom_vline(xintercept=mean,color=vline_color,lwd=1) +
      geom_density(color=lines_color,bounds=c(min(ellipse_data[,index]),max(ellipse_data[,index])),lwd=1) +
      ggtitle(label=name) +
      #annotate(geom="text",label=name,x=xlims[2],y=ylims[2],hjust="inward",vjust="inward",color=lines_color,size=param_size) +
      annotate(geom="label",label=round(mean,2),x=mean,y=.075,color=lines_color,fill=background_color,size=label_size,label.padding=unit(.15,"lines")) +
      theme_bw() +
      theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust=.5,color=lines_color,size=param_size),
            panel.border = element_rect(color=lines_color,linewidth=2),
            panel.background = element_rect(fill=background_color,color=NA),
            plot.background = element_rect(fill=background_color,color=NA),
            axis.text = element_text(color=lines_color,size=axis_size),
            axis.ticks = element_line(color=lines_color),
            panel.grid.minor=element_blank(),
            panel.grid.major=element_blank(),
            aspect.ratio=1,
            legend.position="none",
            plot.margin=margin(8,8,8,8,"pt"))
    return(plot)
  }
  plot_modern_a <- plot_modern("a","Modern Log Area")
  
  plot_ancestral <- function(param, name) {
    index <- which(colnames(node_data)==paste0("scenario_",param))
    mean <- mean(node_data[,index])
    plot <- ggplot(node_data,aes_string(x=paste0("scenario_",param),y="..scaled..")) +
      lims(x=xlims,y=ylims) +
      labs(x=NULL,y=NULL) +
      geom_vline(xintercept=mean,color=vline_color,lwd=1) +
      geom_density(color=lines_color,bounds=c(min(node_data[,index]),max(node_data[,index])),lwd=1) +
      ggtitle(label=name) +
      #annotate(geom="text",label=name,x=xlims[2],y=ylims[2],hjust="inward",vjust="inward",color=lines_color,size=param_size) +
      annotate(geom="label",label=round(mean,2),x=mean,y=.075,color=lines_color,fill=background_color,size=label_size,label.padding=unit(.15,"lines")) +
      theme_bw() +
      theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust=.5,color=lines_color,size=param_size),
            panel.border = element_rect(color=lines_color,linewidth=2),
            panel.background = element_rect(fill=background_color,color=NA),
            plot.background = element_rect(fill=background_color,color=NA),
            axis.text = element_text(color=lines_color,size=axis_size),
            axis.ticks = element_line(color=lines_color),
            panel.grid.minor=element_blank(),
            panel.grid.major=element_blank(),
            aspect.ratio=1,
            legend.position="none",
            plot.margin=margin(8,8,8,8,"pt"))
    return(plot)
  }
  plot_ancestral_a <- plot_ancestral("a","Ancestral Log Area")
  
  stable_mean <- mean(data_model$mu)
  stable_kappa <- mean(data_model$kappa)
  stable_sigma <- mean(data_model$sigma_a)
  stable_variance <- stable_sigma^2 / (2 * stable_kappa)
  stable_sd <- sqrt(stable_variance)
  
  stable_dist <- data.frame(cbind(1:100000,rnorm(100000,stable_mean,stable_sd)))
  colnames(stable_dist) <- c("index","value")
  plot_stable <- function(data, name) {
    mean <- mean(stable_dist$value)
    plot <- ggplot(stable_dist,aes_string(x="value",y="..scaled..")) +
      lims(x=xlims,y=ylims) +
      labs(x=NULL,y=NULL) +
      geom_vline(xintercept=mean,color=vline_color,lwd=1) +
      geom_density(color=lines_color,bounds=c(min(stable_dist$value),max(stable_dist$value)),bw=2,lwd=1) +
      ggtitle(label=name) +
      #annotate(geom="text",label=name,x=xlims[2],y=ylims[2],hjust="inward",vjust="inward",color=lines_color,size=param_size) +
      annotate(geom="label",label=round(mean,2),x=mean,y=.075,color=lines_color,fill=background_color,size=label_size,label.padding=unit(.15,"lines")) +
      theme_bw() +
      theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust=.5,color=lines_color,size=param_size),
            panel.border = element_rect(color=lines_color,linewidth=2),
            panel.background = element_rect(fill=background_color,color=NA),
            plot.background = element_rect(fill=background_color,color=NA),
            axis.text = element_text(color=lines_color,size=axis_size),
            axis.ticks = element_line(color=lines_color),
            panel.grid.minor=element_blank(),
            panel.grid.major=element_blank(),
            aspect.ratio=1,
            legend.position="none",
            plot.margin=margin(8,8,8,8,"pt"))
    return(plot)
  }
  plot_stable_a <- plot_stable(stable_dist,"Stable Distribution")
  
  size_plot <- plot_modern_a + plot_ancestral_a + plot_mu_2 + plot_stable_a + plot_layout(ncol = 4) & theme(plot.background=element_rect(fill=background_color,color=NA))
  ggsave(paste0(other_plot_directory,"sizes.png"),size_plot,dpi=600,width=8.5,height=2.5)
  RERUN <- FALSE
}
```

``` {r sizes_manuscript}
set_plot_theme("manuscript")
plot_mu_2 <- plot_param("mu","Long-Term Mean")
plot_modern_a <- plot_modern("a","Modern Log Area")
plot_ancestral_a <- plot_ancestral("a","Ancestral Log Area")
plot_stable_a <- plot_stable(stable_dist,"Stable Distribution")
size_plot <- plot_modern_a + plot_ancestral_a + plot_mu_2 + plot_stable_a + plot_layout(ncol = 4) & theme(plot.background=element_rect(fill=background_color,color=NA))
ggsave(paste0(manuscript_plot_directory,"sizes.png"),size_plot,dpi=600,width=8.5,height=2.5)
```

---

### Movement

<div class = "row">
<div class = "col-md-4">

Separating the anagenetic and cladogenetic components of ellipse movement.

```{r movement, echo=TRUE}
c_val <- seq(0,1.5,.5)
h_val <- 2*pi*seq(0,7/8,1/8)

node_data <- read.csv(paste0(skink_output_directory,"node_reconstructions.csv"),header=TRUE)
nodes <- empire_tree$nodes
movements <- data.frame(matrix(NA,nrow=nrow(node_data),ncol=13))
colnames(movements) <- c("node","right","left","parent_x","parent_y","right_x_start","right_y_start","left_x_start","left_y_start","right_x","right_y","left_x","left_y")

i = 1
for (node in node_data$node) {
  movements$node[i] <- node
  # Parent values
  node_data_index <- which(node_data$node==node)
  parent_x <- node_data$x[node_data_index]
  movements$parent_x[i] <- parent_x
  parent_y <- node_data$y[node_data_index]
  movements$parent_y[i] <- parent_y
  # Projected child values
  movements$right_x_start[i] <- transform_node("x",
                                               "right",
                                               node_data$scenario_d[node_data_index],
                                               node_data$scenario_m[node_data_index],
                                               c_val[node_data$scenario_c[node_data_index]+1],
                                               h_val[node_data$scenario_h[node_data_index]+1],
                                               parent_x,
                                               parent_y,
                                               node_data$scenario_r[node_data_index],
                                               node_data$scenario_s[node_data_index],
                                               node_data$scenario_a[node_data_index],
                                               -5,
                                               10)
  movements$right_y_start[i] <- transform_node("y",
                                               "right",
                                               node_data$scenario_d[node_data_index],
                                               node_data$scenario_m[node_data_index],
                                               c_val[node_data$scenario_c[node_data_index]+1],
                                               h_val[node_data$scenario_h[node_data_index]+1],
                                               parent_x,
                                               parent_y,
                                               node_data$scenario_r[node_data_index],
                                               node_data$scenario_s[node_data_index],
                                               node_data$scenario_a[node_data_index],
                                               -5,
                                               10)
  movements$left_x_start[i] <- transform_node("x",
                                             "left",
                                             node_data$scenario_d[node_data_index],
                                             node_data$scenario_m[node_data_index],
                                             c_val[node_data$scenario_c[node_data_index]+1],
                                             h_val[node_data$scenario_h[node_data_index]+1],
                                             parent_x,
                                             parent_y,
                                             node_data$scenario_r[node_data_index],
                                             node_data$scenario_s[node_data_index],
                                             node_data$scenario_a[node_data_index],
                                             -5,
                                             10)
  movements$left_y_start[i] <- transform_node("y",
                                             "left",
                                             node_data$scenario_d[node_data_index],
                                             node_data$scenario_m[node_data_index],
                                             c_val[node_data$scenario_c[node_data_index]+1],
                                             h_val[node_data$scenario_h[node_data_index]+1],
                                             parent_x,
                                             parent_y,
                                             node_data$scenario_r[node_data_index],
                                             node_data$scenario_s[node_data_index],
                                             node_data$scenario_a[node_data_index],
                                             -5,
                                             10)
  # Child values
  nodes_row <- which(nodes$node == node)
  right_child <- nodes$right_child[nodes_row]
  movements$right[i] <- right_child
  left_child <- nodes$left_child[nodes_row]
  movements$left[i] <- left_child
  if (right_child %in% node_data$node) {
    node_data_index <- which(node_data$node == right_child)
    movements$right_x[i] <- node_data$x[node_data_index]
    movements$right_y[i] <- node_data$y[node_data_index]
  } else {
    taxon <- tree$tip.label[right_child]
    ellipse_data_index <- which(ellipse_data$taxon==taxon)
    movements$right_x[i] <- ellipse_data$x[ellipse_data_index]
    movements$right_y[i] <- ellipse_data$y[ellipse_data_index]
  }
  if (left_child %in% node_data$node) {
    node_data_index <- which(node_data$node == left_child)
    movements$left_x[i] <- node_data$x[node_data_index]
    movements$left_y[i] <- node_data$y[node_data_index]
  } else {
    taxon <- tree$tip.label[left_child]
    ellipse_data_index <- which(ellipse_data$taxon==taxon)
    movements$left_x[i] <- ellipse_data$x[ellipse_data_index]
    movements$left_y[i] <- ellipse_data$y[ellipse_data_index]
  }
  i = i + 1
}
for (i in 1:nrow(movements)) {
  movements$clado_right[i] <- sqrt((movements$parent_x[i]-movements$right_x_start[i])^2+(movements$parent_y[i]-movements$right_y_start[i])^2)
  movements$clado_left[i] <- sqrt((movements$parent_x[i]-movements$left_x_start[i])^2+(movements$parent_y[i]-movements$left_y_start[i])^2)
  movements$ana_right[i] <- sqrt((movements$right_x[i]-movements$right_x_start[i])^2+(movements$right_y[i]-movements$right_y_start[i])^2)
  movements$ana_left[i] <- sqrt((movements$left_x[i]-movements$left_x_start[i])^2+(movements$left_y[i]-movements$left_y_start[i])^2)
}
clado <- c(movements$clado_right,movements$clado_left)
ana <- c(movements$ana_right,movements$ana_left)
movement_data <- data.frame(cbind(clado,ana))

total_clado <- sum(clado)
total_ana <- sum(ana)

clado_percent <- round((total_clado / (total_clado + total_ana)) * 100)
ana_percent <- round((total_ana / (total_clado + total_ana)) * 100)

mean_clado <- round(mean(clado),2)
mean_ana <- round(mean(ana),2)

movement_plot <- ggplot(movement_data) +
  geom_density(aes(x=ana,y=..scaled..),color=color_1) +
  geom_density(aes(x=clado,y=..scaled..),color=color_2) +
  lims(y=c(0,1)) +
  scale_x_continuous(limits=c(0,15),expand=c(0,0)) +
  labs(x="Distance per Branch (degrees)", y="Density") +
  geom_vline(xintercept=mean_ana,color=color_1,lty="dashed") +
  geom_vline(xintercept=mean_clado,color=color_2,lty="dashed") +
  geom_text(label=paste0("Anagenetic Movement (",ana_percent,"%)"),aes(x=14.5,y=.95),hjust="inward",vjust=.5,color=color_1,size=6) +
  geom_text(label=paste0("Cladogenetic Movement (",clado_percent,"%)"),aes(x=14.5,y=.875),hjust="inward",vjust=.5,color=color_2,size=6) +
  annotate(geom="label",label=mean_ana,x=mean_ana,y=.01,color=lines_color,fill=background_color,size=4,label.padding=unit(.15,"lines")) +
  annotate(geom="label",label=mean_clado,x=mean_clado,y=.01,color=lines_color,fill=background_color,size=4,label.padding=unit(.15,"lines")) +
  theme(panel.background = element_rect(fill=background_color,color=lines_color),
        plot.background = element_rect(fill=background_color,color=background_color),
        plot.title = element_text(color=lines_color,hjust=.5,size=24),
        axis.title = element_text(color=lines_color,size=16),
        axis.text = element_text(color=lines_color),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major = element_line(color=shape_color),
        aspect.ratio = 2/3,
        plot.margin=margin(.5,.5,.5,.5,"cm"))
ggsave(paste0(other_plot_directory,"movement.png"),movement_plot,dpi=600,width=7,height=5)

percent_clado_of_ana <- (total_ana - total_clado) / total_ana # ~39%
```

</div>
<div class = "col-md-8">

``` {r movement_show, eval=TRUE, results=TRUE} 
include_graphics(paste0(other_plot_directory,"movement.png"))
```

</div>
</div>

---

### Mode

<div class = "row">
<div class = "col-md-4">

Assessing preferred cladogenetic mode across nodes.

```{r modes, echo=TRUE}
node_data <- read.csv(paste0(skink_output_directory,"node_reconstructions.csv"),header=TRUE)
budding_count <- sum(node_data$scenario_m == 0)
splitting_count <- sum(node_data$scenario_m == 1)

mode_plot <- ggplot(node_data,aes(x=factor(scenario_m),y=..count../sum(..count..))) +
  geom_bar() +
  lims(y=c(0,1)) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels=c("Budding","Splitting")) +
  labs(x="Mode", y="Frequency") +
  geom_text(stat="count",aes(label=..count..),vjust=-.5,color=lines_color) +
  theme(panel.background = element_rect(fill=background_color,color=lines_color),
        plot.background = element_rect(fill=background_color,color=background_color),
        axis.title = element_text(color=lines_color,size=16),
        axis.text = element_text(color=lines_color),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        aspect.ratio = 2/3,
        plot.margin=margin(.5,.5,.5,.5,"cm"))
ggsave(paste0(other_plot_directory,"mode.png"),mode_plot,dpi=600,width=7,height=5)

percent_budding <- budding_count / (budding_count + splitting_count) # ~63%
percent_splitting <- splitting_count / (budding_count + splitting_count) # ~37%
```

</div>
<div class = "col-md-8">

``` {r movement_bar_show, eval=TRUE, results=TRUE} 
include_graphics(paste0(other_plot_directory,"mode.png"))
```

</div>
</div>

<!--
##########################################################
##########################################################
SKINK DIRECTIONS: DIRECTION LINES, SHUFFLED ANALYSIS, MAPS
##########################################################
##########################################################
-->

## Skink Directions

### Direction Lines

These are results for the empirical analyses of *Sphenomorphus* skinks. Direction line plots are averaged over the entire posterior sample for all nodes, but the posterior is thinned (1 per 500 iterations) to reduce computation time.

<div class = "row">
<div class = "col-md-3">


For this plot, rather than using raw direction lines, we use *projected* direction lines, binning them according to which absolute direction line is closest. Note that 2*pi = 0.

```{r skink_results}
# SKINK RESULTS -- DO NOT RERUN WITHOUT NEW ANALYSES
if (RERUN) {
  burnin <- 20000
  length <- 200000
  data_model <- read.table(paste0(data_directory,"model_log.tsv"),sep="\t",header=TRUE)[burnin:length,]
  data_d <- read.table(paste0(data_directory,"d_log.tsv"),sep="\t",header=TRUE)[burnin:length,]
  data_m <- read.table(paste0(data_directory,"m_log.tsv"),sep="\t",header=TRUE)[burnin:length,]
  data_c <- read.table(paste0(data_directory,"c_log.tsv"),sep="\t",header=TRUE)[burnin:length,]
  data_h <- read.table(paste0(data_directory,"h_log.tsv"),sep="\t",header=TRUE)[burnin:length,]
  data_r <- read.table(paste0(data_directory,"r_log.tsv"),sep="\t",header=TRUE)[burnin:length,]
  data_s <- read.table(paste0(data_directory,"s_log.tsv"),sep="\t",header=TRUE)[burnin:length,]
  data_a <- read.table(paste0(data_directory,"a_log.tsv"),sep="\t",header=TRUE)[burnin:length,]
  data_x <- read.table(paste0(data_directory,"x_log.tsv"),sep="\t",header=TRUE)[burnin:length,]
  data_y <- read.table(paste0(data_directory,"y_log.tsv"),sep="\t",header=TRUE)[burnin:length,]
  RERUN <- FALSE
}
```

```{r process_directions, echo=TRUE}
# PROCESSING DIRECTION LINES -- DO NOT RERUN WIHTOUT NEW ANALYSIS
if (RERUN) {
  data_h_subset <- data_h[-1]
  start_ind <- ncol(data_h) + 2
  end_ind <- ncol(data_r)
  data_r_subset <- data_r[start_ind:end_ind]
  data_s_subset <- data_s[start_ind:end_ind]
  start_loc_ind <- ncol(data_x) - ncol(data_h_subset) + 1
  end_loc_ind <- ncol(data_x)
  data_x_subset <- data_x[start_loc_ind:end_loc_ind]
  data_y_subset <- data_y[start_loc_ind:end_loc_ind]
  
  data_h_thinned <- data_h_subset[seq(1,(nrow(data_h_subset)-1),500),]
  data_r_thinned <- data_r_subset[seq(1,(nrow(data_r_subset)-1),500),]
  data_s_thinned <- data_s_subset[seq(1,(nrow(data_s_subset)-1),500),]
  data_x_thinned <- data_x_subset[seq(1,(nrow(data_x_subset)-1),500),]
  data_y_thinned <- data_y_subset[seq(1,(nrow(data_y_subset)-1),500),]
  
  data_h_long <- unlist(data_h_thinned,use.names=FALSE)
  data_r_long <- unlist(data_r_thinned,use.names=FALSE)
  data_s_long <- unlist(data_s_thinned,use.names=FALSE)
  data_x_long <- unlist(data_x_thinned,use.names=FALSE)
  data_y_long <- unlist(data_y_thinned,use.names=FALSE)
  direction_data <- data.frame(cbind(h=data_h_long, r=data_r_long, s=data_s_long, x=data_x_long, y=data_y_long))
  
  process_direction <- function(h,r,s,z,hval_extended){
    theta <- hval_extended[h+1]
    fx <- cos(theta)
    fy <- sin(theta)
    fz <- r * fx + s * fy
    proj_x <- fx + r * fz / z^2
    proj_y <- fy + s * fz / z^2
    scale <- sqrt(proj_x^2 + proj_y^2)
    true_x <- proj_x/scale
    true_y <- proj_y/scale
    true_angle <- atan2(true_y,true_x)
    if (true_angle < 0) {true_angle <- (2 * pi + true_angle)}
    true_selection <- which(abs(hval_extended - true_angle) == min(abs(hval_extended - true_angle))) - 1
    if (true_selection == (length(hval_extended)-1)) {true_selection <- 0}
    if (true_selection == 4) {true_selection <- 0}
    if (true_selection == 5) {true_selection <- 1}
    if (true_selection == 6) {true_selection <- 2}
    if (true_selection == 7) {true_selection <- 3}
    direction_info <- c(true_x,true_y,true_angle,true_selection)
  }
  
  hval_extended <- c(0,pi/4,pi/2,3*pi/4,pi,5*pi/4,3*pi/2,7*pi/4,2*pi)
  z <- 10
  data_length <- nrow(direction_data)
  for (i in 1:data_length) {
    cat("\r","Row ", i, " | ", round(as.numeric(i)/data_length*100,0), "%")
    selection <- direction_data$h[i]
    if (selection == 4) {selection <- 0}
    if (selection == 5) {selection <- 1}
    if (selection == 6) {selection <- 2}
    if (selection == 7) {selection <- 3}
    direction_data$selection[i] <- selection
    direction_info <- process_direction(direction_data$h[i],direction_data$r[i],direction_data$s[i],z,hval_extended)
    direction_data$true_x[i] <- direction_info[1]
    direction_data$true_y[i] <- direction_info[2]
    direction_data$true_angle[i] <- direction_info[3]
    direction_data$true_selection[i] <- direction_info[4]
  }
  n_tips <- length(tree$tip.label)
  n_nodes <- tree$Nnode
  node_numbers <- c((n_tips+1):(n_tips+n_nodes))
  total_length <- nrow(direction_data)
  iter_per_node <- total_length / n_nodes
  nodes_vector <- c()
  for (num in node_numbers) {
    nodes_vector <- c(nodes_vector,rep(num,iter_per_node))
  }
  direction_data$node <- nodes_vector
  write.csv(direction_data,paste0(skink_output_directory,"processed_directions.csv"),row.names=FALSE,quote=FALSE)
  RERUN <- FALSE
}
```

```{r direction_data, eval=TRUE}
direction_data <- read.csv(paste0(skink_output_directory,"processed_directions.csv"),header=TRUE)
```

```{r true_direction_lines, echo=TRUE}
# Getting true direction line counts
count_0 <- sum(direction_data$true_selection == 0)
count_1 <- sum(direction_data$true_selection == 1)
count_2 <- sum(direction_data$true_selection == 2)
count_3 <- sum(direction_data$true_selection == 3)

# Performing Chi Square test
p <- chisq.test(c(count_0,count_1,count_2,count_3))$p.value
if (p < 0.001) {
  p_string <- paste0("chi-squared test, p < 0.001")
} else {
  p_string <- paste0("chi-squared test, p = ",signif(p,digits=3))
}

# Getting densities
lines <- c("0","1","2","3")
counts <- c(count_0,count_1,count_2,count_3)
density <- counts / sum(counts)
count_data <- data.frame(cbind(lines=lines,density=as.numeric(density)))
count_data$density <- as.numeric(count_data$density)

# Plotting bars
bar_plot <- ggplot(data=count_data,aes(x=lines,y=density,fill=lines)) +
  geom_col() +
  labs(y="Proportion") +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c(color_1,color_2,color_3,color_4)) +
  labs(title=p_string,color=lines_color) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
        axis.text.y = element_text(color=lines_color,size=16),
        axis.ticks.y = element_line(color=lines_color),
        axis.title = element_text(color=lines_color),
        panel.grid = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(color=lines_color,linewidth=2),
        plot.background = element_rect(fill=background_color,color=background_color),
        panel.background = element_rect(fill=background_color),
        axis.title.x = element_blank(),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size=24),
        legend.position = "none",
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 1,color=lines_color,size=20))

# Direction lines for plotting
line_data <- data.frame(cbind(x=c(0.1,1.2,2.5,3.2),y=c(0,-0.3,-0.3,0.3),xend=c(0.9,1.8,2.5,3.8),yend=c(0,0.3,0.3,-0.3)))
direction_plot <- ggplot(line_data) +
  geom_segment(x=line_data$x,xend=line_data$xend,y=line_data$y,yend=line_data$yend,arrow=arrow(ends="both",type="closed",length=unit(0.25,"cm")),linewidth=2,color="black") +
  lims(x=c(0,4),y=c(-0.5,0.5)) +
  coord_fixed() +
  theme_void()

# Combining direction lines with bars
plot_with_arrows <- bar_plot + inset_element(direction_plot,-0.025,-0.05,1.025,0.45) & plot_annotation(theme=theme(plot.background=element_rect(color=background_color,fill=background_color)))
ggsave(paste0(direction_plot_directory,"true_direction_probs.png"),plot_with_arrows,dpi=600)
```

</div>
<div class = "col-md-3">

This graph uses a different skink analysis, just to demonstrate that the results are consistent.

```{r process_directions_2, echo=TRUE}
# PROCESSING DIRECTION LINES -- DO NOT RERUN WIHTOUT NEW ANALYSIS
if (RERUN) {
  data_h_subset <- data_h[-1]
  start_ind <- ncol(data_h) + 2
  end_ind <- ncol(data_r)
  data_r_subset <- data_r[start_ind:end_ind]
  data_s_subset <- data_s[start_ind:end_ind]
  start_loc_ind <- ncol(data_x) - ncol(data_h_subset) + 1
  end_loc_ind <- ncol(data_x)
  data_x_subset <- data_x[start_loc_ind:end_loc_ind]
  data_y_subset <- data_y[start_loc_ind:end_loc_ind]
  
  data_h_thinned <- data_h_subset[seq(1,(nrow(data_h_subset)-1),500),]
  data_r_thinned <- data_r_subset[seq(1,(nrow(data_r_subset)-1),500),]
  data_s_thinned <- data_s_subset[seq(1,(nrow(data_s_subset)-1),500),]
  data_x_thinned <- data_x_subset[seq(1,(nrow(data_x_subset)-1),500),]
  data_y_thinned <- data_y_subset[seq(1,(nrow(data_y_subset)-1),500),]
  
  data_h_long <- unlist(data_h_thinned,use.names=FALSE)
  data_r_long <- unlist(data_r_thinned,use.names=FALSE)
  data_s_long <- unlist(data_s_thinned,use.names=FALSE)
  data_x_long <- unlist(data_x_thinned,use.names=FALSE)
  data_y_long <- unlist(data_y_thinned,use.names=FALSE)
  direction_data_2 <- data.frame(cbind(h=data_h_long, r=data_r_long, s=data_s_long, x=data_x_long, y=data_y_long))
  
  process_direction <- function(h,r,s,z,hval_extended){
    theta <- hval_extended[h+1]
    fx <- cos(theta)
    fy <- sin(theta)
    fz <- r * fx + s * fy
    proj_x <- fx + r * fz / z^2
    proj_y <- fy + s * fz / z^2
    scale <- sqrt(proj_x^2 + proj_y^2)
    true_x <- proj_x/scale
    true_y <- proj_y/scale
    true_angle <- atan2(true_y,true_x)
    if (true_angle < 0) {true_angle <- (2 * pi + true_angle)}
    true_selection <- which(abs(hval_extended - true_angle) == min(abs(hval_extended - true_angle))) - 1
    if (true_selection == (length(hval_extended)-1)) {true_selection <- 0}
    if (true_selection == 4) {true_selection <- 0}
    if (true_selection == 5) {true_selection <- 1}
    if (true_selection == 6) {true_selection <- 2}
    if (true_selection == 7) {true_selection <- 3}
    direction_info <- c(true_x,true_y,true_angle,true_selection)
  }
  
  hval_extended <- c(0,pi/4,pi/2,3*pi/4,pi,5*pi/4,3*pi/2,7*pi/4,2*pi)
  z <- 10
  data_length <- nrow(direction_data_2)
  for (i in 1:data_length) {
    cat("\r","Row ", i, " | ", round(as.numeric(i)/data_length*100,0), "%")
    selection <- direction_data_2$h[i]
    if (selection == 4) {selection <- 0}
    if (selection == 5) {selection <- 1}
    if (selection == 6) {selection <- 2}
    if (selection == 7) {selection <- 3}
    direction_data_2$selection[i] <- selection
    direction_info <- process_direction(direction_data_2$h[i],direction_data_2$r[i],direction_data_2$s[i],z,hval_extended)
    direction_data_2$true_x[i] <- direction_info[1]
    direction_data_2$true_y[i] <- direction_info[2]
    direction_data_2$true_angle[i] <- direction_info[3]
    direction_data_2$true_selection[i] <- direction_info[4]
  }
  n_tips <- length(tree$tip.label)
  n_nodes <- tree$Nnode
  node_numbers <- c((n_tips+1):(n_tips+n_nodes))
  total_length <- nrow(direction_data_2)
  iter_per_node <- total_length / n_nodes
  nodes_vector <- c()
  for (num in node_numbers) {
    nodes_vector <- c(nodes_vector,rep(num,iter_per_node))
  }
  direction_data_2$node <- nodes_vector
  write.csv(direction_data_2,paste0(skink_output_directory,"processed_directions_2.csv"),row.names=FALSE,quote=FALSE)
  RERUN <- FALSE
}
```

<div class = "col-md-3">

This analysis uses the skink dataset, but the tips were shuffled, removing phylogenetic signal.

```{r skink_results_shuffled}
# SKINK RESULTS -- DO NOT RERUN WITHOUT NEW ANALYSES
if (RERUN) {
  burnin <- 20000
  length <- 200000
  data_model <- read.table(paste0(data_directory_shuffled,"model_log.tsv"),sep="\t",header=TRUE)[burnin:length,]
  data_d <- read.table(paste0(data_directory_shuffled,"d_log.tsv"),sep="\t",header=TRUE)[burnin:length,]
  data_m <- read.table(paste0(data_directory_shuffled,"m_log.tsv"),sep="\t",header=TRUE)[burnin:length,]
  data_c <- read.table(paste0(data_directory_shuffled,"c_log.tsv"),sep="\t",header=TRUE)[burnin:length,]
  data_h <- read.table(paste0(data_directory_shuffled,"h_log.tsv"),sep="\t",header=TRUE)[burnin:length,]
  data_r <- read.table(paste0(data_directory_shuffled,"r_log.tsv"),sep="\t",header=TRUE)[burnin:length,]
  data_s <- read.table(paste0(data_directory_shuffled,"s_log.tsv"),sep="\t",header=TRUE)[burnin:length,]
  data_a <- read.table(paste0(data_directory_shuffled,"a_log.tsv"),sep="\t",header=TRUE)[burnin:length,]
  data_x <- read.table(paste0(data_directory_shuffled,"x_log.tsv"),sep="\t",header=TRUE)[burnin:length,]
  data_y <- read.table(paste0(data_directory_shuffled,"y_log.tsv"),sep="\t",header=TRUE)[burnin:length,]
  RERUN <- FALSE
}
```

```{r process_directions_shuffled, echo=TRUE}
# PROCESSING DIRECTION LINES -- DO NOT RERUN WIHTOUT NEW ANALYSIS
if (RERUN) {
  data_h_subset <- data_h[-1]
  start_ind <- ncol(data_h) + 2
  end_ind <- ncol(data_r)
  data_r_subset <- data_r[start_ind:end_ind]
  data_s_subset <- data_s[start_ind:end_ind]
  start_loc_ind <- ncol(data_x) - ncol(data_h_subset) + 1
  end_loc_ind <- ncol(data_x)
  data_x_subset <- data_x[start_loc_ind:end_loc_ind]
  data_y_subset <- data_y[start_loc_ind:end_loc_ind]
  
  data_h_thinned <- data_h_subset[seq(1,(nrow(data_h_subset)-1),500),]
  data_r_thinned <- data_r_subset[seq(1,(nrow(data_r_subset)-1),500),]
  data_s_thinned <- data_s_subset[seq(1,(nrow(data_s_subset)-1),500),]
  data_x_thinned <- data_x_subset[seq(1,(nrow(data_x_subset)-1),500),]
  data_y_thinned <- data_y_subset[seq(1,(nrow(data_y_subset)-1),500),]
  
  data_h_long <- unlist(data_h_thinned,use.names=FALSE)
  data_r_long <- unlist(data_r_thinned,use.names=FALSE)
  data_s_long <- unlist(data_s_thinned,use.names=FALSE)
  data_x_long <- unlist(data_x_thinned,use.names=FALSE)
  data_y_long <- unlist(data_y_thinned,use.names=FALSE)
  direction_data_shuffled <- data.frame(cbind(h=data_h_long, r=data_r_long, s=data_s_long, x=data_x_long, y=data_y_long))
  
  process_direction <- function(h,r,s,z,hval_extended){
    theta <- hval_extended[h+1]
    fx <- cos(theta)
    fy <- sin(theta)
    fz <- r * fx + s * fy
    proj_x <- fx + r * fz / z^2
    proj_y <- fy + s * fz / z^2
    scale <- sqrt(proj_x^2 + proj_y^2)
    true_x <- proj_x/scale
    true_y <- proj_y/scale
    true_angle <- atan2(true_y,true_x)
    if (true_angle < 0) {true_angle <- (2 * pi + true_angle)}
    true_selection <- which(abs(hval_extended - true_angle) == min(abs(hval_extended - true_angle))) - 1
    if (true_selection == (length(hval_extended)-1)) {true_selection <- 0}
    if (true_selection == 4) {true_selection <- 0}
    if (true_selection == 5) {true_selection <- 1}
    if (true_selection == 6) {true_selection <- 2}
    if (true_selection == 7) {true_selection <- 3}
    direction_info <- c(true_x,true_y,true_angle,true_selection)
  }
  
  hval_extended <- c(0,pi/4,pi/2,3*pi/4,pi,5*pi/4,3*pi/2,7*pi/4,2*pi)
  z <- 10
  data_length <- nrow(direction_data_shuffled)
  for (i in 1:data_length) {
    cat("\r","Row ", i, " | ", round(as.numeric(i)/data_length*100,0), "%")
    selection <- direction_data_shuffled$h[i]
    if (selection == 4) {selection <- 0}
    if (selection == 5) {selection <- 1}
    if (selection == 6) {selection <- 2}
    if (selection == 7) {selection <- 3}
    direction_data_shuffled$selection[i] <- selection
    direction_info <- process_direction(direction_data_shuffled$h[i],direction_data_shuffled$r[i],direction_data_shuffled$s[i],z,hval_extended)
    direction_data_shuffled$true_x[i] <- direction_info[1]
    direction_data_shuffled$true_y[i] <- direction_info[2]
    direction_data_shuffled$true_angle[i] <- direction_info[3]
    direction_data_shuffled$true_selection[i] <- direction_info[4]
  }
  n_tips <- length(tree$tip.label)
  n_nodes <- tree$Nnode
  node_numbers <- c((n_tips+1):(n_tips+n_nodes))
  total_length <- nrow(direction_data_shuffled)
  iter_per_node <- total_length / n_nodes
  nodes_vector <- c()
  for (num in node_numbers) {
    nodes_vector <- c(nodes_vector,rep(num,iter_per_node))
  }
  direction_data_shuffled$node <- nodes_vector
  write.csv(direction_data_shuffled,paste0(skink_output_directory,"processed_directions_shuffled.csv"),row.names=FALSE,quote=FALSE)
  RERUN <- FALSE
}
```

```{r direction_data_shuffled, eval=TRUE}
direction_data_shuffled <- read.csv(paste0(skink_output_directory,"processed_directions_shuffled.csv"),header=TRUE)
```

```{r true_direction_lines_shuffled, echo=TRUE}
# Getting true direction line counts
count_0 <- sum(direction_data_shuffled$true_selection == 0)
count_1 <- sum(direction_data_shuffled$true_selection == 1)
count_2 <- sum(direction_data_shuffled$true_selection == 2)
count_3 <- sum(direction_data_shuffled$true_selection == 3)

# Performing Chi Square test
p <- chisq.test(c(count_0,count_1,count_2,count_3))$p.value
if (p < 0.001) {
  p_string <- paste0("chi-squared test, p < 0.001")
} else {
  p_string <- paste0("chi-squared test, p = ",signif(p,digits=3))
}

# Getting densities
lines <- c("0","1","2","3")
counts <- c(count_0,count_1,count_2,count_3)
density <- counts / sum(counts)
count_data <- data.frame(cbind(lines=lines,density=as.numeric(density)))
count_data$density <- as.numeric(count_data$density)

# Plotting bars
bar_plot <- ggplot(data=count_data,aes(x=lines,y=density,fill=lines)) +
  geom_col() +
  labs(y="Proportion") +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c(color_1,color_2,color_3,color_4)) +
  labs(title=p_string,color=lines_color) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
        axis.text.y = element_text(color=lines_color,size=16),
        axis.ticks.y = element_line(color=lines_color),
        axis.title = element_text(color=lines_color),
        panel.grid = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(color=lines_color,linewidth=2),
        plot.background = element_rect(fill=background_color,color=background_color),
        panel.background = element_rect(fill=background_color),
        axis.title.x = element_blank(),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size=24),
        legend.position = "none",
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 1,color=lines_color,size=20))

# Direction lines for plotting
line_data <- data.frame(cbind(x=c(0.1,1.2,2.5,3.2),y=c(0,-0.3,-0.3,0.3),xend=c(0.9,1.8,2.5,3.8),yend=c(0,0.3,0.3,-0.3)))
direction_plot <- ggplot(line_data) +
  geom_segment(x=line_data$x,xend=line_data$xend,y=line_data$y,yend=line_data$yend,arrow=arrow(ends="both",type="closed",length=unit(0.25,"cm")),linewidth=2,color="black") +
  lims(x=c(0,4),y=c(-0.5,0.5)) +
  coord_fixed() +
  theme_void()

# Combining direction lines with bars
plot_with_arrows <- bar_plot + inset_element(direction_plot,-0.025,-0.05,1.025,0.45) & plot_annotation(theme=theme(plot.background=element_rect(color=background_color,fill=background_color)))
ggsave(paste0(direction_plot_directory,"true_direction_probs_shuffled.png"),plot_with_arrows,dpi=600)
```

</div>
</div>

<div class = "col-md-3">

```{r true_direction_lines_show, eval=TRUE, results=TRUE}
include_graphics(paste0(direction_plot_directory,"true_direction_probs.png"))
```

---

These are direction line plots for each major subclade: *Ctenotus*, *Lerista*, and "Third Clade".

<div class = "row">
<div class = "col-md-4">

#### *Ctenotus*

```{r directions_ctenotus, echo=TRUE}
node_list <- c(222:309)
directions_ctenotus <- direction_data[which(direction_data$node %in% node_list),]

# Getting true direction line counts
count_0 <- sum(directions_ctenotus$true_selection == 0)
count_1 <- sum(directions_ctenotus$true_selection == 1)
count_2 <- sum(directions_ctenotus$true_selection == 2)
count_3 <- sum(directions_ctenotus$true_selection == 3)

# Performing Chi Square test
p <- chisq.test(c(count_0,count_1,count_2,count_3))$p.value
if (p < 0.001) {
  p_string <- paste0("chi-squared test, p < 0.001")
} else {
  p_string <- paste0("chi-squared test, p = ",signif(p,digits=3))
}

# Getting densities
lines <- c("0","1","2","3")
counts <- c(count_0,count_1,count_2,count_3)
density <- counts / sum(counts)
count_data <- data.frame(cbind(lines=lines,density=as.numeric(density)))
count_data$density <- as.numeric(count_data$density)

# Plotting bars
bar_plot <- ggplot(data=count_data,aes(x=lines,y=density,fill=lines)) +
  geom_col() +
  labs(y="Proportion") +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c(color_1,color_2,color_3,color_4)) +
  labs(title=p_string,color=lines_color) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
        axis.text.y = element_text(color=lines_color,size=16),
        axis.ticks.y = element_line(color=lines_color),
        axis.title = element_text(color=lines_color),
        panel.grid = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(color=lines_color,linewidth=2),
        plot.background = element_rect(fill=background_color,color=background_color),
        panel.background = element_rect(fill=background_color),
        axis.title.x = element_blank(),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size=24),
        legend.position = "none",
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 1,color=lines_color,size=20))

# Direction lines for plotting
line_data <- data.frame(cbind(x=c(0.1,1.2,2.5,3.2),y=c(0,-0.3,-0.3,0.3),xend=c(0.9,1.8,2.5,3.8),yend=c(0,0.3,0.3,-0.3)))
direction_plot <- ggplot(line_data) +
  geom_segment(x=line_data$x,xend=line_data$xend,y=line_data$y,yend=line_data$yend,arrow=arrow(ends="both",type="closed",length=unit(0.25,"cm")),linewidth=2,color="black") +
  lims(x=c(0,4),y=c(-0.5,0.5)) +
  coord_fixed() +
  theme_void()

# Combining direction lines with bars
plot_with_arrows <- bar_plot + inset_element(direction_plot,-0.025,-0.05,1.025,0.45) & plot_annotation(theme=theme(plot.background=element_rect(color=background_color,fill=background_color)))
ggsave(paste0(direction_plot_directory,"directions_ctenotus.png"),plot_with_arrows,dpi=600)
```

```{r directions_thirdclade, echo=TRUE}
count_1 <- sum(directions_thirdclade$true_selection == 1)
```
