``` {r directions_thirdclade_manuscript} 
        legend.position = "none",
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = .5,color=lines_color,size=20))

# Direction lines for plotting
line_data <- data.frame(cbind(x=c(0.1,1.2,2.5,3.2),y=c(0,-0.3,-0.3,0.3),xend=c(0.9,1.8,2.5,3.8),yend=c(0,0.3,0.3,-0.3)))
direction_plot <- ggplot(line_data) +
  geom_segment(x=line_data$x,xend=line_data$xend,y=line_data$y,yend=line_data$yend,arrow=arrow(ends="both",type="closed",length=unit(0.25,"cm")),linewidth=2,color="black") +
  lims(x=c(0,4),y=c(-0.5,0.5)) +
  coord_fixed() +
  theme_void()

# Combining direction lines with bars
directions_thirdclade_manuscript <- bar_plot + inset_element(direction_plot,-0.025,-0.05,1.025,0.45) & plot_annotation(theme=theme(plot.background=element_rect(color=background_color,fill=background_color)))
set_plot_theme("dark")
```

```{r directions_thirdclade_show, eval=TRUE, results=TRUE}
include_graphics(paste0(direction_plot_directory,"directions_thirdclade.png"))
```

</div>
</div>

```{r directions_all_manuscript}
set_plot_theme("light")
directions_all_manuscript <- directions_ctenotus_manuscript + directions_lerista_manuscript + directions_thirdclade_manuscript + plot_layout(ncol=3)
set_plot_theme("dark")
```

---

### Direction Maps

<div class = "row">
<div class = "col-md-7">

These are the directions mapped onto Australia. On the right is a raster showing the best true (projected) splitting direction for each grid cell. White cells indicate that multiple splitting directions are equally preferred. Below are rasters for each individual splitting direction. First are the un-normalized rasters, showing the primary areas for each splitting direction. Following are the normalized rasters, showing the number of splits in each direction normalized by the total number of splits in that grid cell across all directions. Bright cells show an over-representation of splits in that direction.

```{r direction_map, echo=TRUE}
xmin <- min(direction_data$x)
xmax <- max(direction_data$x)
ymin <- min(direction_data$y)
ymax <- max(direction_data$y)

direction_data_factored <- direction_data
direction_data_factored$true_selection <- as.factor(direction_data$true_selection)
all_directions <- ggplot(australia_shape) +
  lims(x=c(xmin,xmax),y=c(ymin,ymax)) +
  geom_sf(fill=NA,color=lines_color) +
  geom_point(data=direction_data_factored,aes(x=direction_data_factored$x,y=direction_data_factored$y,fill=direction_data_factored$true_selection),pch=21,stroke=NA,size=.75) +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c(color_1,color_2,color_3,color_4)) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(panel.background = element_rect(fill=background_color,color=background_color),
        legend.position="none")

line_data <- data.frame(cbind(x=c(0.1,1.2,2.2,2.6),y=c(0,-0.3,-0.4,0.3),xend=c(0.9,1.8,2.2,3),yend=c(0,0.3,0.4,-0.3)))
line_plot <- ggplot(line_data) +
  geom_segment(x=line_data$x,xend=line_data$xend,y=line_data$y,yend=line_data$yend,arrow=arrow(ends="both",type="closed",length=unit(0.25,"cm")),linewidth=2,color=c(color_1,color_2,color_3,color_4)) +
  lims(x=c(0,3.1),y=c(-0.5,0.5)) +
  coord_fixed() +
  theme_void()

all_directions_labelled <- all_directions + inset_element(line_plot,.65,.8,.99,.99)  & plot_annotation(theme=theme(plot.background=element_rect(color=background_color,fill=background_color)))
ggsave(paste0(direction_plot_directory,"map_all.png"),all_directions_labelled,dpi=600,width=7,height=5)

direction_data_0 <- direction_data[which(direction_data$true_selection==0),]
direction_data_1 <- direction_data[which(direction_data$true_selection==1),]
direction_data_2 <- direction_data[which(direction_data$true_selection==2),]
direction_data_3 <- direction_data[which(direction_data$true_selection==3),]

plot_directions <- function(data,color) {
  plot <- ggplot(australia_shape) +
  lims(x=c(xmin,xmax),y=c(ymin,ymax)) +
  geom_sf(fill=NA,color=lines_color) +
  geom_point(data=data,aes(x=data$x,y=data$y),pch=21,stroke=NA,fill=color,size=.75) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(panel.background = element_rect(fill=background_color,color=background_color))
  return(plot)
}

plot_inset <- function(line_data) {
  plot <- ggplot(line_data) +
  geom_segment(x=line_data$x,xend=line_data$xend,y=line_data$y,yend=line_data$yend,arrow=arrow(ends="both",type="closed",length=unit(0.25,"cm")),linewidth=2,color="black") +
  lims(x=c(0,1),y=c(-0.5,0.5)) +
  coord_fixed() +
  theme_void()
  return(plot)
}

map_0 <- plot_directions(direction_data_0,color_1)
map_1 <- plot_directions(direction_data_1,color_2)
map_2 <- plot_directions(direction_data_2,color_3)
map_3 <- plot_directions(direction_data_3,color_4)

inset_0 <- plot_inset(data.frame(cbind(x=c(0.1),y=c(0),xend=c(0.9),yend=c(0))))
inset_1 <- plot_inset(data.frame(cbind(x=c(0.2),y=c(-.3),xend=c(0.8),yend=c(.3))))
inset_2 <- plot_inset(data.frame(cbind(x=c(0.5),y=c(-.3),xend=c(0.5),yend=c(.3))))
inset_3 <- plot_inset(data.frame(cbind(x=c(0.2),y=c(.3),xend=c(0.8),yend=c(-.3))))

plot_map_0 <- map_0 + inset_element(inset_0,.7,.6,.99,.99)  & plot_annotation(theme=theme(plot.background=element_rect(color=background_color,fill=background_color)))
plot_map_1 <- map_1 + inset_element(inset_1,.7,.6,.99,.99)  & plot_annotation(theme=theme(plot.background=element_rect(color=background_color,fill=background_color)))
plot_map_2 <- map_2 + inset_element(inset_2,.7,.6,.99,.99)  & plot_annotation(theme=theme(plot.background=element_rect(color=background_color,fill=background_color)))
plot_map_3 <- map_3 + inset_element(inset_3,.7,.6,.99,.99)  & plot_annotation(theme=theme(plot.background=element_rect(color=background_color,fill=background_color)))

ggsave(paste0(direction_plot_directory,"map_0.png"),plot_map_0,dpi=600,width=7,height=5)
ggsave(paste0(direction_plot_directory,"map_1.png"),plot_map_1,dpi=600,width=7,height=5)
ggsave(paste0(direction_plot_directory,"map_2.png"),plot_map_2,dpi=600,width=7,height=5)
ggsave(paste0(direction_plot_directory,"map_3.png"),plot_map_3,dpi=600,width=7,height=5)
```

```{r direction_raster, echo=TRUE}
raster_csv <- read.csv(paste0(aridity_data_directory,"interpolated_raster.csv"))[,c("x","y","delta1","delta2")]
raster_df <- data.frame(raster_csv)
coordinates(raster_df) <- ~ x + y
gridded(raster_df) <- TRUE
raster_data <- stack(raster_df)
raster_data <- disaggregate(raster_data,c(2,1),method="bilinear")
raster_data <- raster::mask(raster_data,as(australia_shape,"Spatial"))

direction_data <- read.csv(paste0(skink_output_directory,"processed_directions.csv"),header=TRUE)
node_locations_df <- direction_data[,c("x","y")]

nodes_0 <- rasterize(node_locations_df[which(direction_data$true_selection==0),],raster_data,fun="count")
nodes_1 <- rasterize(node_locations_df[which(direction_data$true_selection==1),],raster_data,fun="count")
nodes_2 <- rasterize(node_locations_df[which(direction_data$true_selection==2),],raster_data,fun="count")
nodes_3 <- rasterize(node_locations_df[which(direction_data$true_selection==3),],raster_data,fun="count")

values_0 <- values(nodes_0)
values_1 <- values(nodes_1)
values_2 <- values(nodes_2)
values_3 <- values(nodes_3)

values_all <- rep(NA,length(values_0))
for (i in 1:length(values_all)) {
  all_vals <- c(values_0[i],values_1[i],values_2[i],values_3[i])
  if (all(is.na(all_vals))) {values_all[i] <- NA} else {
    max_ind <- which(all_vals==max(all_vals,na.rm=TRUE))
    if (length(max_ind) > 1) {values_all[i] <- 5} else {
      values_all[i] <- max_ind - 1
    }
  }
  if (is.na(values_0[i])) {values_0[i] <- 0}
  if (is.na(values_1[i])) {values_1[i] <- 0}
  if (is.na(values_2[i])) {values_2[i] <- 0}
  if (is.na(values_3[i])) {values_3[i] <- 0}
}

nodes_all <- nodes_0
values(nodes_all) <- values_all

values(nodes_0) <- values_0
values(nodes_1) <- values_1
values(nodes_2) <- values_2
values(nodes_3) <- values_3

names(nodes_0) <- "count0"
names(nodes_1) <- "count1"
names(nodes_2) <- "count2"
names(nodes_3) <- "count3"
names(nodes_all) <- "best"

raster_data <- addLayer(raster_data,nodes_0)
raster_data <- addLayer(raster_data,nodes_1)
raster_data <- addLayer(raster_data,nodes_2)
raster_data <- addLayer(raster_data,nodes_3)
raster_data <- addLayer(raster_data,nodes_all)

raster_df <- as.data.frame(raster_data,xy=TRUE)
raster_df <- raster_df[!is.na(raster_df$delta1),]
raster_df$best <- as.factor(raster_df$best)
max_value <- max(c(raster_df$count0,raster_df$count1,raster_df$count2,raster_df$count3),na.rm=TRUE)
raster_df$prop0 <- raster_df$count0 / max(raster_df$count0,na.rm=TRUE)
raster_df$prop1 <- raster_df$count1 / max(raster_df$count1,na.rm=TRUE)
raster_df$prop2 <- raster_df$count2 / max(raster_df$count2,na.rm=TRUE)
raster_df$prop3 <- raster_df$count3 / max(raster_df$count3,na.rm=TRUE)
cell_total <- c()
for (i in 1:nrow(raster_df)) {
  cell_total[i] <- sum(raster_df$count0[i],raster_df$count1[i],raster_df$count2[i],raster_df$count3[i],na.rm=TRUE)
}
raster_df$prop0scaled <- raster_df$count0 / cell_total
raster_df$prop1scaled <- raster_df$count1 / cell_total
raster_df$prop2scaled <- raster_df$count2 / cell_total
raster_df$prop3scaled <- raster_df$count3 / cell_total

xmin <- st_bbox(australia_shape)$xmin
xmax <- st_bbox(australia_shape)$xmax
ymin <- st_bbox(australia_shape)$ymin
ymax <- st_bbox(australia_shape)$ymax

all_directions <- ggplot(australia_shape) +
  lims(x=c(xmin,xmax),y=c(ymin,ymax)) +
  geom_tile(data=raster_df,aes_string(x="x",y="y",fill="best")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c(color_1,color_2,color_3,color_4,lines_color)) +
  geom_sf(fill=NA,color=lines_color,lwd=2) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(panel.background = element_rect(fill=background_color,color=background_color),
        legend.position="none")

line_data <- data.frame(cbind(x=c(0.1,1.2,2.2,2.6),y=c(0,-0.3,-0.4,0.3),xend=c(0.9,1.8,2.2,3.2),yend=c(0,0.3,0.4,-0.3)))
line_plot <- ggplot(line_data) +
  geom_segment(x=line_data$x,xend=line_data$xend,y=line_data$y,yend=line_data$yend,arrow=arrow(ends="both",type="closed",length=unit(0.2,"cm")),linewidth=2,color=c(color_1,color_2,color_3,color_4)) +
  lims(x=c(0,3.1),y=c(-0.5,0.5)) +
  coord_fixed() +
  theme_void()

all_directions_labelled <- all_directions + inset_element(line_plot,.01,.8,.3,.99)  & plot_annotation(theme=theme(plot.background=element_rect(color=background_color,fill=background_color)))
ggsave(paste0(direction_plot_directory,"raster_all.png"),all_directions_labelled,dpi=600,width=7,height=5)

plot_directions <- function(column,color) {
  plot <- ggplot(australia_shape) +
  lims(x=c(xmin,xmax),y=c(ymin,ymax)) +
  geom_tile(data=raster_df,aes_string(x="x",y="y",fill=column)) +
  scale_fill_gradient(limits=c(0,1),low=background_color,high=color) +
  guides(fill=guide_colorbar(barwidth=10,barheight=.5)) +
  geom_sf(fill=NA,color=lines_color,lwd=2) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(panel.background = element_rect(fill=background_color,color=background_color),
        legend.text=element_text(color=lines_color),
        legend.title=element_blank(),
        legend.position="none")
  return(plot)
}

plot_inset <- function(line_data) {
  plot <- ggplot(line_data) +
  geom_segment(x=line_data$x,xend=line_data$xend,y=line_data$y,yend=line_data$yend,arrow=arrow(ends="both",type="closed",length=unit(0.2,"cm")),linewidth=2,color=lines_color) +
  lims(x=c(0,1),y=c(-0.5,0.5)) +
  coord_fixed() +
  theme_void()
  return(plot)
}

map_prop_0 <- plot_directions("prop0",color_1)
map_prop_1 <- plot_directions("prop1",color_2)
map_prop_2 <- plot_directions("prop2",color_3)
map_prop_3 <- plot_directions("prop3",color_4)

inset_0 <- plot_inset(data.frame(cbind(x=c(0.1),y=c(0),xend=c(0.9),yend=c(0))))
inset_1 <- plot_inset(data.frame(cbind(x=c(0.2),y=c(-.3),xend=c(0.8),yend=c(.3))))
inset_2 <- plot_inset(data.frame(cbind(x=c(0.5),y=c(-.3),xend=c(0.5),yend=c(.3))))
inset_3 <- plot_inset(data.frame(cbind(x=c(0.2),y=c(.3),xend=c(0.8),yend=c(-.3))))

plot_map_prop_0 <- map_prop_0 + inset_element(inset_0,.8,.7,1,1)  & plot_annotation(theme=theme(plot.background=element_rect(color=background_color,fill=background_color)))
plot_map_prop_1 <- map_prop_1 + inset_element(inset_1,.8,.7,1,1)  & plot_annotation(theme=theme(plot.background=element_rect(color=background_color,fill=background_color)))
plot_map_prop_2 <- map_prop_2 + inset_element(inset_2,.8,.7,1,1)  & plot_annotation(theme=theme(plot.background=element_rect(color=background_color,fill=background_color)))
plot_map_prop_3 <- map_prop_3 + inset_element(inset_3,.8,.7,1,1)  & plot_annotation(theme=theme(plot.background=element_rect(color=background_color,fill=background_color)))

prop_plot <- plot_map_prop_0 + plot_map_prop_1 + plot_map_prop_2 + plot_map_prop_3 + plot_layout(ncol=4) & theme(plot.background=element_rect(fill=background_color,color=NA))

ggsave(paste0(direction_plot_directory,"raster_prop.png"),prop_plot,dpi=600,width=14,height=4)

map_scaled_0 <- plot_directions("prop0scaled",color_1)
map_scaled_1 <- plot_directions("prop1scaled",color_2)
map_scaled_2 <- plot_directions("prop2scaled",color_3)
map_scaled_3 <- plot_directions("prop3scaled",color_4)

plot_map_scaled_0 <- map_scaled_0 + inset_element(inset_0,.8,.7,1,1)  & plot_annotation(theme=theme(plot.background=element_rect(color=background_color,fill=background_color)))
plot_map_scaled_1 <- map_scaled_1 + inset_element(inset_1,.8,.7,1,1)  & plot_annotation(theme=theme(plot.background=element_rect(color=background_color,fill=background_color)))
plot_map_scaled_2 <- map_scaled_2 + inset_element(inset_2,.8,.7,1,1)  & plot_annotation(theme=theme(plot.background=element_rect(color=background_color,fill=background_color)))
plot_map_scaled_3 <- map_scaled_3 + inset_element(inset_3,.8,.7,1,1)  & plot_annotation(theme=theme(plot.background=element_rect(color=background_color,fill=background_color)))

scaled_plot <- plot_map_scaled_0 + plot_map_scaled_1 + plot_map_scaled_2 + plot_map_scaled_3 + plot_layout(ncol=4) & theme(plot.background=element_rect(fill=background_color,color=NA))

ggsave(paste0(direction_plot_directory,"raster_scaled.png"),scaled_plot,dpi=600,width=14,height=4)
```

```{r direction_raster_manuscript}
set_plot_theme("light")

all_directions <- ggplot(australia_shape) +
  lims(x=c(xmin,xmax),y=c(ymin,ymax)) +
  geom_tile(data=raster_df,aes_string(x="x",y="y",fill="best")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c(color_1,color_2,color_3,color_4,lines_color)) +
  geom_sf(fill=NA,color=lines_color,lwd=2) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(panel.background = element_rect(fill=background_color,color=background_color),
        legend.position="none")

line_data <- data.frame(cbind(x=c(0.1,1.2,2.2,2.6),y=c(0,-0.3,-0.4,0.3),xend=c(0.9,1.8,2.2,3.2),yend=c(0,0.3,0.4,-0.3)))
line_plot <- ggplot(line_data) +
  geom_segment(x=line_data$x,xend=line_data$xend,y=line_data$y,yend=line_data$yend,arrow=arrow(ends="both",type="closed",length=unit(0.2,"cm")),linewidth=2,color=c(color_1,color_2,color_3,color_4)) +
  lims(x=c(0,3.1),y=c(-0.5,0.5)) +
  coord_fixed() +
  theme_void()

direction_raster_manuscript <- all_directions & plot_annotation(theme=theme(plot.background=element_rect(color=background_color,fill=background_color)))
ggsave(paste0(manuscript_plot_directory,"raster_all.png"),direction_raster_manuscript,dpi=600,width=7,height=5)

map_prop_0 <- plot_directions("prop0",color_1)
map_prop_1 <- plot_directions("prop1",color_2)
map_prop_2 <- plot_directions("prop2",color_3)
map_prop_3 <- plot_directions("prop3",color_4)

inset_0 <- plot_inset(data.frame(cbind(x=c(0.1),y=c(0),xend=c(0.9),yend=c(0))))
inset_1 <- plot_inset(data.frame(cbind(x=c(0.2),y=c(-.3),xend=c(0.8),yend=c(.3))))
inset_2 <- plot_inset(data.frame(cbind(x=c(0.5),y=c(-.3),xend=c(0.5),yend=c(.3))))
inset_3 <- plot_inset(data.frame(cbind(x=c(0.2),y=c(.3),xend=c(0.8),yend=c(-.3))))

plot_map_prop_0 <- map_prop_0 + inset_element(inset_0,.8,.7,1,1)  & plot_annotation(theme=theme(plot.background=element_rect(color=background_color,fill=background_color)))
plot_map_prop_1 <- map_prop_1 + inset_element(inset_1,.8,.7,1,1)  & plot_annotation(theme=theme(plot.background=element_rect(color=background_color,fill=background_color)))
plot_map_prop_2 <- map_prop_2 + inset_element(inset_2,.8,.7,1,1)  & plot_annotation(theme=theme(plot.background=element_rect(color=background_color,fill=background_color)))
plot_map_prop_3 <- map_prop_3 + inset_element(inset_3,.8,.7,1,1)  & plot_annotation(theme=theme(plot.background=element_rect(color=background_color,fill=background_color)))

prop_plot_manuscript <- plot_map_prop_0 + plot_map_prop_1 + plot_map_prop_2 + plot_map_prop_3 + plot_layout(ncol=4) & theme(plot.background=element_rect(fill=background_color,color=NA))

ggsave(paste0(manuscript_plot_directory,"raster_prop.png"),prop_plot_manuscript,dpi=600,width=14,height=4)
set_plot_theme("dark")
```

```{r direction_vector_manuscript}
set_plot_theme("light")

delta_x <- c(-.4,-.3,0,-.3)
delta_xend <- c(.4,.3,0,.3)
delta_y <- c(0,-.3,-.4,.3)
delta_yend <- c(0,.3,.4,-.3)

for (i in 1:nrow(raster_df)) {
  raster_df$vec_x[i] <- raster_df$x[i] + delta_x[as.numeric(raster_df$best[i])] # Do not need to add 1 because as.numeric turns factors into (1,2,3,4)
  raster_df$vec_xend[i] <- raster_df$x[i] + delta_xend[as.numeric(raster_df$best[i])]
  raster_df$vec_y[i] <- raster_df$y[i] + delta_y[as.numeric(raster_df$best[i])]
  raster_df$vec_yend[i] <- raster_df$y[i] + delta_yend[as.numeric(raster_df$best[i])]
  raster_df$sum[i] <- raster_df$count0[i] + raster_df$count1[i] + raster_df$count2[i] + raster_df$count3[i]
}
raster_df$density <- raster_df$sum / max(raster_df$sum)

all_directions <- ggplot(australia_shape) +
  lims(x=c(xmin,xmax),y=c(ymin,ymax)) +
  geom_tile(data=raster_df,aes(x=x,y=y,fill=density)) +
  scale_fill_gradient(name="Event Density",low=background_color,high=color_4,breaks=c(0.01,.25,.5,.75,1),labels=c("0",".25",".5",".75","1")) +
  geom_segment(data=raster_df,aes(x=vec_x,xend=vec_xend,y=vec_y,yend=vec_yend),lwd=1,lineend="round") +
  geom_sf(fill=NA,color=lines_color,lwd=2) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(panel.background = element_rect(fill=background_color,color=background_color),
        legend.position=c(0.15,0.875),
        legend.direction = "horizontal",
        legend.title.position="top",
        legend.title=element_text(size=16,hjust=0.5),
        legend.frame = element_rect(color=lines_color,fill=NA),
        legend.key.size = unit(0.9, "cm"),
        legend.text=element_text(size=16))

direction_vectors_manuscript <- all_directions & plot_annotation(theme=theme(plot.background=element_rect(color=background_color,fill=background_color)))
ggsave(paste0(manuscript_plot_directory,"direction_vectors.png"),direction_vectors_manuscript,dpi=600,width=7,height=5)
set_plot_theme("dark")
```

```{r direction_raster_shuffled}
raster_csv <- read.csv(paste0(aridity_data_directory,"interpolated_raster.csv"))[,c("x","y","delta1","delta2")]
raster_df <- data.frame(raster_csv)
coordinates(raster_df) <- ~ x + y
gridded(raster_df) <- TRUE
raster_data <- stack(raster_df)

direction_data <- read.csv(paste0(skink_output_directory,"processed_directions_shuffled.csv"),header=TRUE)
node_locations_df <- direction_data[,c("x","y")]

nodes_0 <- rasterize(node_locations_df[which(direction_data$true_selection==0),],raster_data,fun="count")
nodes_1 <- rasterize(node_locations_df[which(direction_data$true_selection==1),],raster_data,fun="count")
nodes_2 <- rasterize(node_locations_df[which(direction_data$true_selection==2),],raster_data,fun="count")
nodes_3 <- rasterize(node_locations_df[which(direction_data$true_selection==3),],raster_data,fun="count")

values_0 <- values(nodes_0)
values_1 <- values(nodes_1)
values_2 <- values(nodes_2)
values_3 <- values(nodes_3)

values_all <- rep(NA,length(values_0))
for (i in 1:length(values_all)) {
  all_vals <- c(values_0[i],values_1[i],values_2[i],values_3[i])
  if (all(is.na(all_vals))) {values_all[i] <- NA} else {
    max_ind <- which(all_vals==max(all_vals,na.rm=TRUE))
    if (length(max_ind) > 1) {values_all[i] <- 5} else {
      values_all[i] <- max_ind - 1
    }
  }
  if (is.na(values_0[i])) {values_0[i] <- 0}
  if (is.na(values_1[i])) {values_1[i] <- 0}
  if (is.na(values_2[i])) {values_2[i] <- 0}
  if (is.na(values_3[i])) {values_3[i] <- 0}
}

nodes_all <- nodes_0
values(nodes_all) <- values_all

values(nodes_0) <- values_0
values(nodes_1) <- values_1
values(nodes_2) <- values_2
values(nodes_3) <- values_3

names(nodes_0) <- "count0"
names(nodes_1) <- "count1"
names(nodes_2) <- "count2"
names(nodes_3) <- "count3"
names(nodes_all) <- "best"

raster_data <- addLayer(raster_data,nodes_0)
raster_data <- addLayer(raster_data,nodes_1)
raster_data <- addLayer(raster_data,nodes_2)
raster_data <- addLayer(raster_data,nodes_3)
raster_data <- addLayer(raster_data,nodes_all)

raster_df <- as.data.frame(raster_data,xy=TRUE)
raster_df <- raster_df[!is.na(raster_df$delta1),]
raster_df$best <- as.factor(raster_df$best)
max_value <- max(c(raster_df$count0,raster_df$count1,raster_df$count2,raster_df$count3),na.rm=TRUE)
raster_df$prop0 <- raster_df$count0 / max(raster_df$count0,na.rm=TRUE)
raster_df$prop1 <- raster_df$count1 / max(raster_df$count1,na.rm=TRUE)
raster_df$prop2 <- raster_df$count2 / max(raster_df$count2,na.rm=TRUE)
raster_df$prop3 <- raster_df$count3 / max(raster_df$count3,na.rm=TRUE)
cell_total <- c()
for (i in 1:nrow(raster_df)) {
  cell_total[i] <- sum(raster_df$count0[i],raster_df$count1[i],raster_df$count2[i],raster_df$count3[i],na.rm=TRUE)
}
raster_df$prop0scaled <- raster_df$count0 / cell_total
raster_df$prop1scaled <- raster_df$count1 / cell_total
raster_df$prop2scaled <- raster_df$count2 / cell_total
raster_df$prop3scaled <- raster_df$count3 / cell_total

xmin <- st_bbox(australia_shape)$xmin
xmax <- st_bbox(australia_shape)$xmax
ymin <- st_bbox(australia_shape)$ymin
ymax <- st_bbox(australia_shape)$ymax

all_directions <- ggplot(australia_shape) +
  lims(x=c(xmin,xmax),y=c(ymin,ymax)) +
  geom_tile(data=raster_df,aes_string(x="x",y="y",fill="best")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c(color_1,color_2,color_3,color_4,lines_color)) +
  geom_sf(fill=NA,color=lines_color,lwd=2) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(panel.background = element_rect(fill=background_color,color=background_color),
        legend.position="none")

line_data <- data.frame(cbind(x=c(0.1,1.2,2.2,2.6),y=c(0,-0.3,-0.4,0.3),xend=c(0.9,1.8,2.2,3.2),yend=c(0,0.3,0.4,-0.3)))
line_plot <- ggplot(line_data) +
  geom_segment(x=line_data$x,xend=line_data$xend,y=line_data$y,yend=line_data$yend,arrow=arrow(ends="both",type="closed",length=unit(0.2,"cm")),linewidth=2,color=c(color_1,color_2,color_3,color_4)) +
  lims(x=c(0,3.1),y=c(-0.5,0.5)) +
  coord_fixed() +
  theme_void()

all_directions_labelled <- all_directions + inset_element(line_plot,.01,.8,.3,.99)  & plot_annotation(theme=theme(plot.background=element_rect(color=background_color,fill=background_color)))
ggsave(paste0(direction_plot_directory,"raster_all_shuffled.png"),all_directions_labelled,dpi=600,width=7,height=5)
```


</div>
<div class = "col-md-5">

```{r direction_raster_show, eval=TRUE, results=TRUE}
include_graphics(paste0(direction_plot_directory,"raster_all.png"))
```

</div>
</div>

```{r direction_raster_prop_show, eval=TRUE, results=TRUE}
include_graphics(paste0(direction_plot_directory,"raster_prop.png"))
```

```{r direction_raster_scaled_show, eval=TRUE, results=TRUE}
include_graphics(paste0(direction_plot_directory,"raster_scaled.png"))
```


These are direction maps for each major subclade: *Ctenotus*, *Lerista*, and "Third Clade".

<div class = "row">
<div class = "col-md-4">

#### *Ctenotus*

```{r directions_map_ctenotus, echo=TRUE}
node_list <- c(222:309)
directions_ctenotus <- direction_data[which(direction_data$node %in% node_list),]

xmin <- min(direction_data$x)
xmax <- max(direction_data$x)
ymin <- min(direction_data$y)
ymax <- max(direction_data$y)

directions_ctenotus_factored <- directions_ctenotus
directions_ctenotus_factored$true_selection <- as.factor(directions_ctenotus$true_selection)
all_directions <- ggplot(australia_shape) +
  lims(x=c(xmin,xmax),y=c(ymin,ymax)) +
  geom_sf(fill=NA,color=lines_color) +
  geom_point(data=directions_ctenotus_factored,aes(x=directions_ctenotus_factored$x,y=directions_ctenotus_factored$y,fill=directions_ctenotus_factored$true_selection),pch=21,stroke=NA,size=.75) +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c(color_1,color_2,color_3,color_4)) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(panel.background = element_rect(fill=background_color,color=background_color),
        legend.position="none")

line_data <- data.frame(cbind(x=c(0.1,1.2,2.2,2.6),y=c(0,-0.3,-0.4,0.3),xend=c(0.9,1.8,2.2,3),yend=c(0,0.3,0.4,-0.3)))
line_plot <- ggplot(line_data) +
  geom_segment(x=line_data$x,xend=line_data$xend,y=line_data$y,yend=line_data$yend,arrow=arrow(ends="both",type="closed",length=unit(0.25,"cm")),linewidth=2,color=c(color_1,color_2,color_3,color_4)) +
  lims(x=c(0,3.1),y=c(-0.5,0.5)) +
  coord_fixed() +
  theme_void()

all_directions_labelled <- all_directions + inset_element(line_plot,.65,.8,.99,.99) & plot_annotation(theme=theme(plot.background=element_rect(color=background_color,fill=background_color)))
ggsave(paste0(direction_plot_directory,"directions_map_ctenotus.png"),all_directions_labelled,dpi=600,width=7,height=5)
```

```{r direction_raster_ctenotus, echo=TRUE}
raster_csv <- read.csv(paste0(aridity_data_directory,"interpolated_raster.csv"))[,c("x","y","delta1","delta2")]
raster_df <- data.frame(raster_csv)
coordinates(raster_df) <- ~ x + y
gridded(raster_df) <- TRUE
raster_data <- stack(raster_df)

direction_data <- read.csv(paste0(skink_output_directory,"processed_directions.csv"),header=TRUE)
node_list <- c(222:309)
directions_ctenotus <- direction_data[which(direction_data$node %in% node_list),]
node_locations_df <- directions_ctenotus[,c("x","y")]

nodes_0 <- rasterize(node_locations_df[which(directions_ctenotus$true_selection==0),],raster_data,fun="count")
nodes_1 <- rasterize(node_locations_df[which(directions_ctenotus$true_selection==1),],raster_data,fun="count")
nodes_2 <- rasterize(node_locations_df[which(directions_ctenotus$true_selection==2),],raster_data,fun="count")
nodes_3 <- rasterize(node_locations_df[which(directions_ctenotus$true_selection==3),],raster_data,fun="count")

values_0 <- values(nodes_0)
values_1 <- values(nodes_1)
values_2 <- values(nodes_2)
values_3 <- values(nodes_3)

values_all <- rep(NA,length(values_0))
for (i in 1:length(values_all)) {
  all_vals <- c(values_0[i],values_1[i],values_2[i],values_3[i])
  if (all(is.na(all_vals))) {values_all[i] <- NA} else {
    max_ind <- which(all_vals==max(all_vals,na.rm=TRUE))
    if (length(max_ind) > 1) {values_all[i] <- 5} else {
      values_all[i] <- max_ind - 1
    }
  }
  if (is.na(values_0[i])) {values_0[i] <- 0}
  if (is.na(values_1[i])) {values_1[i] <- 0}
  if (is.na(values_2[i])) {values_2[i] <- 0}
  if (is.na(values_3[i])) {values_3[i] <- 0}
}

nodes_all <- nodes_0
values(nodes_all) <- values_all

values(nodes_0) <- values_0
values(nodes_1) <- values_1
values(nodes_2) <- values_2
values(nodes_3) <- values_3

names(nodes_0) <- "count0"
names(nodes_1) <- "count1"
names(nodes_2) <- "count2"
names(nodes_3) <- "count3"
names(nodes_all) <- "best"

raster_data <- addLayer(raster_data,nodes_0)
raster_data <- addLayer(raster_data,nodes_1)
raster_data <- addLayer(raster_data,nodes_2)
raster_data <- addLayer(raster_data,nodes_3)
raster_data <- addLayer(raster_data,nodes_all)

raster_df <- as.data.frame(raster_data,xy=TRUE)
raster_df <- raster_df[!is.na(raster_df$delta1),]
raster_df$best <- as.factor(raster_df$best)
max_value <- max(c(raster_df$count0,raster_df$count1,raster_df$count2,raster_df$count3),na.rm=TRUE)
raster_df$prop0 <- raster_df$count0 / max(raster_df$count0,na.rm=TRUE)
raster_df$prop1 <- raster_df$count1 / max(raster_df$count1,na.rm=TRUE)
raster_df$prop2 <- raster_df$count2 / max(raster_df$count2,na.rm=TRUE)
raster_df$prop3 <- raster_df$count3 / max(raster_df$count3,na.rm=TRUE)
cell_total <- c()
for (i in 1:nrow(raster_df)) {
  cell_total[i] <- sum(raster_df$count0[i],raster_df$count1[i],raster_df$count2[i],raster_df$count3[i],na.rm=TRUE)
}
raster_df$prop0scaled <- raster_df$count0 / cell_total
raster_df$prop1scaled <- raster_df$count1 / cell_total
raster_df$prop2scaled <- raster_df$count2 / cell_total
raster_df$prop3scaled <- raster_df$count3 / cell_total

xmin <- st_bbox(australia_shape)$xmin
xmax <- st_bbox(australia_shape)$xmax
ymin <- st_bbox(australia_shape)$ymin
ymax <- st_bbox(australia_shape)$ymax

all_directions <- ggplot(australia_shape) +
  lims(x=c(xmin,xmax),y=c(ymin,ymax)) +
  geom_tile(data=raster_df,aes_string(x="x",y="y",fill="best")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c(color_1,color_2,color_3,color_4,lines_color)) +
  geom_sf(fill=NA,color=lines_color,lwd=2) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(panel.background = element_rect(fill=background_color,color=background_color),
        legend.position="none")

line_data <- data.frame(cbind(x=c(0.1,1.2,2.2,2.6),y=c(0,-0.3,-0.4,0.3),xend=c(0.9,1.8,2.2,3.2),yend=c(0,0.3,0.4,-0.3)))
line_plot <- ggplot(line_data) +
  geom_segment(x=line_data$x,xend=line_data$xend,y=line_data$y,yend=line_data$yend,arrow=arrow(ends="both",type="closed",length=unit(0.2,"cm")),linewidth=2,color=c(color_1,color_2,color_3,color_4)) +
  lims(x=c(0,3.1),y=c(-0.5,0.5)) +
  coord_fixed() +
  theme_void()

all_directions_labelled <- all_directions + inset_element(line_plot,.01,.8,.3,.99)  & plot_annotation(theme=theme(plot.background=element_rect(color=background_color,fill=background_color)))
ggsave(paste0(direction_plot_directory,"raster_ctenotus.png"),all_directions_labelled,dpi=600,width=7,height=5)
```

#### *Lerista*

```{r directions_map_lerista, echo=TRUE}

ymin <- min(direction_data$y)
ymax <- max(direction_data$y)

  lims(x=c(xmin,xmax),y=c(ymin,ymax)) +
  geom_sf(fill=NA,color=lines_color) +
  geom_point(data=directions_lerista_factored,aes(x=directions_lerista_factored$x,y=directions_lerista_factored$y,fill=directions_lerista_factored$true_selection),pch=21,stroke=NA,size=.75) +
```

```{r direction_raster_lerista, echo=TRUE}
raster_csv <- read.csv(paste0(aridity_data_directory,"interpolated_raster.csv"))[,c("x","y","delta1","delta2")]
raster_df <- data.frame(raster_csv)
coordinates(raster_df) <- ~ x + y
gridded(raster_df) <- TRUE
raster_data <- stack(raster_df)

direction_data <- read.csv(paste0(skink_output_directory,"processed_directions.csv"),header=TRUE)
node_list <- c(310:389)
directions_lerista <- direction_data[which(direction_data$node %in% node_list),]
node_locations_df <- directions_lerista[,c("x","y")]

nodes_0 <- rasterize(node_locations_df[which(directions_lerista$true_selection==0),],raster_data,fun="count")
nodes_1 <- rasterize(node_locations_df[which(directions_lerista$true_selection==1),],raster_data,fun="count")
nodes_2 <- rasterize(node_locations_df[which(directions_lerista$true_selection==2),],raster_data,fun="count")
nodes_3 <- rasterize(node_locations_df[which(directions_lerista$true_selection==3),],raster_data,fun="count")

values_0 <- values(nodes_0)
values_1 <- values(nodes_1)
values_2 <- values(nodes_2)
values_3 <- values(nodes_3)

values_all <- rep(NA,length(values_0))
for (i in 1:length(values_all)) {
  all_vals <- c(values_0[i],values_1[i],values_2[i],values_3[i])
  if (all(is.na(all_vals))) {values_all[i] <- NA} else {
    max_ind <- which(all_vals==max(all_vals,na.rm=TRUE))
    if (length(max_ind) > 1) {values_all[i] <- 5} else {
      values_all[i] <- max_ind - 1
    }
  }
  if (is.na(values_0[i])) {values_0[i] <- 0}
  if (is.na(values_1[i])) {values_1[i] <- 0}
  if (is.na(values_2[i])) {values_2[i] <- 0}
  if (is.na(values_3[i])) {values_3[i] <- 0}
}

nodes_all <- nodes_0
values(nodes_all) <- values_all

values(nodes_0) <- values_0
values(nodes_1) <- values_1
values(nodes_2) <- values_2
values(nodes_3) <- values_3

names(nodes_0) <- "count0"
names(nodes_1) <- "count1"
names(nodes_2) <- "count2"
names(nodes_3) <- "count3"
names(nodes_all) <- "best"

raster_data <- addLayer(raster_data,nodes_0)
raster_data <- addLayer(raster_data,nodes_1)
raster_data <- addLayer(raster_data,nodes_2)
raster_data <- addLayer(raster_data,nodes_3)
raster_data <- addLayer(raster_data,nodes_all)

raster_df <- as.data.frame(raster_data,xy=TRUE)
raster_df <- raster_df[!is.na(raster_df$delta1),]
raster_df$best <- as.factor(raster_df$best)
max_value <- max(c(raster_df$count0,raster_df$count1,raster_df$count2,raster_df$count3),na.rm=TRUE)
raster_df$prop0 <- raster_df$count0 / max(raster_df$count0,na.rm=TRUE)
raster_df$prop1 <- raster_df$count1 / max(raster_df$count1,na.rm=TRUE)
raster_df$prop2 <- raster_df$count2 / max(raster_df$count2,na.rm=TRUE)
raster_df$prop3 <- raster_df$count3 / max(raster_df$count3,na.rm=TRUE)
cell_total <- c()
for (i in 1:nrow(raster_df)) {
  cell_total[i] <- sum(raster_df$count0[i],raster_df$count1[i],raster_df$count2[i],raster_df$count3[i],na.rm=TRUE)
}
raster_df$prop0scaled <- raster_df$count0 / cell_total
raster_df$prop1scaled <- raster_df$count1 / cell_total
raster_df$prop2scaled <- raster_df$count2 / cell_total
raster_df$prop3scaled <- raster_df$count3 / cell_total

xmin <- st_bbox(australia_shape)$xmin
xmax <- st_bbox(australia_shape)$xmax
ymin <- st_bbox(australia_shape)$ymin
ymax <- st_bbox(australia_shape)$ymax

all_directions <- ggplot(australia_shape) +
  lims(x=c(xmin,xmax),y=c(ymin,ymax)) +
  geom_tile(data=raster_df,aes_string(x="x",y="y",fill="best")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c(color_1,color_2,color_3,color_4,lines_color)) +
  geom_sf(fill=NA,color=lines_color,lwd=2) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(panel.background = element_rect(fill=background_color,color=background_color),
        legend.position="none")

line_data <- data.frame(cbind(x=c(0.1,1.2,2.2,2.6),y=c(0,-0.3,-0.4,0.3),xend=c(0.9,1.8,2.2,3.2),yend=c(0,0.3,0.4,-0.3)))
line_plot <- ggplot(line_data) +
  geom_segment(x=line_data$x,xend=line_data$xend,y=line_data$y,yend=line_data$yend,arrow=arrow(ends="both",type="closed",length=unit(0.2,"cm")),linewidth=2,color=c(color_1,color_2,color_3,color_4)) +
  lims(x=c(0,3.1),y=c(-0.5,0.5)) +
  coord_fixed() +
  theme_void()

all_directions_labelled <- all_directions + inset_element(line_plot,.01,.8,.3,.99)  & plot_annotation(theme=theme(plot.background=element_rect(color=background_color,fill=background_color)))
ggsave(paste0(direction_plot_directory,"raster_lerista.png"),all_directions_labelled,dpi=600,width=7,height=5)
```

#### Third Clade

```{r directions_map_thirdclade, echo=TRUE}
node_list <- c(390:435)
directions_thirdclade <- direction_data[which(direction_data$node %in% node_list),]

xmin <- min(direction_data$x)
xmax <- max(direction_data$x)
ymin <- min(direction_data$y)
ymax <- max(direction_data$y)

directions_other_factored <- directions_thirdclade
directions_other_factored$true_selection <- as.factor(directions_thirdclade$true_selection)
all_directions <- ggplot(australia_shape) +
  lims(x=c(xmin,xmax),y=c(ymin,ymax)) +
  geom_sf(fill=NA,color=lines_color) +
  geom_point(data=directions_other_factored,aes(x=directions_other_factored$x,y=directions_other_factored$y,fill=directions_other_factored$true_selection),pch=21,stroke=NA,size=.75) +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c(color_1,color_2,color_3,color_4)) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(panel.background = element_rect(fill=background_color,color=background_color),
        legend.position="none")

line_data <- data.frame(cbind(x=c(0.1,1.2,2.2,2.6),y=c(0,-0.3,-0.4,0.3),xend=c(0.9,1.8,2.2,3),yend=c(0,0.3,0.4,-0.3)))
line_plot <- ggplot(line_data) +
  geom_segment(x=line_data$x,xend=line_data$xend,y=line_data$y,yend=line_data$yend,arrow=arrow(ends="both",type="closed",length=unit(0.25,"cm")),linewidth=2,color=c(color_1,color_2,color_3,color_4)) +
  lims(x=c(0,3.1),y=c(-0.5,0.5)) +
  coord_fixed() +
  theme_void()

all_directions_labelled <- all_directions + inset_element(line_plot,.65,.8,.99,.99) & plot_annotation(theme=theme(plot.background=element_rect(color=background_color,fill=background_color)))
ggsave(paste0(direction_plot_directory,"directions_map_thirdclade.png"),all_directions_labelled,dpi=600,width=7,height=5)
```

```{r direction_raster_thirdclade, echo=TRUE}
raster_csv <- read.csv(paste0(aridity_data_directory,"interpolated_raster.csv"))[,c("x","y","delta1","delta2")]
raster_df <- data.frame(raster_csv)
coordinates(raster_df) <- ~ x + y
gridded(raster_df) <- TRUE
raster_data <- stack(raster_df)

direction_data <- read.csv(paste0(skink_output_directory,"processed_directions.csv"),header=TRUE)
node_list <- c(390:435)
directions_thirdclade <- direction_data[which(direction_data$node %in% node_list),]
node_locations_df <- directions_thirdclade[,c("x","y")]

nodes_0 <- rasterize(node_locations_df[which(directions_thirdclade$true_selection==0),],raster_data,fun="count")
nodes_1 <- rasterize(node_locations_df[which(directions_thirdclade$true_selection==1),],raster_data,fun="count")
nodes_2 <- rasterize(node_locations_df[which(directions_thirdclade$true_selection==2),],raster_data,fun="count")
nodes_3 <- rasterize(node_locations_df[which(directions_thirdclade$true_selection==3),],raster_data,fun="count")

values_0 <- values(nodes_0)
values_1 <- values(nodes_1)
values_2 <- values(nodes_2)
values_3 <- values(nodes_3)

values_all <- rep(NA,length(values_0))
for (i in 1:length(values_all)) {
  all_vals <- c(values_0[i],values_1[i],values_2[i],values_3[i])
  if (all(is.na(all_vals))) {values_all[i] <- NA} else {
    max_ind <- which(all_vals==max(all_vals,na.rm=TRUE))
    if (length(max_ind) > 1) {values_all[i] <- 5} else {
      values_all[i] <- max_ind - 1
    }
  }
  if (is.na(values_0[i])) {values_0[i] <- 0}
  if (is.na(values_1[i])) {values_1[i] <- 0}
  if (is.na(values_2[i])) {values_2[i] <- 0}
  if (is.na(values_3[i])) {values_3[i] <- 0}
}

nodes_all <- nodes_0
values(nodes_all) <- values_all

values(nodes_0) <- values_0
values(nodes_1) <- values_1
values(nodes_2) <- values_2
values(nodes_3) <- values_3

names(nodes_0) <- "count0"
names(nodes_1) <- "count1"
names(nodes_2) <- "count2"
names(nodes_3) <- "count3"
names(nodes_all) <- "best"

raster_data <- addLayer(raster_data,nodes_0)
raster_data <- addLayer(raster_data,nodes_1)
raster_data <- addLayer(raster_data,nodes_2)
raster_data <- addLayer(raster_data,nodes_3)
raster_data <- addLayer(raster_data,nodes_all)

raster_df <- as.data.frame(raster_data,xy=TRUE)
raster_df <- raster_df[!is.na(raster_df$delta1),]
raster_df$best <- as.factor(raster_df$best)
max_value <- max(c(raster_df$count0,raster_df$count1,raster_df$count2,raster_df$count3),na.rm=TRUE)
raster_df$prop0 <- raster_df$count0 / max(raster_df$count0,na.rm=TRUE)
raster_df$prop1 <- raster_df$count1 / max(raster_df$count1,na.rm=TRUE)
raster_df$prop2 <- raster_df$count2 / max(raster_df$count2,na.rm=TRUE)
raster_df$prop3 <- raster_df$count3 / max(raster_df$count3,na.rm=TRUE)
cell_total <- c()
for (i in 1:nrow(raster_df)) {
  cell_total[i] <- sum(raster_df$count0[i],raster_df$count1[i],raster_df$count2[i],raster_df$count3[i],na.rm=TRUE)
}
raster_df$prop0scaled <- raster_df$count0 / cell_total
raster_df$prop1scaled <- raster_df$count1 / cell_total
raster_df$prop2scaled <- raster_df$count2 / cell_total
raster_df$prop3scaled <- raster_df$count3 / cell_total

xmin <- st_bbox(australia_shape)$xmin
xmax <- st_bbox(australia_shape)$xmax
ymin <- st_bbox(australia_shape)$ymin
ymax <- st_bbox(australia_shape)$ymax

all_directions <- ggplot(australia_shape) +
  lims(x=c(xmin,xmax),y=c(ymin,ymax)) +
  geom_tile(data=raster_df,aes_string(x="x",y="y",fill="best")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c(color_1,color_2,color_3,color_4,lines_color)) +
  geom_sf(fill=NA,color=lines_color,lwd=2) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(panel.background = element_rect(fill=background_color,color=background_color),
        legend.position="none")

line_data <- data.frame(cbind(x=c(0.1,1.2,2.2,2.6),y=c(0,-0.3,-0.4,0.3),xend=c(0.9,1.8,2.2,3.2),yend=c(0,0.3,0.4,-0.3)))
line_plot <- ggplot(line_data) +
  geom_segment(x=line_data$x,xend=line_data$xend,y=line_data$y,yend=line_data$yend,arrow=arrow(ends="both",type="closed",length=unit(0.2,"cm")),linewidth=2,color=c(color_1,color_2,color_3,color_4)) +
  lims(x=c(0,3.1),y=c(-0.5,0.5)) +
  coord_fixed() +
  theme_void()

all_directions_labelled <- all_directions + inset_element(line_plot,.01,.8,.3,.99)  & plot_annotation(theme=theme(plot.background=element_rect(color=background_color,fill=background_color)))
ggsave(paste0(direction_plot_directory,"raster_thirdclade.png"),all_directions_labelled,dpi=600,width=7,height=5)
```

```{r directions_raster_thirdclade_show, eval=TRUE, results=TRUE}
include_graphics(paste0(direction_plot_directory,"raster_thirdclade.png"))
```

</div>
</div>

<!--
######################################################################################
######################################################################################
SKINK ANCESTRAL STATES: ANCESTRAL ELLIPSES, TREE MAP, LINEAGE TRACING, NODE POSTERIORS
######################################################################################
######################################################################################
-->

## Skink Ancestral States

### Ancestral State Reconstruction

We performed ancestral state reconstructions for the ancestral ellipses going *into* phylogenetic nodes. First, we determined the discrete scenario (unique combination of $(d,m,c,h)$) with the highest posterior probability. Then we took the mean values for each continuous character under that scenario. We also calculate total posterior means for each continuous character, but we do not use this to make the maps.

```{r skink_results_for_nodes}
# SKINK RESULTS -- DO NOT RERUN WITHOUT NEW ANALYSES
if (RERUN) {
  burnin <- 20000
  length <- 200000
  data_model <- read.table(paste0(data_directory,"model_log.tsv"),sep="\t",header=TRUE)[burnin:length,]
  data_d <- read.table(paste0(data_directory,"d_log.tsv"),sep="\t",header=TRUE)[burnin:length,]
  data_m <- read.table(paste0(data_directory,"m_log.tsv"),sep="\t",header=TRUE)[burnin:length,]
  data_c <- read.table(paste0(data_directory,"c_log.tsv"),sep="\t",header=TRUE)[burnin:length,]
  data_h <- read.table(paste0(data_directory,"h_log.tsv"),sep="\t",header=TRUE)[burnin:length,]
  data_r <- read.table(paste0(data_directory,"r_log.tsv"),sep="\t",header=TRUE)[burnin:length,]
  data_s <- read.table(paste0(data_directory,"s_log.tsv"),sep="\t",header=TRUE)[burnin:length,]
  data_a <- read.table(paste0(data_directory,"a_log.tsv"),sep="\t",header=TRUE)[burnin:length,]
  data_x <- read.table(paste0(data_directory,"x_log.tsv"),sep="\t",header=TRUE)[burnin:length,]
  data_y <- read.table(paste0(data_directory,"y_log.tsv"),sep="\t",header=TRUE)[burnin:length,]
  RERUN <- FALSE
}
```

```{r data_by_node, echo=TRUE}
# PER-NODE SKINK RESULTS -- DO NOT RERUN WITHOUT NEW ANALYSES
branching_times <- branching.times(tree)
sorted_branching_times <- sort(branching_times)
node_indices <- as.numeric(names(sorted_branching_times))
node_times <- unname(unlist(sorted_branching_times))
if (RERUN) {
# function for getting directions
  process_direction <- function(h,r,s,z,hval_extended){
    theta <- hval_extended[h+1]
    fx <- cos(theta)
    fy <- sin(theta)
    fz <- r * fx + s * fy
    proj_x <- fx + r * fz / z^2
    proj_y <- fy + s * fz / z^2
    scale <- sqrt(proj_x^2 + proj_y^2)
    true_x <- proj_x/scale
    true_y <- proj_y/scale
    true_angle <- atan2(true_y,true_x)
    if (true_angle < 0) {true_angle <- (2 * pi + true_angle)}
    true_selection <- which(abs(hval_extended - true_angle) == min(abs(hval_extended - true_angle))) - 1
    if (true_selection == (length(hval_extended)-1)) {true_selection <- 0}
    if (true_selection == 4) {true_selection <- 0}
    if (true_selection == 5) {true_selection <- 1}
    if (true_selection == 6) {true_selection <- 2}
    if (true_selection == 7) {true_selection <- 3}
    direction_info <- c(true_x,true_y,true_angle,true_selection)
  }
  # analyzing each node
  n_tips <- length(tree$tip.label)
  n_nodes <- tree$Nnode
  node_numbers <- c((n_tips+1):(n_tips+n_nodes))
  hval_extended <- c(0,pi/4,pi/2,3*pi/4,pi,5*pi/4,3*pi/2,7*pi/4,2*pi)
  z <- 10
  node_posteriors <- c()
  i = 1
  for (node in node_numbers) {
    cat("\r","Node ", node, " | ", round(as.numeric(i)/n_nodes*100,0), "%")
    node_time_ind <- which(node_indices==node)
    node_time <- node_times[node_time_ind]
    # creating a dataset for this node
    node_name <- paste0("X",node)
    subset_d <- data_d[[node_name]]
    subset_m <- data_m[[node_name]]
    subset_c <- data_c[[node_name]]
    subset_h <- data_h[[node_name]]
    subset_r <- data_r[[node_name]]
    subset_s <- data_s[[node_name]]
    subset_a <- data_a[[node_name]]
    subset_x <- data_x[[node_name]]
    subset_y <- data_y[[node_name]]
    node_data <- data.frame(cbind(d=subset_d, m=subset_m, c=subset_c, h=subset_h, r=subset_r, s=subset_s, a=subset_a, x=subset_x, y=subset_y))
    write.csv(node_data,paste0(skink_output_directory,"/nodes/",node_name,".csv"),row.names=FALSE,quote=FALSE)
    # getting overall estimates for continuous values
    r <- mean(node_data$r)
    s <- mean(node_data$s)
    a <- mean(node_data$a)
    x <- mean(node_data$x)
    y <- mean(node_data$y)
    # getting most common scenario and corresponding estimates
    scenario_counts <- node_data %>% group_by(d, m, c, h) %>% summarize(count=n())
    ind <- which(scenario_counts$count == max(scenario_counts$count))
    scenario <- scenario_counts[ind,]
    scenario_d <- scenario[[1]]
    scenario_m <- scenario[[2]]
    scenario_c <- scenario[[3]]
    scenario_h <- scenario[[4]]
    scenario_data <- node_data[which(node_data$d==scenario_d & node_data$m==scenario_m & node_data$c==scenario_c & node_data$h==scenario_h),]
    scenario_r <- mean(scenario_data$r)
    scenario_s <- mean(scenario_data$s)
    scenario_a <- mean(scenario_data$a)
    scenario_x <- mean(scenario_data$x)
    scenario_y <- mean(scenario_data$y)
    scenario_sample_size <- nrow(scenario_data)
    scenario_freq <- nrow(scenario_data) / nrow(node_data)
    scenario_d_freq <- sum(node_data$d==scenario_d) / nrow(node_data)
    scenario_m_freq <- sum(node_data$m==scenario_m) / nrow(node_data)
    scenario_c_freq <- sum(node_data$c==scenario_c) / nrow(node_data)
    scenario_h_freq <- sum(node_data$h==scenario_h) / nrow(node_data)
    scenario_r_low <- hdi(scenario_data$r)[[1]]
    scenario_r_high <- hdi(scenario_data$r)[[2]]
    scenario_r_range <- scenario_r_high - scenario_r_low
    scenario_s_low <- hdi(scenario_data$s)[[1]]
    scenario_s_high <- hdi(scenario_data$s)[[2]]
    scenario_s_range <- scenario_s_high - scenario_s_low
    scenario_a_low <- hdi(scenario_data$a)[[1]]
    scenario_a_high <- hdi(scenario_data$a)[[2]]
    scenario_a_range <- scenario_a_high - scenario_a_low
    scenario_x_low <- hdi(scenario_data$x)[[1]]
    scenario_x_high <- hdi(scenario_data$x)[[2]]
    scenario_x_range <- scenario_x_high - scenario_x_low
    scenario_y_low <- hdi(scenario_data$y)[[1]]
    scenario_y_high <- hdi(scenario_data$y)[[2]]
    scenario_y_range <- scenario_y_high - scenario_y_low
    # adding information to the dataframe for all nodes
    node_posteriors$node[i] <- node
    node_posteriors$r[i] <- r
    node_posteriors$s[i] <- s
    node_posteriors$a[i] <- a
    node_posteriors$x[i] <- x
    node_posteriors$y[i] <- y
    node_posteriors$scenario_d[i] <- scenario_d
    node_posteriors$scenario_m[i] <- scenario_m
    node_posteriors$scenario_c[i] <- scenario_c
    node_posteriors$scenario_h[i] <- scenario_h
    node_posteriors$scenario_r[i] <- scenario_r
    node_posteriors$scenario_s[i] <- scenario_s
    node_posteriors$scenario_a[i] <- scenario_a
    node_posteriors$scenario_x[i] <- scenario_x
    node_posteriors$scenario_y[i] <- scenario_y
    node_posteriors$scenario_sample_size[i] <- scenario_sample_size
    node_posteriors$scenario_freq[i] <- scenario_freq
    node_posteriors$scenario_d_freq[i] <- scenario_d_freq
    node_posteriors$scenario_m_freq[i] <- scenario_m_freq
    node_posteriors$scenario_c_freq[i] <- scenario_c_freq
    node_posteriors$scenario_h_freq[i] <- scenario_h_freq
    node_posteriors$scenario_r_low[i] <- scenario_r_low
    node_posteriors$scenario_r_high[i] <- scenario_r_high
    node_posteriors$scenario_r_range[i] <- scenario_r_range
    node_posteriors$scenario_s_low[i] <- scenario_s_low
    node_posteriors$scenario_s_high[i] <- scenario_s_high
    node_posteriors$scenario_s_range[i] <- scenario_s_range
    node_posteriors$scenario_a_low[i] <- scenario_a_low
    node_posteriors$scenario_a_high[i] <- scenario_a_high
    node_posteriors$scenario_a_range[i] <- scenario_a_range
    node_posteriors$scenario_x_low[i] <- scenario_x_low
    node_posteriors$scenario_x_high[i] <- scenario_x_high
    node_posteriors$scenario_x_range[i] <- scenario_x_range
    node_posteriors$scenario_y_low[i] <- scenario_y_low
    node_posteriors$scenario_y_high[i] <- scenario_y_high
    node_posteriors$scenario_y_range[i] <- scenario_y_range
    node_posteriors$node_age[i] <- node_time
    # direction information
    selection <- scenario_h
    if (selection == 4) {selection <- 0}
    if (selection == 5) {selection <- 1}
    if (selection == 6) {selection <- 2}
    if (selection == 7) {selection <- 3}
    node_posteriors$selection[i] <- selection
    direction_info <- process_direction(scenario_h,scenario_r,scenario_s,z,hval_extended)
    node_posteriors$true_x[i] <- direction_info[1]
    node_posteriors$true_y[i] <- direction_info[2]
    node_posteriors$true_angle[i] <- direction_info[3]
    node_posteriors$true_selection[i] <- direction_info[4]
    # moving to the next row
    i = i + 1
  }
  node_data <- data.frame(node_posteriors)
  write.csv(node_data,paste0(skink_output_directory,"node_reconstructions.csv"),row.names=FALSE,quote=FALSE)
  RERUN <- FALSE
}
```

```{r node_data, eval=TRUE}
node_data <- read.csv(paste0(skink_output_directory,"node_reconstructions.csv"),header=TRUE)
```

```{r age_vs_confidence, echo=TRUE}
plot_age_confidence <- ggplot(node_data) +
  geom_point(aes(x=node_age,y=scenario_r_range),color="red") +
  geom_smooth(aes(x=node_age,y=scenario_r_range),color="red",fill="red") +
  geom_point(aes(x=node_age,y=scenario_s_range),color="yellow") +
  geom_smooth(aes(x=node_age,y=scenario_s_range),color="yellow",fill="yellow") +
  geom_point(aes(x=node_age,y=scenario_a_range),color="green") +
  geom_smooth(aes(x=node_age,y=scenario_a_range),color="green",fill="green") +
  geom_point(aes(x=node_age,y=scenario_x_range),color="blue") +
  geom_smooth(aes(x=node_age,y=scenario_x_range),color="blue",fill="blue") +
  geom_point(aes(x=node_age,y=scenario_y_range),color="purple") +
  geom_smooth(aes(x=node_age,y=scenario_y_range),color="purple",fill="purple") +
  labs(x="Node Age (MY)", y="HPD Width") +
  scale_x_continuous(expand=c(0,0)) +
  geom_text(label="r",aes(x=30,y=32),hjust=.5,vjust="inward",color="red",size=6) +
  geom_text(label="s",aes(x=31,y=32),hjust=.5,vjust="inward",color="yellow",size=6) +
  geom_text(label="a",aes(x=32,y=32),hjust=.5,vjust="inward",color="green",size=6) +
  geom_text(label="x",aes(x=33,y=32),hjust=.5,vjust="inward",color="blue",size=6) +
  geom_text(label="y",aes(x=34,y=32),hjust=.5,vjust="inward",color="purple",size=6) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(panel.border = element_rect(color=lines_color,linewidth=2),
        panel.background = element_rect(fill=background_color,color=NA),
        plot.background = element_rect(fill=background_color,color=NA),
        axis.title = element_text(color=lines_color),
        axis.text = element_text(color=lines_color),
        axis.ticks = element_line(color=lines_color),
        panel.grid.minor=element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major=element_blank(),
        aspect.ratio=3/4,
        legend.position="none",
        plot.margin=margin(8,8,8,8,"pt"))
ggsave(paste0(other_plot_directory,"age_vs_confidence.png"),plot_age_confidence,dpi=600,width=7,height=5.5)

plot_age_frequency <- ggplot(node_data) +
  geom_hline(yintercept=1/128,color="red",lty="11") +
  geom_hline(yintercept=1/2,color="yellow",lty="11") +
  geom_hline(yintercept=1/2-0.003,color="green",lty="11") +
  geom_hline(yintercept=1/4,color="blue",lty="11") +
  geom_hline(yintercept=1/8,color="purple",lty="11") +
  geom_point(aes(x=node_age,y=scenario_freq),color="red") +
  geom_point(aes(x=node_age,y=scenario_d_freq),color="yellow") +
  geom_point(aes(x=node_age,y=scenario_m_freq),color="green") +
  geom_point(aes(x=node_age,y=scenario_c_freq),color="blue") +
  geom_point(aes(x=node_age,y=scenario_h_freq),color="purple") +
  geom_smooth(aes(x=node_age,y=scenario_freq),color="red",fill="red",alpha=.3) +
  geom_smooth(aes(x=node_age,y=scenario_d_freq),color="yellow",fill="yellow",alpha=.3) +
  geom_smooth(aes(x=node_age,y=scenario_c_freq),color="blue",fill="blue",alpha=.3) +
  geom_smooth(aes(x=node_age,y=scenario_m_freq),color="green",fill="green",alpha=.3) +
  geom_smooth(aes(x=node_age,y=scenario_h_freq),color="purple",fill="purple",alpha=.3) +
  geom_text(label="scenario",aes(x=27,y=.95),hjust=.5,vjust="inward",color="red",size=6) +
  geom_text(label="d",aes(x=26,y=.9),hjust=.5,vjust="inward",color="yellow",size=6) +
  geom_text(label="m",aes(x=27,y=.9),hjust=.5,vjust="inward",color="green",size=6) +
  geom_text(label="c",aes(x=28,y=.9),hjust=.5,vjust="inward",color="blue",size=6) +
  geom_text(label="h",aes(x=29,y=.9),hjust=.5,vjust="inward",color="purple",size=6) +
  geom_violin(aes(x=35,y=scenario_freq),color="red",fill=lines_color,alpha=.75) +
  geom_violin(aes(x=31,y=scenario_d_freq),color="yellow",fill=lines_color,alpha=.75) +
  geom_violin(aes(x=32,y=scenario_m_freq),color="green",fill=lines_color,alpha=.75) +
  geom_violin(aes(x=33,y=scenario_c_freq),color="blue",fill=lines_color,alpha=.75) +
  geom_violin(aes(x=34,y=scenario_h_freq),color="purple",fill=lines_color,alpha=.75) +
   labs(x="Node Age (MY)", y="HPD Width") +
  scale_x_continuous(expand=c(0,0)) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(panel.border = element_rect(color=lines_color,linewidth=2),
        panel.background = element_rect(fill=background_color,color=NA),
        plot.background = element_rect(fill=background_color,color=NA),
        axis.title = element_text(color=lines_color),
        axis.text = element_text(color=lines_color),
        axis.ticks = element_line(color=lines_color),
        panel.grid.minor=element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major=element_blank(),
        aspect.ratio=3/4,
        legend.position="none",
        plot.margin=margin(8,8,8,8,"pt"))
ggsave(paste0(other_plot_directory,"age_vs_frequency.png"),plot_age_frequency,dpi=600,width=7,height=5.5)
```

<div class = "row">
<div class = "col-md-6">

```{r age_vs_confidence_show, eval=TRUE, results=TRUE}
include_graphics(paste0(other_plot_directory,"age_vs_confidence.png"))
```

This shows the width of the HPD interval for continuous characters as a function of node age. As expected, we are more confident about younger nodes. However, the HPD intervals for some intermediate nodes exceed those for older nodes, suggesting that older nodes do not have enough information to suggest different ancestral ellipses.

</div>
<div class = "col-md-6">

```{r age_vs_frequency_show, eval=TRUE, results=TRUE}
include_graphics(paste0(other_plot_directory,"age_vs_frequency.png"))
```

This shows the frequency of the discrete scenario (combination of all 4 characters) and 'selected' individual discrete characters as a function of node age. Selected characters tend to appear slightly more frequently than random in the posterior. The direction line 'h' tends to be preferred most strongly. Node age appears to have no effect.

</div>
</div>

---

<div class = "row">
<div class = "col-md-3">

These are the ancestral state estimates for each node on the map, colored by the splitting direction. One ancestral ellipse (for node 266) is removed because it is far too large for the map. Centroid is still shown.

```{r direction_map_est, echo=TRUE}
node_data_factored <- node_data
node_data_factored$true_selection <- as.factor(node_data$true_selection)

polygons_data <- data.frame(matrix(data=NA,nrow=0,ncol=4))
for (i in 1:nrow(node_data_factored)) {
  ellipse <- data.frame(make_ellipse_coords(node_data_factored$scenario_x[i],node_data_factored$scenario_y[i],node_data_factored$scenario_r[i],node_data_factored$scenario_s[i],node_data_factored$scenario_a[i]))
  n_points <- nrow(ellipse)
  ellipse$node <- rep(node_data_factored$node[i],n_points)
  ellipse$selection <- rep(node_data_factored$true_selection[i],n_points)
  polygons_data <- rbind(polygons_data,ellipse)
}
polygons_data$node <- as.factor(polygons_data$node)
polygons_data$selection <- as.factor(polygons_data$selection)

# node 266 has a giant ancestral range, and it's not clear why
polygons_data <- polygons_data[polygons_data$node != 266,]

xmin <- min(min(node_data_factored$x),min(polygons_data$x))
xmax <- max(max(node_data_factored$x),max(polygons_data$x))
ymin <- min(min(node_data_factored$y),min(polygons_data$y))
ymax <- max(max(node_data_factored$y),max(polygons_data$y))

node_directions <- ggplot(australia_shape) +
  lims(x=c(xmin,xmax),y=c(ymin,ymax)) +
  geom_sf(fill=NA,color=lines_color) +
  geom_polygon(data=polygons_data,aes(x=x,y=y,group=node,color=selection),fill=NA,lwd=.25) +
  geom_point(data=node_data_factored,aes(x=scenario_x,y=scenario_y,color=true_selection)) +
  geom_text(data=node_data_factored,aes(x=scenario_x,y=scenario_y,label=node),color=lines_color,size=2,fontface="bold",check_overlap=TRUE) +
  scale_color_manual(values=c(color_1,color_2,color_3,color_4)) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(panel.background = element_rect(fill=background_color,color=background_color),
        legend.position="none")

line_data <- data.frame(cbind(x=c(0.1,1.2,2.2,2.6),y=c(0,-0.3,-0.4,0.3),xend=c(0.9,1.8,2.2,3),yend=c(0,0.3,0.4,-0.3)))
line_plot <- ggplot(line_data) +
  geom_segment(x=line_data$x,xend=line_data$xend,y=line_data$y,yend=line_data$yend,arrow=arrow(ends="both",type="closed",length=unit(0.25,"cm")),linewidth=2,color=c(color_1,color_2,color_3,color_4)) +
  lims(x=c(0,3.1),y=c(-0.5,0.5)) +
  coord_fixed() +
  theme_void()

node_directions_labelled <- node_directions + inset_element(line_plot,.65,.8,.99,.99) & plot_annotation(theme=theme(plot.background=element_rect(color=background_color,fill=background_color)))
ggsave(paste0(direction_plot_directory,"map_est.png"),node_directions_labelled,dpi=600,width=7,height=5)
```

```{r true_direction_lines_est, echo=TRUE}
# Getting true direction line counts
count_0 <- sum(node_data$true_selection == 0)
count_1 <- sum(node_data$true_selection == 1)
count_2 <- sum(node_data$true_selection == 2)
count_3 <- sum(node_data$true_selection == 3)

# Performing Chi Square test
p <- chisq.test(c(count_0,count_1,count_2,count_3))$p.value
if (p < 0.001) {
  p_string <- paste0("chi-squared test, p < 0.001")
} else {
  p_string <- paste0("chi-squared test, p = ",signif(p,digits=3))
}

# Getting densities
lines <- c("0","1","2","3")
counts <- c(count_0,count_1,count_2,count_3)
density <- counts / sum(counts)
count_data <- data.frame(cbind(lines=lines,density=as.numeric(density)))
count_data$density <- as.numeric(count_data$density)

# Plotting bars
bar_plot <- ggplot(data=count_data,aes(x=lines,y=density,fill=lines)) +
  geom_col() +
  labs(y="Proportion") +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c(color_1,color_2,color_3,color_4)) +
  labs(title=p_string,color=lines_color) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
        axis.text.y = element_text(color=lines_color,size=16),
        axis.ticks.y = element_line(color=lines_color),
        axis.title = element_text(color=lines_color),
        panel.grid = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(color=lines_color,linewidth=2),
        plot.background = element_rect(fill=background_color,color=background_color),
        panel.background = element_rect(fill=background_color),
        axis.title.x = element_blank(),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size=16),
        legend.position = "none",
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 1,color=lines_color))

# Direction lines for plotting
line_data <- data.frame(cbind(x=c(0.1,1.2,2.5,3.2),y=c(0,-0.3,-0.3,0.3),xend=c(0.9,1.8,2.5,3.8),yend=c(0,0.3,0.3,-0.3)))
direction_plot <- ggplot(line_data) +
  geom_segment(x=line_data$x,xend=line_data$xend,y=line_data$y,yend=line_data$yend,arrow=arrow(ends="both",type="closed",length=unit(0.25,"cm")),linewidth=2,color="black") +
  lims(x=c(0,4),y=c(-0.5,0.5)) +
  coord_fixed() +
  theme_void()

# Combining direction lines with bars
plot_with_arrows <- bar_plot + inset_element(direction_plot,-0.025,-0.05,1.025,0.45) & plot_annotation(theme=theme(plot.background=element_rect(color=background_color,fill=background_color)))
ggsave(paste0(direction_plot_directory,"true_direction_est_probs.png"),plot_with_arrows,dpi=600)
```

```{r true_direction_lines_est_show, eval=TRUE, results=TRUE}
include_graphics(paste0(direction_plot_directory,"true_direction_est_probs.png"))
```

</div>
</div>

Here is a PCA of both the ancestral and modern ellipses.

```{r ancestral_modern_pca, echo=TRUE}
ancestral <- node_data[c("node","scenario_x","scenario_y","scenario_r","scenario_s","scenario_a")]
ancestral$type <- rep("A",nrow(ancestral))
colnames(ancestral) <- c("node","x","y","r","s","a","type")
modern <- ellipse_data
modern$type <- rep("M",nrow(modern))
colnames(modern) <- c("node","x","y","r","s","a","type")
for (i in 1:nrow(modern)) {
  modern$node[i] <- which(tree$tip.label==modern$node[i])
}
all_ellipses <- rbind(ancestral,modern)
ellipse_pca <- cbind(all_ellipses,prcomp(all_ellipses[,2:6],center=TRUE,scale=TRUE,retx=TRUE)$x)
plot_pca <- function(data,column1,column2,column3) {
  plot <- ggplot(data=data,aes_string(x=column2,y=column1,color=column3)) +
  geom_point() +
  scale_color_manual(values=c(color_1,color_2),labels=c("Ancestral","Modern")) +
  labs(x=column2,y=column1,color="Type: ") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.text = element_text(color=lines_color,size=20),
        axis.ticks = element_line(color=lines_color),
        axis.title = element_text(color=lines_color,size=20),
        panel.grid = element_blank(),
        panel.background = element_rect(fill=background_color,color=lines_color,linewidth=2),
        plot.background = element_rect(fill=background_color,color=background_color),
        legend.position = "top",
        legend.text = element_text(color=lines_color,size=20),
        legend.title = element_text(color=lines_color,size=20),
        legend.background = element_rect(fill=NA,color=NA),
        legend.key = element_rect(fill=NA,color=NA),
        aspect.ratio=1)
  return(plot)
}
pc12 <- plot_pca(ellipse_pca,"PC1","PC2","type")
pc13 <- plot_pca(ellipse_pca,"PC1","PC3","type")
pc14 <- plot_pca(ellipse_pca,"PC1","PC4","type")
pc15 <- plot_pca(ellipse_pca,"PC1","PC5","type")
pc23 <- plot_pca(ellipse_pca,"PC2","PC3","type")
pc24 <- plot_pca(ellipse_pca,"PC2","PC4","type")
pc25 <- plot_pca(ellipse_pca,"PC2","PC5","type")
pc34 <- plot_pca(ellipse_pca,"PC3","PC4","type")
pc35 <- plot_pca(ellipse_pca,"PC3","PC5","type")
pc45 <- plot_pca(ellipse_pca,"PC4","PC5","type")

pcxy <- plot_pca(ellipse_pca,"x","y","type")
pcxr <- plot_pca(ellipse_pca,"x","r","type")
pcxs <- plot_pca(ellipse_pca,"x","s","type")
pcxa <- plot_pca(ellipse_pca,"x","a","type")
pcyr <- plot_pca(ellipse_pca,"y","r","type")
pcys <- plot_pca(ellipse_pca,"y","s","type")
pcya <- plot_pca(ellipse_pca,"y","a","type")
pcrs <- plot_pca(ellipse_pca,"r","s","type")
pcra <- plot_pca(ellipse_pca,"r","a","type")
pcsa <- plot_pca(ellipse_pca,"s","a","type")

pc_plot <- plot_spacer() + pc12          + pc13          + pc14          + pc15 +
           pcsa          + plot_spacer() + pc23          + pc24          + pc25 +
           pcra          + pcrs          + plot_spacer() + pc34          + pc35 +
           pcya          + pcys          + pcyr          + plot_spacer() + pc45 +
           pcxa          + pcxs          + pcxr          + pcxy          + plot_spacer() + 
           plot_layout(ncol=5,guides="collect") &
           theme(plot.background=element_rect(color=background_color,fill=background_color),
                 panel.background=element_rect(color=lines_color,fill=background_color,linewidth=2),
                 legend.position="top")
ggsave(paste0(other_plot_directory,"ellipse_pca.png"),pc_plot,width=20,height=20,dpi=600)
```

```{r ancestral_modern_pca_show, eval=TRUE, results=TRUE}
include_graphics(paste0(other_plot_directory,"ellipse_pca.png"))
```

---

### Reconstruction Tree

<div class = "row">
<div class = "col-md-3">

Here we add the tree structure to the map instead of the ellipses and splitting directions.

```{r tree_map, echo=TRUE}
node_data <- read.csv(paste0(skink_output_directory,"node_reconstructions.csv"),header=TRUE)

ctenotus <- c(222:309)
lerista <- c(310:389)
other <- c(390:435)
excluded <- c(219:221)

for (i in 1:nrow(ellipse_data)) {
  taxon <- as.character(ellipse_data$taxon[i])
  number <- which(tree$tip.label == taxon)
  if (grepl("Ctenotus", taxon, fixed=TRUE)) {ctenotus <- c(ctenotus, number)}
  else if (grepl("Lerista", taxon, fixed=TRUE)) {lerista <- c(lerista, number)}
  else if (grepl("Notoscincus ornatus", taxon, fixed=TRUE)) {excluded <- c(excluded, number)}
  else {other <- c(other, number)}
}

ctenotus <- sort(ctenotus)
lerista <- sort(lerista)
other <- sort(other)
excluded <- sort(excluded)

node_locations <- c()
for (i in 1:length(tree$tip.label)) {
  node_locations$node[i] <- i
  taxon <- tree$tip.label[i]
  node_locations$x[i] <- ellipse_data$x[which(ellipse_data$taxon==tree$tip.label[i])]
  node_locations$y[i] <- ellipse_data$y[which(ellipse_data$taxon==tree$tip.label[i])]
}
node_locations$node <- c(node_locations$node, node_data$node)
node_locations$x <- c(node_locations$x, node_data$scenario_x)
node_locations$y <- c(node_locations$y, node_data$scenario_y)
node_locations <- data.frame(node_locations)

for (i in 1:nrow(node_locations)) {
  if (node_locations$node[i] %in% ctenotus) {clade <- "ctenotus"}
  if (node_locations$node[i] %in% lerista) {clade <- "lerista"}
  if (node_locations$node[i] %in% other) {clade <- "thirdclade"}
  if (node_locations$node[i] %in% excluded) {clade <- "x"}
  node_locations$Clade[i] <- clade
}

node_locations$highlight <- rep("none",nrow(node_locations))
node_locations$highlight[219] <- "root"
node_locations$highlight[222] <- "root"
node_locations$highlight[310] <- "root"
node_locations$highlight[390] <- "root"
node_locations$highlight[1:length(tree$tip.label)] <- "tip"

tree_data <- data.frame(tree$edge)
colnames(tree_data) <- c("N1", "N2")
edge_points <- c()
for (i in 1:nrow(tree_data)) {
  node_1 <- tree_data$N1[i]
  edge_points$X1[i] <- node_locations$x[which(node_locations$node==node_1)]
  edge_points$Y1[i] <- node_locations$y[which(node_locations$node==node_1)]
  node_2 <- tree_data$N2[i]
  edge_points$X2[i] <- node_locations$x[which(node_locations$node==node_2)]
  edge_points$Y2[i] <- node_locations$y[which(node_locations$node==node_2)]
  if (node_1 %in% ctenotus) {clade <- "ctenotus"}
  if (node_1 %in% lerista) {clade <- "lerista"}
  if (node_1 %in% other) {clade <- "thirdclade"}
  if (node_1 %in% excluded) {clade <- "x"}
  edge_points$Clade[i] <- clade
}
edge_points <- data.frame(edge_points)

xmin <- min(node_locations$x)
xmax <- max(node_locations$x)
ymin <- min(node_locations$y)
ymax <- max(node_locations$y)

node_tree <- ggplot(australia_shape) +
  lims(x=c(xmin,xmax),y=c(ymin,ymax)) +
  geom_sf(fill=NA,color=lines_color) +
  geom_segment(data=edge_points,aes(x=X1,y=Y1,xend=X2,yend=Y2,color=Clade),lty="dotted",lwd=.25) +
  geom_point(data=node_locations,aes(x=x,y=y,color=Clade,pch=highlight),fill=background_color) +
  scale_shape_manual(values=c(20,13,21),labels=c("Internal Node", "Clade Root", "Tip")) +
  scale_color_manual(values=c(color_2,color_3,color_4,color_1), labels=c(bquote(italic(.("Ctenotus"))), bquote(italic(.("Lerista"))), "Third Clade", "Root & Other")) +
  labs(color="Clade",pch="Node Type") +
  guides(shape=guide_legend(override.aes=list(color=lines_color,fill=NA),keyheight=0.1),
         color=guide_legend(keyheight=0.1)) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(panel.background = element_rect(fill=background_color,color=NA),
        legend.position=c(.985,.98),
        legend.justification = c("right","top"),
        legend.title = element_text(color=lines_color,size=12),
        legend.text = element_text(color=lines_color,size=8),
        legend.box.background = element_rect(fill=background_color, color=NA),
        legend.margin = margin(4,4,4,4),
        legend.spacing.y = unit(.1,"cm"))

ggsave(paste0(tree_plot_directory,"map_tree.png"),node_tree,dpi=600,width=7,height=5)
```

```{r tree_map_manuscript}
set_plot_theme("manuscript3")
node_data <- read.csv(paste0(skink_output_directory,"node_reconstructions.csv"),header=TRUE)

ctenotus <- c(222:309)
lerista <- c(310:389)
other <- c(390:435)
excluded <- c(219:221)

for (i in 1:nrow(ellipse_data)) {
  taxon <- as.character(ellipse_data$taxon[i])
  number <- which(tree$tip.label == taxon)
  if (grepl("Ctenotus", taxon, fixed=TRUE)) {ctenotus <- c(ctenotus, number)}
  else if (grepl("Lerista", taxon, fixed=TRUE)) {lerista <- c(lerista, number)}
  else if (grepl("Notoscincus ornatus", taxon, fixed=TRUE)) {excluded <- c(excluded, number)}
  else {other <- c(other, number)}
}

ctenotus <- sort(ctenotus)
lerista <- sort(lerista)
other <- sort(other)
excluded <- sort(excluded)

node_locations <- c()
for (i in 1:length(tree$tip.label)) {
  node_locations$node[i] <- i
  taxon <- tree$tip.label[i]
  node_locations$x[i] <- ellipse_data$x[which(ellipse_data$taxon==tree$tip.label[i])]
  node_locations$y[i] <- ellipse_data$y[which(ellipse_data$taxon==tree$tip.label[i])]
}
node_locations$node <- c(node_locations$node, node_data$node)
node_locations$x <- c(node_locations$x, node_data$scenario_x)
node_locations$y <- c(node_locations$y, node_data$scenario_y)
node_locations <- data.frame(node_locations)

for (i in 1:nrow(node_locations)) {
  if (node_locations$node[i] %in% ctenotus) {clade <- "ctenotus"}
  if (node_locations$node[i] %in% lerista) {clade <- "lerista"}
  if (node_locations$node[i] %in% other) {clade <- "thirdclade"}
  if (node_locations$node[i] %in% excluded) {clade <- "x"}
  node_locations$Clade[i] <- clade
}

node_locations$highlight <- rep("none",nrow(node_locations))
node_locations$highlight[219] <- "claderoot"
node_locations$highlight[222] <- "claderoot"
node_locations$highlight[310] <- "claderoot"
node_locations$highlight[390] <- "claderoot"
node_locations$highlight[1:length(tree$tip.label)] <- "tip"

node_locations_ctenotus <- node_locations[node_locations$Clade=="ctenotus",]
node_locations_lerista <- node_locations[node_locations$Clade=="lerista",]
node_locations_thirdclade <- node_locations[node_locations$Clade=="thirdclade",]

tree_data <- data.frame(tree$edge)
colnames(tree_data) <- c("N1", "N2")
edge_points <- c()
for (i in 1:nrow(tree_data)) {
  node_1 <- tree_data$N1[i]
  edge_points$X1[i] <- node_locations$x[which(node_locations$node==node_1)]
  edge_points$Y1[i] <- node_locations$y[which(node_locations$node==node_1)]
  node_2 <- tree_data$N2[i]
  edge_points$X2[i] <- node_locations$x[which(node_locations$node==node_2)]
  edge_points$Y2[i] <- node_locations$y[which(node_locations$node==node_2)]
  if (node_1 %in% ctenotus) {clade <- "ctenotus"}
  if (node_1 %in% lerista) {clade <- "lerista"}
  if (node_1 %in% other) {clade <- "thirdclade"}
  if (node_1 %in% excluded) {clade <- "x"}
  edge_points$Clade[i] <- clade
}
edge_points <- data.frame(edge_points)

edge_points_ctenotus <- edge_points[edge_points$Clade=="ctenotus",]
edge_points_lerista <- edge_points[edge_points$Clade=="lerista",]
edge_points_thirdclade <- edge_points[edge_points$Clade=="thirdclade",]

xmin_base <- min(node_locations$x)
xmax_base <- max(node_locations$x)
ymin_base <- min(node_locations$y)
ymax_base <- max(node_locations$y)

xmin <- xmin_base
xmax <- xmax_base
ymin <- ymin_base - 0.1 * (ymax_base - ymin_base)
ymax <- ymax_base + 0.1 * (ymax_base - ymin_base)

sizes <- c(6,4,4)

node_tree_ctenotus <- ggplot(australia_shape) +
  lims(x=c(xmin,xmax),y=c(ymin,ymax)) +
  geom_sf(fill=NA,color=lines_color,lwd=2) +
  geom_segment(data=edge_points_ctenotus,aes(x=X1,y=Y1,xend=X2,yend=Y2),lty="11",lwd=1,color=color_1) +
  geom_point(data=node_locations_ctenotus,aes(x=x,y=y,pch=highlight,size=highlight),fill=shape_color_2,color=lines_color) +
  scale_shape_manual(values=c(13,20,21),labels=c("Clade Root", "Internal Node", "Tip")) +
  scale_size_manual(values=sizes,guide='none') +
  labs(pch="Node Type") +
  ggtitle("Ctenotus") +
  guides(shape=guide_legend(override.aes=list(color=lines_color,fill=shape_color_2,size=8),keyheight=0.1)) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(panel.background = element_rect(fill=background_color,color=NA),
        plot.background = element_rect(fill=background_color,color=NA),
        legend.position=c(.985,.98),
        legend.justification = c("right","top"),
        legend.title = element_text(color=lines_color,size=16),
        legend.text = element_text(color=lines_color,size=12),
        legend.box.background = element_rect(fill=NA, color=NA),
        legend.margin = margin(4,4,4,4),
        legend.spacing.y = unit(.1,"cm"),
        plot.title = element_text(size=32,color=lines_color,hjust=.5,vjust=-1))

node_tree_lerista <- ggplot(australia_shape) +
  lims(x=c(xmin,xmax),y=c(ymin,ymax)) +
  geom_sf(fill=NA,color=lines_color,lwd=2) +
  geom_segment(data=edge_points_lerista,aes(x=X1,y=Y1,xend=X2,yend=Y2),lty="11",lwd=1,color=color_1) +
  geom_point(data=node_locations_lerista,aes(x=x,y=y,pch=highlight,size=highlight),fill=shape_color_2,color=lines_color) +
  scale_shape_manual(values=c(13,20,21),labels=c("Clade Root", "Internal Node", "Tip")) +
  scale_size_manual(values=sizes,guide='none') +
  labs(pch="Node Type") +
  ggtitle("Lerista") +
  guides(shape=guide_legend(override.aes=list(color=lines_color,fill=shape_color_2,size=8),keyheight=0.1)) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(panel.background = element_rect(fill=background_color,color=NA),
        plot.background = element_rect(fill=background_color,color=NA),
        legend.position=c(.985,.98),
        legend.justification = c("right","top"),
        legend.title = element_text(color=lines_color,size=16),
        legend.text = element_text(color=lines_color,size=12),
        legend.box.background = element_rect(fill=NA, color=NA),
        legend.margin = margin(4,4,4,4),
        legend.spacing.y = unit(.1,"cm"),
        plot.title = element_text(size=32,color=lines_color,hjust=.5,vjust=-1))

node_tree_thirdclade <- ggplot(australia_shape) +
  lims(x=c(xmin,xmax),y=c(ymin,ymax)) +
  geom_sf(fill=NA,color=lines_color,lwd=2) +
  geom_segment(data=edge_points_thirdclade,aes(x=X1,y=Y1,xend=X2,yend=Y2),lty="11",lwd=1,color=color_1) +
  geom_point(data=node_locations_thirdclade,aes(x=x,y=y,pch=highlight,size=highlight),fill=shape_color_2,color=lines_color) +
  scale_shape_manual(values=c(13,20,21),labels=c("Clade Root", "Internal Node", "Tip")) +
  scale_size_manual(values=sizes,guide='none') +
  ggtitle("Third Clade") +
  guides(shape=guide_legend(override.aes=list(color=lines_color,fill=shape_color_2,size=8),keyheight=0.1)) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(panel.background = element_rect(fill=background_color,color=NA),
        plot.background = element_rect(fill=background_color,color=NA),
        legend.position=c(.985,.98),
        legend.justification = c("right","top"),
        legend.title = element_text(color=lines_color,size=16),
        legend.text = element_text(color=lines_color,size=12),
        legend.box.background = element_rect(fill=NA, color=NA),
        legend.margin = margin(4,4,4,4),
        legend.spacing.y = unit(.1,"cm"),
        plot.title = element_text(size=32,color=lines_color,hjust=.5,vjust=-1))

node_tree <- node_tree_ctenotus + node_tree_lerista + node_tree_thirdclade + plot_layout(guides="collect") & theme(legend.title=element_blank(),
                                                                                                                   legend.position="bottom",
                                                                                                                   legend.text=element_text(size=24))

ggsave(paste0(manuscript_plot_directory,"map_tree.png"),node_tree,dpi=600,width=18,height=6)
set_plot_theme("dark")
```

```{r directions_manuscript}
directions_manuscript <- node_tree / directions_all_manuscript / direction_vectors_manuscript + plot_layout(heights=c(1,.9,1.5))
ggsave(paste0(manuscript_plot_directory,"directions.png"),directions_manuscript,dpi=600,width=18,height=20)
include_graphics(paste0(manuscript_plot_directory,"directions.png"))
```

#### *Ctenotus*

```{r tree_map_ctenotus, echo=TRUE}
node_locations_ctenotus <- node_locations[which(node_locations$Clade=="ctenotus"),]
edge_points_ctenotus <- edge_points[which(edge_points$Clade=="ctenotus"),]

node_tree <- ggplot(australia_shape) +
  lims(x=c(xmin,xmax),y=c(ymin,ymax)) +
  geom_sf(fill=NA,color=lines_color) +
  geom_segment(data=edge_points_ctenotus,aes(x=X1,y=Y1,xend=X2,yend=Y2),color=lines_color,lty="dotted",lwd=.25) +
  geom_label(data=node_locations_ctenotus,
             aes(x=x,
                 y=y,
                 label=node,
                 fill=highlight),
             color=lines_color,
             size=2,
             label.padding=unit(.1,"lines")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c(shape_color_2,"darkorange4","lightsalmon3"),labels=c("Internal Node","Clade Root","Tip")) +
  guides(fill=guide_legend(title="Node Type", override.aes=list(label="",color=color_1),keyheight=0.1)) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(panel.background = element_rect(fill=background_color,color=NA),
        legend.position=c(.985,.98),
        legend.justification = c("right","top"),
        legend.title = element_text(color=lines_color,size=12),
        legend.text = element_text(color=lines_color,size=8),
        legend.box.background = element_rect(fill=background_color, color=lines_color),
        legend.margin = margin(4,4,4,4),
        legend.spacing.y = unit(.1,"cm"))

ggsave(paste0(tree_plot_directory,"map_tree_ctenotus.png"),node_tree,dpi=600,width=7,height=5)
```
