---

### Lineage Tracing

<div class = "row">
<div class = "col-md-3">

Here we trace a single lineage (leading to one present-day species) from the root of the tree to the present, including cladogenetic scenarios at nodes.

```{r map_lineage, echo=TRUE}
# FOR EACH TIP -- DO NOT RERUN
node_data <- read.csv(paste0(skink_output_directory,"node_reconstructions.csv"),header=TRUE)
node_data_subset <- node_data[,c("node","scenario_d","scenario_m","scenario_c","scenario_h","scenario_r","scenario_s","scenario_a","scenario_x","scenario_y")]
colnames(node_data_subset) <- c("node","d","m","c","h","r","s","a","x","y")
c_val <- seq(0,1.5,.5)
h_val <- 2*pi*seq(0,7/8,1/8)
map_lineage <- function(tip) {
  # Get taxon
  taxon <- tree$tip.label[i]
  ellipse_row <- which(ellipse_data$taxon==taxon)
  # Get the list of nodes leading to our desired species
  node_history <- ape::nodepath(tree,from=tip,to=(length(tree$tip.label)+1))
  node_history <- rev(node_history)
  # Getting the subset of node data for this history
  rows <- c()
  for (i in 1:(length(node_history)-1)) {
    row_ind <- which(node_data$node == node_history[i])
    rows <- c(rows,row_ind)
  }
  lineage_data <- node_data_subset[rows,]
  # Determine left and right daughter assignments
  daughter_assignments <- rep(NA,length(node_history)-1)
  for (i in 1:(length(node_history)-1)) {
    parent <- node_history[i]
    right_child <- empire_tree$nodes$right_child[parent]
    left_child <- empire_tree$nodes$left_child[parent]
    if (node_history[i+1] == right_child) {daughter_assignments[i] <- "right"}
    if (node_history[i+1] == left_child) {daughter_assignments[i] <- "left"}
  }
  lineage_data$daughter <- daughter_assignments
  for (i in 1:nrow(lineage_data)) {
    lineage_data$c[i] <- c_val[lineage_data$c[i] + 1]
    lineage_data$h[i] <- h_val[lineage_data$h[i] + 1]
  }
  # Put together data for all nodes
  labels_data <- data.frame(matrix(data=NA,nrow=0,ncol=3))
  segments_data <- data.frame(matrix(data=NA,nrow=0,ncol=5))
  polygons_data <- data.frame(matrix(data=NA,nrow=0,ncol=4))
  for (i in 1:nrow(lineage_data)) {
    # Adding node to labels
    label <- data.frame(matrix(data=c(lineage_data$x[i],lineage_data$y[i],lineage_data$node[i]),nrow=1,ncol=3))
    labels_data <- rbind(labels_data,label)
    # Adding anagenetic segment if applicable
    if (exists("daughter_x")) {
      segment <- data.frame(matrix(data=c(daughter_x,daughter_y,lineage_data$x[i],lineage_data$y[i],"anagenetic"),nrow=1,ncol=5))
      segments_data <- rbind(segments_data,segment)
    }
    # Making ancestral ellipse
    ancestor_ellipse <- data.frame(make_ellipse_coords(lineage_data$x[i],
                                                       lineage_data$y[i],
                                                       lineage_data$r[i],
                                                       lineage_data$s[i],
                                                       lineage_data$a[i]))
    n_points <- nrow(ancestor_ellipse)
    ancestor_ellipse$node <- rep(paste0(lineage_data$node[i],"A"),n_points)
    ancestor_ellipse$type <- rep("ancestor",n_points)
    polygons_data <- rbind(polygons_data,ancestor_ellipse)
    # Making daughter ellipse
    daughter_x <- transform_node(char="x", 
                                 daughter=lineage_data$daughter[i], 
                                 d=lineage_data$d[i], 
                                 m=lineage_data$m[i], 
                                 c=lineage_data$c[i], 
                                 h=lineage_data$h[i], 
                                 x=lineage_data$x[i], 
                                 y=lineage_data$y[i], 
                                 r=lineage_data$r[i], 
                                 s=lineage_data$s[i], 
                                 a=lineage_data$a[i], 
                                 alpha=-5, 
                                 z=10)
    daughter_y <- transform_node(char="y", 
                                 daughter=lineage_data$daughter[i], 
                                 d=lineage_data$d[i], 
                                 m=lineage_data$m[i], 
                                 c=lineage_data$c[i], 
                                 h=lineage_data$h[i], 
                                 x=lineage_data$x[i], 
                                 y=lineage_data$y[i], 
                                 r=lineage_data$r[i], 
                                 s=lineage_data$s[i], 
                                 a=lineage_data$a[i], 
                                 alpha=-5, 
                                 z=10)
    daughter_a <- transform_node(char="a", 
                                 daughter=lineage_data$daughter[i], 
                                 d=lineage_data$d[i], 
                                 m=lineage_data$m[i], 
                                 c=lineage_data$c[i], 
                                 h=lineage_data$h[i], 
                                 x=lineage_data$x[i], 
                                 y=lineage_data$y[i], 
                                 r=lineage_data$r[i], 
                                 s=lineage_data$s[i], 
                                 a=lineage_data$a[i], 
                                 alpha=-5, 
                                 z=10)
    daughter_ellipse <- data.frame(make_ellipse_coords(daughter_x,
                                                       daughter_y,
                                                       lineage_data$r[i],
                                                       lineage_data$s[i],
                                                       daughter_a))
    daughter_ellipse$node <- rep(paste0(lineage_data$node[i],"D"),n_points)
    daughter_ellipse$type <- rep("daughter",n_points)
    lineage_data$daughter_x[i] <- daughter_x
    lineage_data$daughter_y[i] <- daughter_y
    polygons_data <- rbind(polygons_data,daughter_ellipse)
    # Adding cladogenetic segment
    segment <- data.frame(matrix(data=c(lineage_data$x[i],lineage_data$y[i],daughter_x,daughter_y,"cladogenetic"),nrow=1,ncol=5))
    segments_data <- rbind(segments_data,segment)
  }
  # Adding ellipse for the tip
  tip_ellipse <- data.frame(make_ellipse_coords(ellipse_data$x[ellipse_row],
                                                ellipse_data$y[ellipse_row],
                                                ellipse_data$r[ellipse_row],
                                                ellipse_data$s[ellipse_row],
                                                ellipse_data$a[ellipse_row]))
  tip_ellipse$node <- rep(paste0(tip,"A"),n_points)
  tip_ellipse$type <- rep("ancestor",n_points)
  polygons_data <- rbind(polygons_data,tip_ellipse)
  tip_label <- data.frame(matrix(data=c(ellipse_data$x[ellipse_row],ellipse_data$y[ellipse_row],tip),nrow=1,ncol=3))
  labels_data <- rbind(labels_data,tip_label)
  tip_segment <- data.frame(matrix(data=c(daughter_x,daughter_y,ellipse_data$x[ellipse_row],ellipse_data$y[ellipse_row],"anagenetic"),nrow=1,ncol=5))
  segments_data <- rbind(segments_data,tip_segment)
  # Formatting output
  polygons_data$node <- as.factor(polygons_data$node)
  polygons_data$type <- as.factor(polygons_data$type)
  colnames(labels_data) <- c("x","y","label")
  colnames(segments_data) <- c("x","y","xend","yend","type")
  return(list(polygons=polygons_data,labels=labels_data,segments=segments_data))
}
if (RERUN) {
  for (i in 1:218) {
    cat("\r","Species: ", tree$tip.label[i], " | ", round(as.numeric(i)/218*100,0), "%                    ")
    number <- i
    lineage_map <- map_lineage(number)
    map_data <- lineage_map$polygons
    map_data$node <- as.factor(map_data$node)
    map_data$type <- as.factor(map_data$type)
    labels_data <- lineage_map$labels
    labels_data$label <- as.character(labels_data$label)
    segments_data <- lineage_map$segments
    segments_data$type <- as.factor(segments_data$type)
    segments_data$x <- as.numeric(segments_data$x)
    segments_data$y <- as.numeric(segments_data$y)
    segments_data$xend <- as.numeric(segments_data$xend)
    segments_data$yend <- as.numeric(segments_data$yend)
    
    lineage_map <- ggplot(australia_shape) +
      geom_sf(fill=NA,color=lines_color,lwd=1.5) +
      lims(x=c(st_bbox(australia_shape)$xmin,st_bbox(australia_shape)$xmax),y=c(st_bbox(australia_shape)$ymin,st_bbox(australia_shape)$ymax)) +
      #geom_text(data=labels_data,aes(x=x,y=y,label=label),color=color_1,size=2,fontface="bold",vjust=1.2) +
      geom_sf(data=spheno_shapes[which(spheno_shapes$binomial==tree$tip.label[i]),],fill=range_color,color=range_color) +
      geom_polygon(data=map_data,aes(x=x,y=y,group=node,color=type),fill=NA,lwd=1) +
      scale_color_manual(values=c(color_1,color_2),
                         guide=guide_legend(override.aes=list(color=NA,fill=c(color_1,color_2)))) +
      geom_segment(data=segments_data,aes(x=x,y=y,xend=xend,yend=yend,lty=type),color=lines_color,lwd=1,arrow = arrow(length = unit(0.25,"cm")),lineend="round") +
      scale_linetype_manual(values=c("solid","12")) +
      labs(color=NULL,lty=NULL) +
      theme_void() +
      theme(panel.background = element_rect(fill=background_color,color=NA),
            plot.background = element_rect(fill=background_color,color=NA),
            #legend.position=c(.985,.99),
            #legend.justification = c("center","top"),
            legend.position="top",
            legend.direction="horizontal",
            legend.text = element_text(color=lines_color,size=16),
            legend.key.height=unit(0.7,"cm"),
            legend.key.width=unit(0.7,"cm"),
            legend.box.background = element_rect(fill=background_color,color=NA),
            legend.margin = margin(4,4,4,4))
    
    filename <- paste0(tree_plot_directory,"lineages/",tree$tip.label[i],".png")
    ggsave(filename,lineage_map,dpi=600,width=7,height=7)
  }
  RERUN <- FALSE
}
```

</div>
<div class = "col-md-9">


</div>
</div>

```{r map_lineage_manuscript}
set_plot_theme("manuscript")
i <- 218
number <- i
lineage_map <- map_lineage(number)
map_data <- lineage_map$polygons
map_data$node <- as.factor(map_data$node)
map_data$type <- as.factor(map_data$type)
labels_data <- lineage_map$labels
labels_data$label <- as.character(labels_data$label)
segments_data <- lineage_map$segments
segments_data$type <- as.factor(segments_data$type)
segments_data$x <- as.numeric(segments_data$x)
segments_data$y <- as.numeric(segments_data$y)
segments_data$xend <- as.numeric(segments_data$xend)
segments_data$yend <- as.numeric(segments_data$yend)

box_size <- .8

lineage_map <- ggplot(australia_shape) +
  geom_sf(fill=NA,color=lines_color,lwd=1.5) +
  lims(x=c(st_bbox(australia_shape)$xmin,st_bbox(australia_shape)$xmax),y=c(st_bbox(australia_shape)$ymin,st_bbox(australia_shape)$ymax)) +
  geom_polygon(data=map_data,aes(x=x,y=y,group=node,fill=type),color=lines_color,lwd=.5) +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c(color_1,color_2),
                    guide=guide_legend(override.aes=list(color=lines_color,lwd=.5,fill=c(color_1,color_2)))) +
  geom_rect(aes(xmin=segments_data$x[4]-box_size,
                xmax=segments_data$x[4]+box_size,
                ymin=segments_data$y[4]-box_size,
                ymax=segments_data$y[4]+box_size),
            fill=NA,
            color=lines_color,
            lty="11",
            lwd=.5) +
  geom_rect(aes(xmin=segments_data$x[8]-box_size,
                xmax=segments_data$x[8]+box_size,
                ymin=segments_data$y[8]-box_size,
                ymax=segments_data$y[8]+box_size),
            fill=NA,
            color=lines_color,
            lty="11",
            lwd=.5) +
  geom_sf(data=spheno_shapes[which(spheno_shapes$binomial==tree$tip.label[i]),],fill=background_color,color=lines_color,lwd=.5) +
  geom_segment(data=segments_data,aes(x=x,y=y,xend=xend,yend=yend,lty=type),color=lines_color,lwd=1,lineend="round") +
  scale_linetype_manual(values=c("solid","12")) +
  geom_segment(data=segments_data[which(segments_data$type=="anagenetic"),],aes(x=x,y=y,xend=xend,yend=yend),color=lines_color,lwd=1,arrow = arrow(length = unit(0.2,"cm"),type="closed"),lineend="round") +
  labs(fill=NULL,lty=NULL) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(panel.background = element_rect(fill=background_color,color=NA),
        plot.background = element_rect(fill=background_color,color=NA),
        legend.position="top",
        legend.direction="horizontal",
        legend.text = element_text(color=lines_color,size=16),
        legend.key.height=unit(0.7,"cm"),
        legend.key.width=unit(0.7,"cm"),
        legend.box.background = element_rect(fill=background_color,color=NA),
        legend.margin = margin(4,4,4,4))

filename <- paste0(manuscript_plot_directory,"lineage.png")
ggsave(filename,lineage_map,dpi=600,width=7,height=7)
include_graphics(paste0(manuscript_plot_directory,"lineage.png"))
set_plot_theme("dark")
```

---

### Node Posterior

Plotting the posterior distribution at a node alongside the reconstructed ancestor and daughters under the most probable cladogenetic scenario and mean characters compatible with that scenario. Here we show node 235, an interior node within *Ctenotus* with 7 present-day descendants.

```{r single_posterior, echo=TRUE}
if (RERUN) {
  burnin <- 20000
  length <- 200000
  data_model <- read.table(paste0(data_directory,"model_log.tsv"),sep="\t",header=TRUE)[burnin:length,]
  data_d <- read.table(paste0(data_directory,"d_log.tsv"),sep="\t",header=TRUE)[burnin:length,]
  data_m <- read.table(paste0(data_directory,"m_log.tsv"),sep="\t",header=TRUE)[burnin:length,]
  data_c <- read.table(paste0(data_directory,"c_log.tsv"),sep="\t",header=TRUE)[burnin:length,]
  data_h <- read.table(paste0(data_directory,"h_log.tsv"),sep="\t",header=TRUE)[burnin:length,]
  data_r <- read.table(paste0(data_directory,"r_log.tsv"),sep="\t",header=TRUE)[burnin:length,]
  data_s <- read.table(paste0(data_directory,"s_log.tsv"),sep="\t",header=TRUE)[burnin:length,]
  data_a <- read.table(paste0(data_directory,"a_log.tsv"),sep="\t",header=TRUE)[burnin:length,]
  data_x <- read.table(paste0(data_directory,"x_log.tsv"),sep="\t",header=TRUE)[burnin:length,]
  data_y <- read.table(paste0(data_directory,"y_log.tsv"),sep="\t",header=TRUE)[burnin:length,]
  RERUN <- FALSE
}

raster_csv <- read.csv(paste0(aridity_data_directory,"interpolated_raster.csv"))[,c("x","y","delta1","delta2")]
raster_df <- data.frame(raster_csv)
coordinates(raster_df) <- ~ x + y
gridded(raster_df) <- TRUE
raster_data <- stack(raster_df)
node_data <- read.csv(paste0(skink_output_directory,"node_reconstructions.csv"),header=TRUE)

if (RERUN) {
  num_nodes <- length(219:435)
  for (node in 219:435) {
    cat("\r","Node ",node," | ",round(as.numeric(node-219)/num_nodes*100,0), "%")
  
    node_name <- paste0("X",node)
    left_name <- empire_tree$nodes$left_child[which(empire_tree$nodes$node==node)]
    right_name <- empire_tree$nodes$right_child[which(empire_tree$nodes$node==node)]
    thinning <- 100
    
    node_d <- data_d[[node_name]][seq(1,nrow(data_d),thinning)]
    node_m <- data_m[[node_name]][seq(1,nrow(data_d),thinning)]
    node_c <- data_m[[node_name]][seq(1,nrow(data_d),thinning)]
    node_h <- data_h[[node_name]][seq(1,nrow(data_d),thinning)]
    node_x <- data_x[[node_name]][seq(1,nrow(data_d),thinning)]
    node_y <- data_y[[node_name]][seq(1,nrow(data_d),thinning)]
    node_r <- data_r[[node_name]][seq(1,nrow(data_d),thinning)]
    node_s <- data_s[[node_name]][seq(1,nrow(data_d),thinning)]
    node_a <- data_a[[node_name]][seq(1,nrow(data_d),thinning)]
    
    h_val <- c(0,pi/4,pi/2,3*pi/4,pi,5*pi/4,3*pi/2,7*pi/4)
    c_val <- c(0,.5,1,1.5)
    
    for (i in 1:length(node_c)) {node_c[i] <- c_val[node_c[i]+1]}
    for (i in 1:length(node_h)) {node_h[i] <- h_val[node_h[i]+1]}
    
    node_dataframe <- data.frame(cbind(d=node_d,m=node_m,c=node_c,h=node_h,x=node_x,y=node_y,r=node_r,s=node_s,a=node_a))
    
    get_daughter_polygon <- function(daughter,d,m,c,h,x,y,r,s,a) {
      new_x <- transform_node(char="x", daughter=daughter, d=d, m=m, c=c, h=h, x=x, y=y, r=r, s=s, a=a, alpha=-5, z=10)
      new_y <- transform_node(char="y", daughter=daughter, d=d, m=m, c=c, h=h, x=x, y=y, r=r, s=s, a=a, alpha=-5, z=10)
      new_a <- transform_node(char="a", daughter=daughter, d=d, m=m, c=c, h=h, x=x, y=y, r=r, s=s, a=a, alpha=-5, z=10)
      new_polygon <- data.frame(make_ellipse_coords(new_x,new_y,r,s,new_a))
      return(new_polygon)
    }
    
    ancestor_data <- data.frame(matrix(data=NA,nrow=0,ncol=3))
    left_data <- data.frame(matrix(data=NA,nrow=0,ncol=4))
    right_data <- data.frame(matrix(data=NA,nrow=0,ncol=4))
    
    for (i in 1:nrow(node_dataframe)) {
      ancestor_ellipse <- data.frame(make_ellipse_coords(node_dataframe$x[i],node_dataframe$y[i],node_dataframe$r[i],node_dataframe$s[i],node_dataframe$a[i]))
      n_points <- nrow(ancestor_ellipse)
      ancestor_ellipse$index <- rep(i,n_points)
      
      left_ellipse <- get_daughter_polygon("left",node_dataframe$d[i],node_dataframe$m[i],node_dataframe$c[i],node_dataframe$h[i],node_dataframe$x[i],node_dataframe$y[i],node_dataframe$r[i],node_dataframe$s[i],node_dataframe$a[i])
      n_points <- nrow(left_ellipse)
      left_ellipse$index <- rep(i,n_points)
      
      right_ellipse <- get_daughter_polygon("right",node_dataframe$d[i],node_dataframe$m[i],node_dataframe$c[i],node_dataframe$h[i],node_dataframe$x[i],node_dataframe$y[i],node_dataframe$r[i],node_dataframe$s[i],node_dataframe$a[i])
      n_points <- nrow(right_ellipse)
      right_ellipse$index <- rep(i,n_points)
      
      ancestor_data <- rbind(ancestor_data,ancestor_ellipse)
      left_data <- rbind(left_data,left_ellipse)
      right_data <- rbind(right_data,right_ellipse)
    }
    
    ancestor_shapes <- as_Spatial(sf_multipolygon(ancestor_data,x="x",y="y",polygon_id="index",multipolygon_id="index"))
    left_shapes <- as_Spatial(sf_multipolygon(left_data,x="x",y="y",polygon_id="index",multipolygon_id="index"))
    right_shapes <- as_Spatial(sf_multipolygon(right_data,x="x",y="y",polygon_id="index",multipolygon_id="index"))
    
    ancestor_raster <- rasterize(ancestor_shapes,raster_data,"index",fun="count")
    left_raster <- rasterize(left_shapes,raster_data,"index",fun="count")
    right_raster <- rasterize(right_shapes,raster_data,"index",fun="count")
    names(ancestor_raster) <- "ancestor"
    names(left_raster) <- "left"
    names(right_raster) <- "right"
    raster_with_counts <- addLayer(raster_data,ancestor_raster)
    raster_with_counts <- addLayer(raster_with_counts,left_raster)
    raster_with_counts <- addLayer(raster_with_counts,right_raster)
    
    count_df <- as.data.frame(raster_with_counts,xy=TRUE)
    count_df <- count_df[!is.na(count_df$delta1),]
    count_df <- count_df[!is.na(count_df$delta2),]
    count_df$ancestor[is.na(count_df$ancestor)] <- 0
    count_df$left[is.na(count_df$left)] <- 0
    count_df$right[is.na(count_df$right)] <- 0
    count_df$ancestor <- count_df$ancestor / max(count_df$ancestor)
    count_df$left <- count_df$left / max(count_df$left)
    count_df$right <- count_df$right / max(count_df$right)
    count_df$ancestor[count_df$ancestor < 0.05] <- 0
    count_df$left[count_df$left < 0.05] <- 0
    count_df$right[count_df$right < 0.05] <- 0
    
    best_ancestor <- data.frame(make_ellipse_coords(node_data$scenario_x[node_data$node==node],
                                                    node_data$scenario_y[node_data$node==node],
                                                    node_data$scenario_r[node_data$node==node],
                                                    node_data$scenario_s[node_data$node==node],
                                                    node_data$scenario_a[node_data$node==node]))
    best_left <- get_daughter_polygon("left",
                                      node_data$scenario_d[node_data$node==node],
                                      node_data$scenario_m[node_data$node==node],
                                      c_val[node_data$scenario_c[node_data$node==node]+1],
                                      h_val[node_data$scenario_h[node_data$node==node]+1],
                                      node_data$scenario_x[node_data$node==node],
                                      node_data$scenario_y[node_data$node==node],
                                      node_data$scenario_r[node_data$node==node],
                                      node_data$scenario_s[node_data$node==node],
                                      node_data$scenario_a[node_data$node==node])
    best_right <- get_daughter_polygon("right",
                                      node_data$scenario_d[node_data$node==node],
                                      node_data$scenario_m[node_data$node==node],
                                      c_val[node_data$scenario_c[node_data$node==node]+1],
                                      h_val[node_data$scenario_h[node_data$node==node]+1],
                                      node_data$scenario_x[node_data$node==node],
                                      node_data$scenario_y[node_data$node==node],
                                      node_data$scenario_r[node_data$node==node],
                                      node_data$scenario_s[node_data$node==node],
                                      node_data$scenario_a[node_data$node==node])
    
    xmin <- min(count_df$x)
    xmax <- max(count_df$x)
    ymin <- min(count_df$y)
    ymax <- max(count_df$y)
    lims_x <- c(xmin-.1*(xmax-xmin),xmax+.1*(xmax-xmin))
    lims_y <- c(ymin-.2*(ymax-ymin),ymax+.1*(ymax-ymin))
    
    plot_ancestor <- ggplot(australia_shape) +
      lims(x=lims_x,y=lims_y) +
      geom_tile(data=count_df,aes_string(x="x",y="y",alpha="ancestor"),fill=shape_color) +
      scale_alpha_continuous(range=c(0,1)) +
      labs(alpha="Probability") +
      geom_sf(fill=NA,color=lines_color,lwd=1) +
      geom_polygon(data=best_ancestor,aes(x=x,y=y),fill=NA,color=lines_color,lwd=1.5) +
      ggtitle(label=paste0("Ancestor\n(",node,")")) +
      theme_void() +
      theme(plot.background = element_rect(fill=background_color,color=NA),
            panel.background = element_rect(fill=background_color,color=NA),
            legend.position="none",
            plot.title = element_text(color=lines_color,size=24,hjust=.5,vjust=1))
    
    plot_left <- ggplot(australia_shape) +
      lims(x=lims_x,y=lims_y) +
      geom_tile(data=count_df,aes_string(x="x",y="y",alpha="left"),fill=shape_color) +
      scale_alpha_continuous(range=c(0,1)) +
      labs(alpha="Probability") +
      geom_sf(fill=NA,color=lines_color,lwd=1) +
      geom_polygon(data=best_left,aes(x=x,y=y),fill=NA,color=lines_color,lwd=1.5) +
      ggtitle(label=paste0("Left Daughter\n(Toward ",left_name,")")) +
      theme_void() +
      theme(plot.background = element_rect(fill=background_color,color=NA),
            panel.background = element_rect(fill=background_color,color=NA),
            legend.position="none",
            plot.title = element_text(color=lines_color,size=24,hjust=.5,vjust=1))
    
    plot_right <- ggplot(australia_shape) +
      lims(x=lims_x,y=lims_y) +
      geom_tile(data=count_df,aes_string(x="x",y="y",alpha="right"),fill=shape_color) +
      scale_alpha_continuous(range=c(0,1)) +
      labs(alpha="Probability") +
      geom_sf(fill=NA,color=lines_color,lwd=1) +
      geom_polygon(data=best_right,aes(x=x,y=y),fill=NA,color=lines_color,lwd=1.5) +
      ggtitle(label=paste0("Right Daughter\n(Toward ",right_name,")")) +
      theme_void() +
      theme(plot.background = element_rect(fill=background_color,color=NA),
            panel.background = element_rect(fill=background_color,color=NA),
            legend.position="none",
            plot.title = element_text(color=lines_color,size=24,hjust=.5,vjust=1))
    
    plot_best <- ggplot(australia_shape) +
      lims(x=lims_x,y=lims_y) +
      geom_sf(fill=NA,color=lines_color,lwd=1) +
      geom_polygon(data=best_ancestor,aes(x=x,y=y),fill=shape_color_2,color=NA) +
      geom_polygon(data=best_left,aes(x=x,y=y),fill=NA,color=lines_color,lwd=1.5) +
      geom_polygon(data=best_right,aes(x=x,y=y),fill=NA,color=lines_color,lwd=2,lty="11") +
      geom_polygon(data=best_right,aes(x=x,y=y),fill=NA,color=lines_color,lwd=1) +
      geom_text(label="Ancestor",x=117.5,y=-10,size=8,color=lines_color) +
      geom_segment(aes(x=115,xend=120,y=-11,yend=-11),color=shape_color_2,lwd=3) +
      geom_text(label="Left Daughter",x=117.5,y=-12,size=8,color=lines_color) +
      geom_segment(aes(x=115,xend=120,y=-13,yend=-13),color=lines_color,lwd=1.5) +
      geom_text(label="Right Daughter",x=117.5,y=-14,size=8,color=lines_color) +
      geom_segment(aes(x=115,xend=120,y=-15,yend=-15),color=lines_color,lwd=2,lty="11") +
      geom_segment(aes(x=115,xend=120,y=-15,yend=-15),color=lines_color,lwd=1) +
      theme_void() +
      theme(plot.background = element_rect(fill=background_color,color=NA),
            panel.background = element_rect(fill=background_color,color=NA),
            legend.position="none")
    
    node_posterior_plot <- (plot_ancestor + plot_left + plot_right) / plot_best + plot_layout(guides = "collect",heights=c(1,3.5)) & theme(plot.background=element_rect(fill=background_color,color=NA))
    
    filename <- paste0(node_plot_directory,node,".png")
    ggsave(filename,node_posterior_plot,dpi=600,width=14,height=14)
  }
}
```

```{r single_posterior_show, eval=TRUE, results=TRUE}
include_graphics(paste0(node_plot_directory,"235.png"))
# GOOD ONES: 219, 223, 225, 229, 230, 235, 237, 246, 247, 256*, 282, 285, 286*, 298, 310, 311, 316, 323, 336, 349, 365, 371, 375, 376, 379, 381, 392, 396, 399, 403
```

In previous analyses, node 266, an interior node within *Ctenotus* with 3 present-day descendants, had an abnormally large and NS-elongated reconstructed ellipse. We can see that this large ellipse is caused by the east-coast location of its left daughter (species 37, *Ctenotus allotropis*) and west-coast location of its right daughter (node 267, ancestor of western species 35 *Ctenotus australis* and 36 *Ctenotus alleni*). This is the only reconstructed ellipse that far exceeds the bounds of the continent, and probably only takes this shape because both daughters are distant and NS-elongated. Any other configuration (a smaller ancestor or rounder ancestor) would require large movements in (x,y) or (r,s) that are easier to account for with (a). Clearly, the skinks did not live in the ocean.

```{r node_266, echo=TRUE}
node <- 266
node_name <- paste0("X",node)
left_name <- empire_tree$nodes$left_child[which(empire_tree$nodes$node==node)]
right_name <- empire_tree$nodes$right_child[which(empire_tree$nodes$node==node)]
thinning <- 100

node_d <- data_d[[node_name]][seq(1,nrow(data_d),thinning)]
node_m <- data_m[[node_name]][seq(1,nrow(data_d),thinning)]
node_c <- data_m[[node_name]][seq(1,nrow(data_d),thinning)]
node_h <- data_h[[node_name]][seq(1,nrow(data_d),thinning)]
node_x <- data_x[[node_name]][seq(1,nrow(data_d),thinning)]
node_y <- data_y[[node_name]][seq(1,nrow(data_d),thinning)]
node_r <- data_r[[node_name]][seq(1,nrow(data_d),thinning)]
node_s <- data_s[[node_name]][seq(1,nrow(data_d),thinning)]
node_a <- data_a[[node_name]][seq(1,nrow(data_d),thinning)]

h_val <- c(0,pi/4,pi/2,3*pi/4,pi,5*pi/4,3*pi/2,7*pi/4)
c_val <- c(0,.5,1,1.5)

for (i in 1:length(node_c)) {node_c[i] <- c_val[node_c[i]+1]}
for (i in 1:length(node_h)) {node_h[i] <- h_val[node_h[i]+1]}

node_dataframe <- data.frame(cbind(d=node_d,m=node_m,c=node_c,h=node_h,x=node_x,y=node_y,r=node_r,s=node_s,a=node_a))

get_daughter_polygon <- function(daughter,d,m,c,h,x,y,r,s,a) {
new_x <- transform_node(char="x", daughter=daughter, d=d, m=m, c=c, h=h, x=x, y=y, r=r, s=s, a=a, alpha=-5, z=10)
new_y <- transform_node(char="y", daughter=daughter, d=d, m=m, c=c, h=h, x=x, y=y, r=r, s=s, a=a, alpha=-5, z=10)
new_a <- transform_node(char="a", daughter=daughter, d=d, m=m, c=c, h=h, x=x, y=y, r=r, s=s, a=a, alpha=-5, z=10)
new_polygon <- data.frame(make_ellipse_coords(new_x,new_y,r,s,new_a))
return(new_polygon)
}

ancestor_data <- data.frame(matrix(data=NA,nrow=0,ncol=3))
left_data <- data.frame(matrix(data=NA,nrow=0,ncol=4))
right_data <- data.frame(matrix(data=NA,nrow=0,ncol=4))

for (i in 1:nrow(node_dataframe)) {
ancestor_ellipse <- data.frame(make_ellipse_coords(node_dataframe$x[i],node_dataframe$y[i],node_dataframe$r[i],node_dataframe$s[i],node_dataframe$a[i]))
n_points <- nrow(ancestor_ellipse)
ancestor_ellipse$index <- rep(i,n_points)

left_ellipse <- get_daughter_polygon("left",node_dataframe$d[i],node_dataframe$m[i],node_dataframe$c[i],node_dataframe$h[i],node_dataframe$x[i],node_dataframe$y[i],node_dataframe$r[i],node_dataframe$s[i],node_dataframe$a[i])
n_points <- nrow(left_ellipse)
left_ellipse$index <- rep(i,n_points)

right_ellipse <- get_daughter_polygon("right",node_dataframe$d[i],node_dataframe$m[i],node_dataframe$c[i],node_dataframe$h[i],node_dataframe$x[i],node_dataframe$y[i],node_dataframe$r[i],node_dataframe$s[i],node_dataframe$a[i])
n_points <- nrow(right_ellipse)
right_ellipse$index <- rep(i,n_points)

ancestor_data <- rbind(ancestor_data,ancestor_ellipse)
left_data <- rbind(left_data,left_ellipse)
right_data <- rbind(right_data,right_ellipse)
}

ancestor_shapes <- as_Spatial(sf_multipolygon(ancestor_data,x="x",y="y",polygon_id="index",multipolygon_id="index"))
left_shapes <- as_Spatial(sf_multipolygon(left_data,x="x",y="y",polygon_id="index",multipolygon_id="index"))
right_shapes <- as_Spatial(sf_multipolygon(right_data,x="x",y="y",polygon_id="index",multipolygon_id="index"))

ancestor_raster <- rasterize(ancestor_shapes,raster_data,"index",fun="count")
left_raster <- rasterize(left_shapes,raster_data,"index",fun="count")
right_raster <- rasterize(right_shapes,raster_data,"index",fun="count")
names(ancestor_raster) <- "ancestor"
names(left_raster) <- "left"
names(right_raster) <- "right"
raster_with_counts <- addLayer(raster_data,ancestor_raster)
raster_with_counts <- addLayer(raster_with_counts,left_raster)
raster_with_counts <- addLayer(raster_with_counts,right_raster)

count_df <- as.data.frame(raster_with_counts,xy=TRUE)
count_df <- count_df[!is.na(count_df$delta1),]
count_df <- count_df[!is.na(count_df$delta2),]
count_df$ancestor[is.na(count_df$ancestor)] <- 0
count_df$left[is.na(count_df$left)] <- 0
count_df$right[is.na(count_df$right)] <- 0
count_df$ancestor <- count_df$ancestor / max(count_df$ancestor)
count_df$left <- count_df$left / max(count_df$left)
count_df$right <- count_df$right / max(count_df$right)
count_df$ancestor[count_df$ancestor < 0.05] <- 0
count_df$left[count_df$left < 0.05] <- 0
count_df$right[count_df$right < 0.05] <- 0

best_ancestor <- data.frame(make_ellipse_coords(node_data$scenario_x[node_data$node==node],
                                              node_data$scenario_y[node_data$node==node],
                                              node_data$scenario_r[node_data$node==node],
                                              node_data$scenario_s[node_data$node==node],
                                              node_data$scenario_a[node_data$node==node]))
best_left <- get_daughter_polygon("left",
                                node_data$scenario_d[node_data$node==node],
                                node_data$scenario_m[node_data$node==node],
                                c_val[node_data$scenario_c[node_data$node==node]+1],
                                h_val[node_data$scenario_h[node_data$node==node]+1],
                                node_data$scenario_x[node_data$node==node],
                                node_data$scenario_y[node_data$node==node],
                                node_data$scenario_r[node_data$node==node],
                                node_data$scenario_s[node_data$node==node],
                                node_data$scenario_a[node_data$node==node])
best_right <- get_daughter_polygon("right",
                                node_data$scenario_d[node_data$node==node],
                                node_data$scenario_m[node_data$node==node],
                                c_val[node_data$scenario_c[node_data$node==node]+1],
                                h_val[node_data$scenario_h[node_data$node==node]+1],
                                node_data$scenario_x[node_data$node==node],
                                node_data$scenario_y[node_data$node==node],
                                node_data$scenario_r[node_data$node==node],
                                node_data$scenario_s[node_data$node==node],
                                node_data$scenario_a[node_data$node==node])

tip_37_info <- ellipse_data[which(ellipse_data$taxon==tree$tip.label[37]),]
tip_37 <- data.frame(make_ellipse_coords(tip_37_info$x,tip_37_info$y,tip_37_info$r,tip_37_info$s,tip_37_info$a))
tip_35_info <- ellipse_data[which(ellipse_data$taxon==tree$tip.label[35]),]
tip_35 <- data.frame(make_ellipse_coords(tip_35_info$x,tip_35_info$y,tip_35_info$r,tip_35_info$s,tip_35_info$a))
tip_36_info <- ellipse_data[which(ellipse_data$taxon==tree$tip.label[36]),]
tip_36 <- data.frame(make_ellipse_coords(tip_36_info$x,tip_36_info$y,tip_36_info$r,tip_36_info$s,tip_36_info$a))
node_267_info <- node_data[which(node_data$node==267),]
node_267 <- data.frame(make_ellipse_coords(node_267_info$scenario_x,node_267_info$scenario_y,node_267_info$scenario_r,node_267_info$scenario_s,node_267_info$scenario_a))

xmin <- min(min(count_df$x),min(best_ancestor$x),min(best_left$x),min(best_right$x))
xmax <- max(max(count_df$x),max(best_ancestor$x),max(best_left$x),max(best_right$x))
ymin <- min(min(count_df$y),min(best_ancestor$y),min(best_left$y),min(best_right$y))
ymax <- max(max(count_df$y),max(best_ancestor$y),max(best_left$y),max(best_right$y))
lims_x <- c(xmin,xmax)
lims_y <- c(ymin,ymax)

plot_ancestor <- ggplot(australia_shape) +
lims(x=lims_x,y=lims_y) +
geom_tile(data=count_df,aes_string(x="x",y="y",alpha="ancestor"),fill=color_4) +
scale_alpha_continuous(range=c(0,1)) +
labs(alpha="Probability") +
geom_sf(fill=NA,color=lines_color,lwd=1) +
geom_polygon(data=best_ancestor,aes(x=x,y=y),fill=NA,color=lines_color,lwd=1) +
ggtitle(label=paste0("Ancestor\n(",node,")")) +
theme_void() +
theme(plot.background = element_rect(fill=background_color,color=NA),
      panel.background = element_rect(fill=background_color,color=NA),
      legend.position="none",
      plot.title = element_text(color=lines_color,size=16,hjust=.5,vjust=1))

plot_left <- ggplot(australia_shape) +
lims(x=lims_x,y=lims_y) +
geom_tile(data=count_df,aes_string(x="x",y="y",alpha="left"),fill=color_1) +
scale_alpha_continuous(range=c(0,1)) +
labs(alpha="Probability") +
geom_sf(fill=NA,color=lines_color,lwd=1) +
geom_polygon(data=best_left,aes(x=x,y=y),fill=NA,color=lines_color,lwd=1) +
geom_polygon(data=tip_37,aes(x=x,y=y),fill=lines_color,color=lines_color,lty="11",alpha=.5) +
ggtitle(label=paste0("Left Daughter\n(Toward ",left_name,")")) +
theme_void() +
theme(plot.background = element_rect(fill=background_color,color=NA),
      panel.background = element_rect(fill=background_color,color=NA),
      legend.position="none",
      plot.title = element_text(color=lines_color,size=16,hjust=.5,vjust=1))

plot_right <- ggplot(australia_shape) +
lims(x=lims_x,y=lims_y) +
geom_tile(data=count_df,aes_string(x="x",y="y",alpha="right"),fill=color_2) +
scale_alpha_continuous(range=c(0,1)) +
labs(alpha="Probability") +
geom_sf(fill=NA,color=lines_color,lwd=1) +
geom_polygon(data=best_right,aes(x=x,y=y),fill=NA,color=lines_color,lwd=1) +
geom_polygon(data=node_267,aes(x=x,y=y),fill=lines_color,color=lines_color,lty="11",alpha=.5) +
ggtitle(label=paste0("Right Daughter\n(Toward ",right_name,")")) +
theme_void() +
theme(plot.background = element_rect(fill=background_color,color=NA),
      panel.background = element_rect(fill=background_color,color=NA),
      legend.position="none",
      plot.title = element_text(color=lines_color,size=16,hjust=.5,vjust=1))

node_posterior_plot <- plot_ancestor + plot_spacer() + plot_left + plot_spacer() + plot_right + plot_layout(ncol=5, widths=c(8,1,8,1,8), guides = "collect") & theme(plot.background=element_rect(fill=background_color,color=NA))

filename <- paste0(node_plot_directory,"expanded_",node,".png")
ggsave(filename,node_posterior_plot,dpi=600,width=7,height=4)
```

```{r node_266_show, eval=TRUE, results=TRUE}
include_graphics(paste0(node_plot_directory,"expanded_266.png"))
```

---

<!--
################################################
################################################
SKINK ARIDITY: RECONSTRUCTED VS RANDOM DAUGHTERS
################################################
################################################
-->

## Skink Aridity

### Aridity

For all nodes, comparing the difference in mean aridity between the daughters under the maximum posterior scenario to the mean difference in mean aridity across all possible scenarios for the same ancestors. No significant difference is observed overall or within any clade. This may be due to a lack of relationship, or a lack of statistical power.

```{r aridity_analysis, echo=TRUE}
# ARIDITY ANALYSES -- DO NOT RERUN
if (RERUN) {
  raster_data <- data.frame(read.csv(paste0(aridity_data_directory,"interpolated_raster.csv")))
  
  node_mp <- node_data_subset
  for (i in 1:nrow(node_mp)) {
    node_mp$c[i] <- c_val[node_mp$c[i] + 1]
    node_mp$h[i] <- h_val[node_mp$h[i] + 1]
  }
  
  print(node_mp)
  c_val <- seq(0,1.5,.5)
  h_val <- 2*pi*seq(0,7/8,1/8)
  
  scenario_options <- data.frame(matrix(data=NA,nrow=0,ncol=4))
  i <- 1
  for (m in c(0,1)) {
    for (c in c_val) {
      for (h in h_val) {
        row <- c(i,m,c,h)
        scenario_options <- rbind(scenario_options,row)
        i <- i + 1
      }
    }
  }
  colnames(scenario_options) <- c("index","m","c","h")
  
  get_daughter_polygon <- function(daughter,d,m,c,h,x,y,r,s,a) {
    new_x <- transform_node(char="x", daughter=daughter, d=d, m=m, c=c, h=h, x=x, y=y, r=r, s=s, a=a, alpha=-5, z=10)
    new_y <- transform_node(char="y", daughter=daughter, d=d, m=m, c=c, h=h, x=x, y=y, r=r, s=s, a=a, alpha=-5, z=10)
    new_a <- transform_node(char="a", daughter=daughter, d=d, m=m, c=c, h=h, x=x, y=y, r=r, s=s, a=a, alpha=-5, z=10)
    new_polygon <- data.frame(make_ellipse_coords(new_x,new_y,r,s,new_a))
    return(new_polygon)
  }
  
  get_ellipse_aridity <- function(polygon_points,time_raster) {
    points <- SpatialPoints(polygon_points)
    polygon <- Polygon(points)
    polygon <- Polygons(list(polygon),"ellipse")
    polygon <- SpatialPolygons(list(polygon))
    aridity <- extract(time_raster,polygon,fun=mean,na.rm=TRUE)
    aridity <- aridity[[1]]
    if (is.null(aridity)) {aridity <- NA}
    return(aridity)
  }
  
  get_aridity_difference <- function(m,c,h,x,y,r,s,a,time_raster) {
    right_polygon <- get_daughter_polygon("right",0,m,c,h,x,y,r,s,a)
    left_polygon <- get_daughter_polygon("left",0,m,c,h,x,y,r,s,a)
    right_aridity <- get_ellipse_aridity(right_polygon,time_raster)
    left_aridity <- get_ellipse_aridity(left_polygon,time_raster)
    diff <- abs(right_aridity-left_aridity)
    return(diff)
  }
  
  true_aridity <- c()
  mean_aridity <- c()
  num_rows <- nrow(node_mp)
  for (i in 1:num_rows) {
    cat("\r","Node: ", node_mp$node[i], " | ", round(as.numeric(i)/num_rows*100,0), "%    ")
    node_name <- paste0("X",node_mp$node[i])
    col <- which(colnames(raster_data)==node_name)
    time_raster_data <- data.frame(raster_data[,c(1,2,col)])
    colnames(time_raster_data) <- c("longitude", "latitude", "precip")
    coordinates(time_raster_data) <- ~ longitude + latitude
    gridded(time_raster_data) <- TRUE
    time_raster <- raster(time_raster_data)
    
    aridity_diff_true <- get_aridity_difference(node_mp$m[i],node_mp$c[i],node_mp$h[i],node_mp$x[i],node_mp$y[i],node_mp$r[i],node_mp$s[i],node_mp$a[i],time_raster)
    aridity_options <- c()
    for (j in 1:nrow(scenario_options)) {
      aridity_option <- get_aridity_difference(scenario_options$m[j],scenario_options$c[j],scenario_options$h[j],node_mp$x[i],node_mp$y[i],node_mp$r[i],node_mp$s[i],node_mp$a[i],time_raster)
      aridity_options <- c(aridity_options,aridity_option)
    }
    aridity_diff_mean <- mean(aridity_options,na.rm=TRUE)
    true_aridity <- c(true_aridity,aridity_diff_true)
    mean_aridity <- c(mean_aridity,aridity_diff_mean)
  }
  
  clades <- c(rep("excluded",3),rep("ctenotus",87),rep("lerista",79),rep("other",45))
  aridity_data <- data.frame(cbind(node_mp$node,true_aridity,mean_aridity,clades))
  colnames(aridity_data) <- c("node","reconstructed","mean","clade")
  aridity_data$reconstructed <- as.numeric(aridity_data$reconstructed)
  aridity_data$mean <- as.numeric(aridity_data$mean)
  write.table(aridity_data,file=paste0(skink_output_directory,"aridity_data.tsv"),quote=FALSE,sep="\t",row.names=FALSE)
}
```

```{r aridity_analysis_plots}
aridity_data <- read.csv(paste0(skink_output_directory,"aridity_data.tsv"),sep="\t",header=TRUE)
ctenotus_subset <- aridity_data[aridity_data$clade=="ctenotus",]
lerista_subset <- aridity_data[aridity_data$clade=="lerista",]
other_subset <- aridity_data[aridity_data$clade=="other",]

all_test <- wilcox.test(as.numeric(aridity_data$reconstructed),as.numeric(aridity_data$mean),paired=TRUE)$p.value
ctenotus_test <- wilcox.test(as.numeric(ctenotus_subset$reconstructed),as.numeric(ctenotus_subset$mean),paired=TRUE)$p.value
lerista_test <- wilcox.test(as.numeric(lerista_subset$reconstructed),as.numeric(lerista_subset$mean),paired=TRUE)$p.value
other_test <- wilcox.test(as.numeric(other_subset$reconstructed),as.numeric(other_subset$mean),paired=TRUE)$p.value

xlims <- c(0,2)
ylims <- c(0,6)
loc1 <- 4
loc2 <- 5
loc3 <- 6

combined_aridity <- ggplot(data=aridity_data) +
  geom_density(aes(reconstructed),color=color_1,bounds=c(0,Inf)) +
  geom_density(aes(mean),color=color_2,bounds=c(0,Inf)) +
  lims(x=xlims,y=ylims) +
  labs(x="Aridity Difference (mm/year)", y="Density", title="Combined (all clades)") +
  geom_vline(xintercept=mean(ctenotus_subset$reconstructed,na.rm=TRUE),color=color_1,lty="dashed") +
  geom_vline(xintercept=mean(ctenotus_subset$mean,na.rm=TRUE),color=color_2,lty="dashed") +
  geom_text(label="Reconstructed Daughters",aes(x=2,y=loc2),hjust="inward",vjust="inward",color=color_1,size=6) +
  geom_text(label="Mean of Possible Daughters",aes(x=2,y=loc3),hjust="inward",vjust="inward",color=color_2,size=6) +
  geom_text(label=paste("P-Value:",round(all_test,3)),aes(x=2,y=loc1),hjust="inward",vjust="inward",color=lines_color,size=6) +
  theme(panel.background = element_rect(fill=background_color,color=lines_color),
        plot.background = element_rect(fill=background_color,color=background_color),
        plot.title = element_text(color=lines_color,hjust=.5,size=24),
        axis.title = element_text(color=lines_color,size=16),
        axis.text = element_text(color=lines_color),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major = element_line(color=shape_color),
        aspect.ratio = 1/2)
ctenotus_aridity <- ggplot(data=ctenotus_subset) +
  geom_density(aes(reconstructed),color=color_1,bounds=c(0,Inf)) +
  geom_density(aes(mean),color=color_2,bounds=c(0,Inf)) +
  lims(x=xlims,y=ylims) +
  labs(x="Aridity Difference (mm/year)", y="Density", title="Ctenotus") +
  geom_vline(xintercept=mean(ctenotus_subset$reconstructed,na.rm=TRUE),color=color_1,lty="dashed") +
  geom_vline(xintercept=mean(ctenotus_subset$mean,na.rm=TRUE),color=color_2,lty="dashed") +
  geom_text(label="Reconstructed Daughters",aes(x=2,y=loc2),hjust="inward",vjust="inward",color=color_1,size=6) +
  geom_text(label="Mean of Possible Daughters",aes(x=2,y=loc3),hjust="inward",vjust="inward",color=color_2,size=6) +
  geom_text(label=paste("P-Value:",round(ctenotus_test,3)),aes(x=2,y=loc1),hjust="inward",vjust="inward",color=lines_color,size=6) +
  theme(panel.background = element_rect(fill=background_color,color=lines_color),
        plot.background = element_rect(fill=background_color,color=background_color),
        plot.title = element_text(color=lines_color,hjust=.5,size=24),
        axis.title = element_text(color=lines_color,size=16),
        axis.text = element_text(color=lines_color),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major = element_line(color=shape_color),
        aspect.ratio = 1/2)
lerista_aridity <- ggplot(data=lerista_subset) +
  geom_density(aes(reconstructed),color=color_1,bounds=c(0,Inf)) +
  geom_density(aes(mean),color=color_2,bounds=c(0,Inf)) +
  lims(x=xlims,y=ylims) +
  labs(x="Aridity Difference (mm/year)", y="Density", title="Lerista") +
  geom_vline(xintercept=mean(lerista_subset$reconstructed,na.rm=TRUE),color=color_1,lty="dashed") +
  geom_vline(xintercept=mean(lerista_subset$mean,na.rm=TRUE),color=color_2,lty="dashed") +
  geom_text(label="Reconstructed Daughters",aes(x=2,y=loc2),hjust="inward",vjust="inward",color=color_1,size=6) +
  geom_text(label="Mean of Possible Daughters",aes(x=2,y=loc3),hjust="inward",vjust="inward",color=color_2,size=6) +
  geom_text(label=paste("P-Value:",round(lerista_test,3)),aes(x=2,y=loc1),hjust="inward",vjust="inward",color=lines_color,size=6) +
  theme(panel.background = element_rect(fill=background_color,color=lines_color),
        plot.background = element_rect(fill=background_color,color=background_color),
        plot.title = element_text(color=lines_color,hjust=.5,size=24),
        axis.title = element_text(color=lines_color,size=16),
        axis.text = element_text(color=lines_color),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major = element_line(color=shape_color),
        aspect.ratio = 1/2)
other_aridity <- ggplot(data=other_subset) +
  geom_density(aes(reconstructed),color=color_1,bounds=c(0,Inf)) +
  geom_density(aes(mean),color=color_2,bounds=c(0,Inf)) +
  lims(x=xlims,y=ylims) +
  labs(x="Aridity Difference (mm/year)", y="Density", title="Third Clade") +
  geom_vline(xintercept=mean(other_subset$reconstructed,na.rm=TRUE),color=color_1,lty="dashed") +
  geom_vline(xintercept=mean(other_subset$mean,na.rm=TRUE),color=color_2,lty="dashed") +
  geom_text(label="Reconstructed Daughters",aes(x=2,y=loc2),hjust="inward",vjust="inward",color=color_1,size=6) +
  geom_text(label="Mean of Possible Daughters",aes(x=2,y=loc3),hjust="inward",vjust="inward",color=color_2,size=6) +
  geom_text(label=paste("P-Value:",round(other_test,3)),aes(x=2,y=loc1),hjust="inward",vjust="inward",color=lines_color,size=6) +
  theme(panel.background = element_rect(fill=background_color,color=lines_color),
        plot.background = element_rect(fill=background_color,color=background_color),
        plot.title = element_text(color=lines_color,hjust=.5,size=24),
        axis.title = element_text(color=lines_color,size=16),
        axis.text = element_text(color=lines_color),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major = element_line(color=shape_color),
        aspect.ratio = 1/2)
total_plot <- combined_aridity + ctenotus_aridity + lerista_aridity + other_aridity + plot_layout(ncol=4) & theme(plot.background=element_rect(fill=background_color,color=background_color))
filename <- paste0(aridity_plot_directory,"daughter_aridity.png")
ggsave(filename,total_plot,dpi=600,width=21,height=4)
```

For sister pairs only, comparing the difference in mean aridity between the daughters under the maximum posterior scenario to the mean difference in mean aridity across all possible scenarios for the same ancestors. No significant difference is observed overall or within any clade. This may be due to a lack of relationship, or a lack of statistical power.

For all nodes, comparing the difference in centroid aridity between the daughters under the maximum posterior scenario to the mean difference in centroid aridity across all possible scenarios for the same ancestors.
```{r aridity_centroid, echo=TRUE}
# ARIDITY ANALYSES -- DO NOT RERUN
node_data <- read.csv(paste0(skink_output_directory,"node_reconstructions.csv"),header=TRUE)
node_data_subset <- node_data[,c("node","scenario_d","scenario_m","scenario_c","scenario_h","scenario_r","scenario_s","scenario_a","scenario_x","scenario_y")]
colnames(node_data_subset) <- c("node","d","m","c","h","r","s","a","x","y")

if (RERUN) {
  raster_data <- data.frame(read.csv(paste0(aridity_data_directory,"interpolated_raster.csv")))
  
  node_mp <- node_data_subset
  c_val <- seq(0,1.5,.5)
  h_val <- 2*pi*seq(0,7/8,1/8)
  for (i in 1:nrow(node_mp)) {
    node_mp$c[i] <- c_val[node_mp$c[i] + 1]
    node_mp$h[i] <- h_val[node_mp$h[i] + 1]
  }
  print(node_mp)
  
  scenario_options <- data.frame(matrix(data=NA,nrow=0,ncol=4))
  i <- 1
  for (m in c(0,1)) {
    for (c in c_val) {
      for (h in h_val) {
        row <- c(i,m,c,h)
        scenario_options <- rbind(scenario_options,row)
        i <- i + 1
      }
    }
  }
  colnames(scenario_options) <- c("index","m","c","h")
  
  get_daughter_location <- function(daughter,d,m,c,h,x,y,r,s,a) {
    new_x <- transform_node(char="x", daughter=daughter, d=d, m=m, c=c, h=h, x=x, y=y, r=r, s=s, a=a, alpha=-5, z=10)
    new_y <- transform_node(char="y", daughter=daughter, d=d, m=m, c=c, h=h, x=x, y=y, r=r, s=s, a=a, alpha=-5, z=10)
    return(list(x=new_x,y=new_y))
  }
  
  get_point_aridity <- function(location,time_raster) {
    point <- SpatialPoints(location)
    aridity <- extract(time_raster,point)
    aridity <- aridity[[1]]
    if (is.null(aridity)) {aridity <- NA}
    return(aridity)
  }
  
  get_aridity_difference <- function(m,c,h,x,y,r,s,a,time_raster) {
    right_location <- get_daughter_location("right",0,m,c,h,x,y,r,s,a)
    left_location <- get_daughter_location("left",0,m,c,h,x,y,r,s,a)
    right_aridity <- get_point_aridity(right_location,time_raster)
    left_aridity <- get_point_aridity(left_location,time_raster)
    diff <- abs(right_aridity-left_aridity)
    return(diff)
  }
  
  true_aridity <- c()
  mean_aridity <- c()
  num_rows <- nrow(node_mp)
  for (i in 1:num_rows) {
    cat("\r","Node: ", node_mp$node[i], " | ", round(as.numeric(i)/num_rows*100,0), "%    ")
    node_name <- paste0("X",node_mp$node[i])
    col <- which(colnames(raster_data)==node_name)
    time_raster_data <- data.frame(raster_data[,c(1,2,col)])
    colnames(time_raster_data) <- c("longitude", "latitude", "precip")
    coordinates(time_raster_data) <- ~ longitude + latitude
    gridded(time_raster_data) <- TRUE
    time_raster <- raster(time_raster_data)
    
    aridity_diff_true <- get_aridity_difference(node_mp$m[i],node_mp$c[i],node_mp$h[i],node_mp$x[i],node_mp$y[i],node_mp$r[i],node_mp$s[i],node_mp$a[i],time_raster)
    aridity_options <- c()
    for (j in 1:nrow(scenario_options)) {
      aridity_option <- get_aridity_difference(scenario_options$m[j],scenario_options$c[j],scenario_options$h[j],node_mp$x[i],node_mp$y[i],node_mp$r[i],node_mp$s[i],node_mp$a[i],time_raster)
      aridity_options <- c(aridity_options,aridity_option)
    }
    aridity_diff_mean <- mean(aridity_options,na.rm=TRUE)
    true_aridity <- c(true_aridity,aridity_diff_true)
    mean_aridity <- c(mean_aridity,aridity_diff_mean)
  }
  
  clades <- c(rep("excluded",3),rep("ctenotus",87),rep("lerista",79),rep("other",45))
  aridity_data <- data.frame(cbind(node_mp$node,true_aridity,mean_aridity,clades))
  colnames(aridity_data) <- c("node","reconstructed","mean","clade")
  aridity_data$reconstructed <- as.numeric(aridity_data$reconstructed)
  aridity_data$mean <- as.numeric(aridity_data$mean)
  write.table(aridity_data,file=paste0(skink_output_directory,"aridity_cenroid_data.tsv"),quote=FALSE,sep="\t",row.names=FALSE)
}
```

```{r aridity_centroid_plots}
#aridity_data <- read.csv(paste0(skink_output_directory,"aridity_centroid_data.tsv"),sep="\t",header=TRUE)
ctenotus_subset <- aridity_data[aridity_data$clade=="ctenotus",]
lerista_subset <- aridity_data[aridity_data$clade=="lerista",]
other_subset <- aridity_data[aridity_data$clade=="other",]

all_test <- wilcox.test(as.numeric(aridity_data$reconstructed),as.numeric(aridity_data$mean),paired=TRUE)$p.value
ctenotus_test <- wilcox.test(as.numeric(ctenotus_subset$reconstructed),as.numeric(ctenotus_subset$mean),paired=TRUE)$p.value
lerista_test <- wilcox.test(as.numeric(lerista_subset$reconstructed),as.numeric(lerista_subset$mean),paired=TRUE)$p.value
other_test <- wilcox.test(as.numeric(other_subset$reconstructed),as.numeric(other_subset$mean),paired=TRUE)$p.value

xlims <- c(0,2)
ylims <- c(0,6)
loc1 <- 4
loc2 <- 5
loc3 <- 6

combined_aridity <- ggplot(data=aridity_data) +
  geom_density(aes(reconstructed),color=color_1,bounds=c(0,Inf)) +
  geom_density(aes(mean),color=color_2,bounds=c(0,Inf)) +
  lims(x=xlims,y=ylims) +
  labs(x="Aridity Difference (mm/year)", y="Density", title="Combined (all clades)") +
  geom_vline(xintercept=mean(ctenotus_subset$reconstructed,na.rm=TRUE),color=color_1,lty="dashed") +
  geom_vline(xintercept=mean(ctenotus_subset$mean,na.rm=TRUE),color=color_2,lty="dashed") +
  geom_text(label="Reconstructed Daughters",aes(x=2,y=loc2),hjust="inward",vjust="inward",color=color_1,size=6) +
  geom_text(label="Mean of Possible Daughters",aes(x=2,y=loc3),hjust="inward",vjust="inward",color=color_2,size=6) +
  geom_text(label=paste("P-Value:",round(all_test,3)),aes(x=2,y=loc1),hjust="inward",vjust="inward",color=lines_color,size=6) +
  theme(panel.background = element_rect(fill=background_color,color=lines_color),
        plot.background = element_rect(fill=background_color,color=background_color),
        plot.title = element_text(color=lines_color,hjust=.5,size=24),
        axis.title = element_text(color=lines_color,size=16),
        axis.text = element_text(color=lines_color),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major = element_line(color=shape_color),
        aspect.ratio = 1/2)
ctenotus_aridity <- ggplot(data=ctenotus_subset) +
  geom_density(aes(reconstructed),color=color_1,bounds=c(0,Inf)) +
  geom_density(aes(mean),color=color_2,bounds=c(0,Inf)) +
  lims(x=xlims,y=ylims) +
  labs(x="Aridity Difference (mm/year)", y="Density", title="Ctenotus") +
  geom_vline(xintercept=mean(ctenotus_subset$reconstructed,na.rm=TRUE),color=color_1,lty="dashed") +
  geom_vline(xintercept=mean(ctenotus_subset$mean,na.rm=TRUE),color=color_2,lty="dashed") +
  geom_text(label="Reconstructed Daughters",aes(x=2,y=loc2),hjust="inward",vjust="inward",color=color_1,size=6) +
  geom_text(label="Mean of Possible Daughters",aes(x=2,y=loc3),hjust="inward",vjust="inward",color=color_2,size=6) +
  geom_text(label=paste("P-Value:",round(ctenotus_test,3)),aes(x=2,y=loc1),hjust="inward",vjust="inward",color=lines_color,size=6) +
  theme(panel.background = element_rect(fill=background_color,color=lines_color),
        plot.background = element_rect(fill=background_color,color=background_color),
        plot.title = element_text(color=lines_color,hjust=.5,size=24),
        axis.title = element_text(color=lines_color,size=16),
        axis.text = element_text(color=lines_color),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major = element_line(color=shape_color),
        aspect.ratio = 1/2)
lerista_aridity <- ggplot(data=lerista_subset) +
  geom_density(aes(reconstructed),color=color_1,bounds=c(0,Inf)) +
  geom_density(aes(mean),color=color_2,bounds=c(0,Inf)) +

total_plot <- combined_aridity + ctenotus_aridity + lerista_aridity + other_aridity + plot_layout(ncol=4) & theme(plot.background=element_rect(fill=background_color,color=background_color))
```
