```{r aridity_centroid_show, eval=TRUE, results=TRUE}
include_graphics(paste0(aridity_plot_directory,"daughter_aridity_centroid.png"))
```

For all nodes, modeling the number of speciation events per grid cell as a function of the change in aridity and distance to nearest continental edge. This is done with the *spind* package, which uses wavelet-revised methods to account for spatial autocorrelation in the predictor variables (scaled distance to nearest edge & change in precipitation mm/day/MY) and the response variable (log speciation event count). Using reconstructed centroids, a distance-only model is preferred.

```{r aridity_speciation, echo=TRUE}
node_data <- read.csv(paste0(skink_output_directory,"node_reconstructions.csv"),header=TRUE)
node_locations_df <- node_data[,c("scenario_x","scenario_y")]

branching_times <- branching.times(tree)
sorted_branching_times <- sort(branching_times)
node_indices <- names(sorted_branching_times)
node_times <- unname(unlist(sorted_branching_times))
young_nodes <- node_indices[which(node_times < 20)]
old_nodes <- node_indices[which(node_times > 20)]

young_indices <- which(node_data$node %in% young_nodes)
old_indices <- which(node_data$node %in% old_nodes)

node_locations_young_df <- node_locations_df[young_indices,]
node_locations_old_df <- node_locations_df[old_indices,]

raster_csv <- read.csv(paste0(aridity_data_directory,"interpolated_raster.csv"))[,c("x","y","delta1","delta2")]
raster_df <- data.frame(raster_csv)
coordinates(raster_df) <- ~ x + y
gridded(raster_df) <- TRUE

raster_with_coords <- raster_df
crs(raster_with_coords)=crs(australia_shape)
australia_line <- st_cast(australia_shape,"LINESTRING")
dists <- scale(as.numeric(st_distance(st_as_sf(raster_with_coords),australia_line)))
raster_df$dists <- dists

raster_data <- stack(raster_df)
raster_data <- disaggregate(raster_data,c(2,1),method="bilinear")
nodes_young <- rasterize(node_locations_young_df,raster_data,fun="count")
nodes_old <- rasterize(node_locations_old_df,raster_data,fun="count")
names(nodes_young) <- "nodes_young"
names(nodes_old) <- "nodes_old"

raster_node_data_1 <- addLayer(raster_data,nodes_young)
raster_node_data <- addLayer(raster_node_data_1,nodes_old)

node_count_df <- as.data.frame(raster_node_data,xy=TRUE)
node_count_df <- node_count_df[!is.na(node_count_df$delta1),]
node_count_df <- node_count_df[!is.na(node_count_df$delta2),]
node_count_df$nodes_young[is.na(node_count_df$nodes_young)] <- 1
node_count_df$nodes_old[is.na(node_count_df$nodes_old)] <- 1
node_count_df$nodes_young <- log(node_count_df$nodes_young)
node_count_df$nodes_old <- log(node_count_df$nodes_old)

node_count_df_scaled <- node_count_df
min_x <- min(node_count_df_scaled$x)
min_y <- min(node_count_df_scaled$y)
node_count_df_scaled$x <- (node_count_df$x-min_x) / res(raster_node_data)[1]
node_count_df_scaled$y <- (node_count_df$y-min_y) / res(raster_node_data)[2]

# EXAMINING THE SHAPE OF THE DATA
#mean(node_count_df_scaled$nodes_young)
#var(node_count_df_scaled$nodes_young)
#cor(node_count_df_scaled$delta1,node_count_df_scaled$dists)
#hist(node_count_df_scaled$nodes_young,nclass=50)

# MODEL OPTIONS
M_none <- WRM(nodes_young ~ 1, family = "poisson", data = node_count_df_scaled, coord = node_count_df_scaled[,c("x","y")], level = 1)
M_precip <- WRM(nodes_young ~ delta1 + 1, family = "poisson", data = node_count_df_scaled, coord = node_count_df_scaled[,c("x","y")], level = 1)
M_dists <- WRM(nodes_young ~ dists + 1, family = "poisson", data = node_count_df_scaled, coord = node_count_df_scaled[,c("x","y")], level = 1)
M_both <- WRM(nodes_young ~ delta1 + dists + 1, family = "poisson", data = node_count_df_scaled, coord = node_count_df_scaled[,c("x","y")], level = 1)

M_none_AIC <- M_none$AIC
M_precip_AIC <- M_precip$AIC
M_dists_AIC <- M_dists$AIC
M_both_AIC <- M_both$AIC
AIC_list <- c(M_none_AIC,M_precip_AIC,M_dists_AIC,M_both_AIC)
best <- which(AIC_list==min(AIC_list))
best_model <- c("Neither","Precipitation","Distance","Both")[best]

model_text <- paste0("Neither: ",round(M_none_AIC,2)," AIC\n",
                     "Precipitation: ",round(M_precip_AIC,2)," AIC\n",
                     "Distance: ",round(M_dists_AIC,2)," AIC\n",
                     "Both: ",round(M_both_AIC,2)," AIC")

# DELTA1 IS YOUNG, DELTA2 IS OLD
mwrm_young <- WRM(nodes_young ~ delta1 + dists, family = "poisson", data = node_count_df_scaled, coord = node_count_df_scaled[,c("x","y")], level = 1)
mwrm_old   <- WRM(nodes_old   ~ delta2 + dists, family = "poisson", data = node_count_df_scaled, coord = node_count_df_scaled[,c("x","y")], level = 1)

young_int <- round(mwrm_young$b[[1]],4)
young_slope <- round(mwrm_young$b[[2]],4)
young_dist <- round(mwrm_young$b[[3]],4)
young_int_p <- round(mwrm_young$p[[1]],4)
young_slope_p <- round(mwrm_young$p[[2]],4)
young_dist_p <- round(mwrm_young$p[[3]],4)

old_int <- round(mwrm_old$b[[1]],4)
old_slope <- round(mwrm_old$b[[2]],4)
old_dist <- round(mwrm_old$b[[3]],4)
old_int_p <- round(mwrm_old$p[[1]],4)
old_slope_p <- round(mwrm_old$p[[2]],4)
old_dist_p <- round(mwrm_old$p[[3]],4)
```

```{r aridity_speciation_plots}
plot_raster <- function(raster_data,column,name,equation) {
  xmin <- min(raster_data$x)
  xmax <- max(raster_data$x)
  ymin <- min(raster_data$y)
  ymax <- max(raster_data$y)
  lims_x <- c(xmin-.1*(xmax-xmin),xmax+.1*(xmax-xmin))
  lims_y <- c(ymin-.2*(ymax-ymin),ymax+.1*(ymax-ymin))
  plot <- ggplot(australia_shape) +
    lims(x=lims_x,y=lims_y) +
    geom_tile(data=raster_data,aes_string(x="x",y="y",fill=column)) +
    scale_fill_continuous(limits=c(0,max(node_count_df$nodes_young)),type="viridis") +
    labs(fill=bquote(atop("Log Speciation","Event Count"))) +
    geom_sf(fill=NA,color=lines_color) +
    ggtitle(label=name) +
    #annotate(geom="text",label=name,color=lines_color,size=8,x=min(raster_data$x),y=max(raster_data$y),hjust=0,vjust=.5) +
    annotate(geom="text",label=equation,color=lines_color,size=4,x=min(raster_data$x),y=min(raster_data$y),hjust=0,vjust=.8) +
    theme_void() +
    theme(panel.background = element_rect(fill=background_color,color=NA),
          legend.position=c(.985,.98),
          legend.justification = c("right","top"),
          legend.title = element_text(color=lines_color,size=12),
          legend.text = element_text(color=lines_color,size=16),
          legend.box.background = element_rect(fill=background_color, color=lines_color),
          legend.margin = margin(1,1,1,1),
          legend.spacing.y = unit(.5,"cm"),
          legend.key.width = unit(2,'cm'),
          legend.key.height = unit(1.5,'cm'),
          plot.title = element_text(color=lines_color,size=40,hjust=.5))
return(plot)
}

plot_deltas <- function(raster_data,column) {
  xmin <- min(raster_data$x)
  xmax <- max(raster_data$x)
  ymin <- min(raster_data$y)
  ymax <- max(raster_data$y)
  lims_x <- c(xmin-.1*(xmax-xmin),xmax+.1*(xmax-xmin))
  lims_y <- c(ymin-.1*(ymax-ymin),ymax+.1*(ymax-ymin))
  plot <- ggplot(australia_shape) +
    lims(x=lims_x,y=lims_y) +
    geom_tile(data=raster_data,aes_string(x="x",y="y",fill=column)) +
    scale_fill_gradientn(colors=c("red","white","blue"),limits=c(-.4,.4),values=c(0,.5,1)) +
    labs(fill=bquote(atop(Delta ~ "Precipitation","(mm/day per MY)"))) +
    geom_sf(fill=NA,color=lines_color) +
    theme_void() +
    theme(panel.background = element_rect(fill=background_color,color=NA),
          legend.position=c(.985,.98),
          legend.justification = c("right","top"),
          legend.title = element_text(color=lines_color,size=12),
          legend.text = element_text(color=lines_color,size=16),
          legend.box.background = element_rect(fill=background_color, color=lines_color),
          legend.margin = margin(t=1,b=1,l=1,r=4),
          legend.spacing.y = unit(.5,"cm"),
          legend.key.width = unit(2,'cm'),
          legend.key.height = unit(1.5,'cm'))
return(plot)
}

young_int_p_text <- if (young_int_p >= 0.001) {paste0(" (p = ",young_int_p,")")} else {" (p < .001)"}
old_int_p_text <- if (old_int_p >= 0.001) {paste0(" (p = ",old_int_p,")")} else {" (p < .001)"}
young_slope_p_text <- if (young_slope_p >= 0.001) {paste0(" (p = ",young_slope_p,")")} else {" (p < .001)"}
old_slope_p_text <- if (old_slope_p >= 0.001) {paste0(" (p = ",old_slope_p,")")} else {" (p < .001)"}
young_dist_p_text <- if (young_dist_p >= 0.001) {paste0(" (p = ",young_dist_p,")")} else {" (p < .001)"}
old_dist_p_text <- if (old_dist_p >= 0.001) {paste0(" (p = ",old_dist_p,")")} else {" (p < .001)"}

eqn2 <- paste0("")
eqn1 <- model_text

young_plot <- plot_raster(node_count_df,"nodes_young","20-0 Ma",eqn1)
old_plot <- plot_raster(node_count_df,"nodes_old","40-20 Ma",eqn2)
delta1_plot <- plot_deltas(node_count_df,"delta1")
delta2_plot <- plot_deltas(node_count_df,"delta2")

aridity_plot <- old_plot + young_plot + delta2_plot + delta1_plot + plot_layout(guides = "collect") & theme(plot.background=element_rect(fill=background_color,color=NA))

ggsave(paste0(aridity_plot_directory,"aridity_speciation.png"),aridity_plot,dpi=600,width=12,height=9)
```

```{r aridity_speciation_show, eval=TRUE, results=TRUE}
include_graphics(paste0(aridity_plot_directory,"aridity_speciation.png"))
```

This is where we get something cool! When we account for the space occupied by the ellipses (one of the main benefits of the model), a model including aridification is preferred over a distance-only model.

```{r aridity_speciation_ellipses, echo=TRUE}
node_data <- read.csv(paste0(skink_output_directory,"node_reconstructions.csv"),header=TRUE)
polygons_data <- data.frame(matrix(data=NA,nrow=0,ncol=4))
for (i in 1:nrow(node_data)) {
  ellipse <- data.frame(make_ellipse_coords(node_data$scenario_x[i],node_data$scenario_y[i],node_data$scenario_r[i],node_data$scenario_s[i],node_data$scenario_a[i]))
  n_points <- nrow(ellipse)
  ellipse$node <- rep(node_data$node[i],n_points)
  ellipse$selection <- rep(node_data$true_selection[i],n_points)
  polygons_data <- rbind(polygons_data,ellipse)
}
polygon_shapes <- sf_multipolygon(polygons_data,x="x",y="y",polygon_id="node",multipolygon_id="node")

branching_times <- branching.times(tree)
sorted_branching_times <- sort(branching_times)
node_indices <- names(sorted_branching_times)
node_times <- unname(unlist(sorted_branching_times))
young_nodes <- node_indices[which(node_times < 20)]
old_nodes <- node_indices[which(node_times > 20)]

young_indices <- which(polygon_shapes$node %in% young_nodes)
old_indices <- which(polygon_shapes$node %in% old_nodes)

polygon_shapes_young <- as_Spatial(polygon_shapes[young_indices,])
polygon_shapes_old <- as_Spatial(polygon_shapes[old_indices,])

raster_csv <- read.csv(paste0(aridity_data_directory,"interpolated_raster.csv"))[,c("x","y","delta1","delta2")]
raster_df <- data.frame(raster_csv)
coordinates(raster_df) <- ~ x + y
gridded(raster_df) <- TRUE

raster_with_coords <- raster_df
crs(raster_with_coords)=crs(australia_shape)
australia_line <- st_cast(australia_shape,"LINESTRING")
dists <- scale(as.numeric(st_distance(st_as_sf(raster_with_coords),australia_line)))
raster_df$dists <- dists

raster_data <- stack(raster_df)
raster_data <- disaggregate(raster_data,c(2,1),method="bilinear")
nodes_young <- rasterize(polygon_shapes_young,raster_data,"node",fun="count")
nodes_old <- rasterize(polygon_shapes_old,raster_data,"node",fun="count")
names(nodes_young) <- "nodes_young"
names(nodes_old) <- "nodes_old"

raster_node_data_1 <- addLayer(raster_data,nodes_young)
raster_node_data <- addLayer(raster_node_data_1,nodes_old)

node_count_df <- as.data.frame(raster_node_data,xy=TRUE)
node_count_df <- node_count_df[!is.na(node_count_df$delta1),]
node_count_df <- node_count_df[!is.na(node_count_df$delta2),]

node_count_df$nodes_young[is.na(node_count_df$nodes_young)] <- 1
node_count_df$nodes_old[is.na(node_count_df$nodes_old)] <- 1
node_count_df$nodes_young <- log(node_count_df$nodes_young)
node_count_df$nodes_old <- log(node_count_df$nodes_old)

node_count_df_scaled <- node_count_df
min_x <- min(node_count_df_scaled$x)
min_y <- min(node_count_df_scaled$y)
node_count_df_scaled$x <- (node_count_df$x-min_x) / res(raster_node_data)[1]
node_count_df_scaled$y <- (node_count_df$y-min_y) / res(raster_node_data)[2]

# EXAMINING THE SHAPE OF THE DATA
#mean(node_count_df_scaled$nodes_young)
#var(node_count_df_scaled$nodes_young)
#cor(node_count_df_scaled$delta1,node_count_df_scaled$dists)
#hist(node_count_df_scaled$nodes_young,nclass=50)

# MODEL OPTIONS
M_none <- WRM(nodes_young ~ 1, family = "poisson", data = node_count_df_scaled, coord = node_count_df_scaled[,c("x","y")], level = 1)
M_precip <- WRM(nodes_young ~ delta1 + 1, family = "poisson", data = node_count_df_scaled, coord = node_count_df_scaled[,c("x","y")], level = 1)
M_dists <- WRM(nodes_young ~ dists + 1, family = "poisson", data = node_count_df_scaled, coord = node_count_df_scaled[,c("x","y")], level = 1)
M_both <- WRM(nodes_young ~ delta1 + dists + 1, family = "poisson", data = node_count_df_scaled, coord = node_count_df_scaled[,c("x","y")], level = 1)

M_none_AIC <- M_none$AIC
M_precip_AIC <- M_precip$AIC
M_dists_AIC <- M_dists$AIC
M_both_AIC <- M_both$AIC
AIC_list <- c(M_none_AIC,M_precip_AIC,M_dists_AIC,M_both_AIC)
best <- which(AIC_list==min(AIC_list))
best_model <- c("Neither","Precipitation","Distance","Both")[best]

model_text <- paste0("Neither: ",round(M_none_AIC,2)," AIC\n",
                     "Precipitation: ",round(M_precip_AIC,2)," AIC\n",
                     "Distance: ",round(M_dists_AIC,2)," AIC\n",
                     "Both: ",round(M_both_AIC,2)," AIC")

#summary(M_both)
#plot(M_both)
#hist(M_both$resid,nclass=20)
#M_dists_AIC - M_both_AIC
```

```{r aridity_speciation_ellipses_plots}
plot_raster <- function(raster_data,column,name,equation) {
  xmin <- min(raster_data$x)
  xmax <- max(raster_data$x)
  ymin <- min(raster_data$y)
  ymax <- max(raster_data$y)
  lims_x <- c(xmin-.1*(xmax-xmin),xmax+.1*(xmax-xmin))
  lims_y <- c(ymin-.2*(ymax-ymin),ymax+.1*(ymax-ymin))
  plot <- ggplot(australia_shape) +
    lims(x=lims_x,y=lims_y) +
    geom_tile(data=raster_data,aes_string(x="x",y="y",fill=column)) +
    scale_fill_continuous(limits=c(0,max(node_count_df$nodes_young)),type="viridis") +
    labs(fill=bquote(atop("Log Speciation","Event Count"))) +
    geom_sf(fill=NA,color=lines_color) +
    ggtitle(label=name) +
    #annotate(geom="text",label=name,color=lines_color,size=8,x=min(raster_data$x),y=max(raster_data$y),hjust=0,vjust=.5) +
    annotate(geom="text",label=equation,color=lines_color,size=4,x=min(raster_data$x),y=min(raster_data$y),hjust=0,vjust=.8) +
    theme_void() +
    theme(panel.background = element_rect(fill=background_color,color=NA),
          legend.position=c(.985,.98),
          legend.justification = c("right","top"),
          legend.title = element_text(color=lines_color,size=12),
          legend.text = element_text(color=lines_color,size=16),
          legend.box.background = element_rect(fill=background_color, color=lines_color),
          legend.margin = margin(1,1,1,1),
          legend.spacing.y = unit(.5,"cm"),
          legend.key.width = unit(2,'cm'),
          legend.key.height = unit(1.5,'cm'),
          plot.title = element_text(color=lines_color,size=40,hjust=.5))
return(plot)
}

plot_deltas <- function(raster_data,column) {
  xmin <- min(raster_data$x)
  xmax <- max(raster_data$x)
  ymin <- min(raster_data$y)
  ymax <- max(raster_data$y)
  lims_x <- c(xmin-.1*(xmax-xmin),xmax+.1*(xmax-xmin))
  lims_y <- c(ymin-.1*(ymax-ymin),ymax+.1*(ymax-ymin))
  plot <- ggplot(australia_shape) +
    lims(x=lims_x,y=lims_y) +
    geom_tile(data=raster_data,aes_string(x="x",y="y",fill=column)) +
    scale_fill_gradientn(colors=c("red","white","blue"),limits=c(-.4,.4),values=c(0,.5,1)) +
    labs(fill=bquote(atop(Delta ~ "Precipitation","(mm/day per MY)"))) +
    geom_sf(fill=NA,color=lines_color) +
    theme_void() +
    theme(panel.background = element_rect(fill=background_color,color=NA),
          legend.position=c(.985,.98),
          legend.justification = c("right","top"),
          legend.title = element_text(color=lines_color,size=12),
          legend.text = element_text(color=lines_color,size=16),
          legend.box.background = element_rect(fill=background_color, color=lines_color),
          legend.margin = margin(t=1,b=1,l=1,r=4),
          legend.spacing.y = unit(.5,"cm"),
          legend.key.width = unit(2,'cm'),
          legend.key.height = unit(1.5,'cm'))
return(plot)
}

young_int_p_text <- if (young_int_p >= 0.001) {paste0(" (p = ",young_int_p,")")} else {" (p < .001)"}
old_int_p_text <- if (old_int_p >= 0.001) {paste0(" (p = ",old_int_p,")")} else {" (p < .001)"}
young_slope_p_text <- if (young_slope_p >= 0.001) {paste0(" (p = ",young_slope_p,")")} else {" (p < .001)"}
old_slope_p_text <- if (old_slope_p >= 0.001) {paste0(" (p = ",old_slope_p,")")} else {" (p < .001)"}
young_dist_p_text <- if (young_dist_p >= 0.001) {paste0(" (p = ",young_dist_p,")")} else {" (p < .001)"}
old_dist_p_text <- if (old_dist_p >= 0.001) {paste0(" (p = ",old_dist_p,")")} else {" (p < .001)"}

eqn2 <- paste0("")
eqn1 <- model_text

young_plot <- plot_raster(node_count_df,"nodes_young","20-0 Ma",eqn1)
old_plot <- plot_raster(node_count_df,"nodes_old","40-20 Ma",eqn2)
delta1_plot <- plot_deltas(node_count_df,"delta1")
delta2_plot <- plot_deltas(node_count_df,"delta2")

aridity_plot <- old_plot + young_plot + delta2_plot + delta1_plot + plot_layout(guides = "collect") & theme(plot.background=element_rect(fill=background_color,color=NA))

ggsave(paste0(aridity_plot_directory,"aridity_speciation_ellipses.png"),aridity_plot,dpi=600,width=12,height=9)
```

```{r aridity_speciation_ellipses_show, eval=TRUE, results=TRUE}
include_graphics(paste0(aridity_plot_directory,"aridity_speciation_ellipses.png"))
```

```{r aridity_manuscript}
set_plot_theme("manuscript4")

aridity_data <- read.csv(paste0(skink_output_directory,"aridity_data.tsv"),sep="\t",header=TRUE)
ctenotus_subset <- aridity_data[aridity_data$clade=="ctenotus",]
lerista_subset <- aridity_data[aridity_data$clade=="lerista",]
other_subset <- aridity_data[aridity_data$clade=="other",]

all_test <- wilcox.test(as.numeric(aridity_data$reconstructed),as.numeric(aridity_data$mean),paired=TRUE)$p.value
ctenotus_test <- wilcox.test(as.numeric(ctenotus_subset$reconstructed),as.numeric(ctenotus_subset$mean),paired=TRUE)$p.value
lerista_test <- wilcox.test(as.numeric(lerista_subset$reconstructed),as.numeric(lerista_subset$mean),paired=TRUE)$p.value
other_test <- wilcox.test(as.numeric(other_subset$reconstructed),as.numeric(other_subset$mean),paired=TRUE)$p.value

xlims <- c(0,2)
ylims <- c(0,3.2)
loc1 <- 2.2
loc2 <- 2.6
loc3 <- 3

combined_aridity <- ggplot(data=aridity_data) +
  geom_density(aes(mean),color=NA,fill=color_2,bounds=c(0,Inf)) +
  geom_vline(xintercept=mean(ctenotus_subset$mean,na.rm=TRUE),color=color_2,lty="11",lwd=1.5) +
  geom_density(aes(reconstructed),color=color_1,lwd=2,bounds=c(0,Inf)) +
  geom_vline(xintercept=mean(ctenotus_subset$reconstructed,na.rm=TRUE),color=color_1,lty="11",lwd=1.5) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits=ylims,expand=c(0,0)) +
  scale_x_continuous(limits=xlims,expand=c(0,0)) +
  labs(x="Aridity Difference (mm/year)", y="Density", title="Combined (all clades)") +
  geom_text(label="Reconstructed Daughters",aes(x=1.95,y=loc2),hjust="inward",vjust="inward",color=color_1,size=6) +
  geom_text(label="Mean of Possible Daughters",aes(x=1.95,y=loc3),hjust="inward",vjust="inward",color=color_2,size=6) +
  geom_text(label=paste("P-Value:",round(all_test,3)),aes(x=1.95,y=loc1),hjust="inward",vjust="inward",color=lines_color,size=6) +
  theme(panel.background = element_rect(fill=background_color,color=lines_color),
        plot.background = element_rect(fill=background_color,color=background_color),
        plot.title = element_text(color=lines_color,hjust=.5,size=24),
        axis.title = element_text(color=lines_color,size=24),
        axis.text = element_text(color=lines_color,size=14),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        aspect.ratio = 1/2)
ctenotus_aridity <- ggplot(data=ctenotus_subset) +
  geom_density(aes(mean),color=NA,fill=color_2,bounds=c(0,Inf)) +
  geom_vline(xintercept=mean(ctenotus_subset$mean,na.rm=TRUE),color=color_2,lty="11",lwd=1.5) +
  geom_density(aes(reconstructed),color=color_1,lwd=2,bounds=c(0,Inf)) +
  geom_vline(xintercept=mean(ctenotus_subset$reconstructed,na.rm=TRUE),color=color_1,lty="11",lwd=1.5) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits=ylims,expand=c(0,0)) +
  scale_x_continuous(limits=xlims,expand=c(0,0)) +
  labs(x="Aridity Difference (mm/year)", y=NULL, title="Ctenotus") +
  geom_text(label="Reconstructed Daughters",aes(x=1.95,y=loc2),hjust="inward",vjust="inward",color=color_1,size=6) +
  geom_text(label="Mean of Possible Daughters",aes(x=1.95,y=loc3),hjust="inward",vjust="inward",color=color_2,size=6) +
  geom_text(label=paste("P-Value:",round(ctenotus_test,3)),aes(x=1.95,y=loc1),hjust="inward",vjust="inward",color=lines_color,size=6) +
  theme(panel.background = element_rect(fill=background_color,color=lines_color),
        plot.background = element_rect(fill=background_color,color=background_color),
        plot.title = element_text(color=lines_color,hjust=.5,size=24),
        axis.title = element_text(color=lines_color,size=24),
        axis.text = element_text(color=lines_color,size=14),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        aspect.ratio = 1/2)
lerista_aridity <- ggplot(data=lerista_subset) +
  geom_density(aes(mean),color=NA,fill=color_2,bounds=c(0,Inf)) +
  geom_vline(xintercept=mean(lerista_subset$mean,na.rm=TRUE),color=color_2,lty="11",lwd=1.5) +
  geom_density(aes(reconstructed),color=color_1,lwd=2,bounds=c(0,Inf)) +
  geom_vline(xintercept=mean(lerista_subset$reconstructed,na.rm=TRUE),color=color_1,lty="11",lwd=1.5) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits=ylims,expand=c(0,0)) +
  scale_x_continuous(limits=xlims,expand=c(0,0)) +
  labs(x="Aridity Difference (mm/year)", y=NULL, title="Lerista") +
  geom_text(label="Reconstructed Daughters",aes(x=1.95,y=loc2),hjust="inward",vjust="inward",color=color_1,size=6) +
  geom_text(label="Mean of Possible Daughters",aes(x=1.95,y=loc3),hjust="inward",vjust="inward",color=color_2,size=6) +
  geom_text(label=paste("P-Value:",round(lerista_test,3)),aes(x=1.95,y=loc1),hjust="inward",vjust="inward",color=lines_color,size=6) +
  theme(panel.background = element_rect(fill=background_color,color=lines_color),
        plot.background = element_rect(fill=background_color,color=background_color),
        plot.title = element_text(color=lines_color,hjust=.5,size=24),
        axis.title = element_text(color=lines_color,size=24),
        axis.text = element_text(color=lines_color,size=14),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        aspect.ratio = 1/2)
other_aridity <- ggplot(data=other_subset) +
  geom_density(aes(mean),color=NA,fill=color_2,bounds=c(0,Inf)) +
  geom_vline(xintercept=mean(other_subset$mean,na.rm=TRUE),color=color_2,lty="11",lwd=1.5) +
  geom_density(aes(reconstructed),color=color_1,lwd=2,bounds=c(0,Inf)) +
  geom_vline(xintercept=mean(other_subset$reconstructed,na.rm=TRUE),color=color_1,lty="11",lwd=1.5) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits=ylims,expand=c(0,0)) +
  scale_x_continuous(limits=xlims,expand=c(0,0)) +
  labs(x="Aridity Difference (mm/year)", y=NULL, title="Third Clade") +
  geom_text(label="Reconstructed Daughters",aes(x=1.95,y=loc2),hjust="inward",vjust="inward",color=color_1,size=6) +
  geom_text(label="Mean of Possible Daughters",aes(x=1.95,y=loc3),hjust="inward",vjust="inward",color=color_2,size=6) +
  geom_text(label=paste("P-Value:",round(other_test,3)),aes(x=1.95,y=loc1),hjust="inward",vjust="inward",color=lines_color,size=6) +
  theme(panel.background = element_rect(fill=background_color,color=lines_color),
        plot.background = element_rect(fill=background_color,color=background_color),
        plot.title = element_text(color=lines_color,hjust=.5,size=24),
        axis.title = element_text(color=lines_color,size=24),
        axis.text = element_text(color=lines_color,size=14),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        aspect.ratio = 1/2)
total_plot <- combined_aridity + ctenotus_aridity + lerista_aridity + other_aridity + plot_layout(ncol=4) & theme(plot.background=element_rect(fill=background_color,color=background_color))
filename <- paste0(aridity_plot_directory,"daughter_aridity.png")
ggsave(filename,total_plot,dpi=600,width=21,height=4)

deltaplot <- ggplot(node_count_df_scaled,aes(x=delta1,y=nodes_young)) + 
  geom_point(pch=16,color=lines_color) +
  geom_smooth(method="lm",se=FALSE,color=lines_color,lwd=2) +
  labs(x="Precipitation Change (mm/year per MY)",y="Log Speciation Event Count") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(aspect.ratio=1/2,
        panel.background = element_rect(fill=background_color,color=lines_color),
        plot.background = element_rect(fill=background_color,color=background_color),
        plot.title = element_text(color=lines_color,hjust=.5,size=24),
        axis.title = element_text(color=lines_color,size=24),
        axis.text = element_text(color=lines_color,size=14))

#distplot <- ggplot(distpoints,aes(x=dists,y=nodes_young)) + 
#  geom_point(color=lines_color) +
#  geom_smooth(method="lm",se=FALSE,color=lines_color,lwd=2) +
#  labs(x="Distance to Nearest Edge | Other\n(scaled)",y=NULL,title="Added Variable: Edge Distance") +
#  theme_bw() +
#  theme(aspect.ratio=1,
#        panel.background = element_rect(fill=background_color,color=lines_color),
#        plot.background = element_rect(fill=background_color,color=background_color),
#        plot.title = element_text(color=lines_color,hjust=.5,size=24),
#        axis.title = element_text(color=lines_color,size=24),
#        axis.text = element_text(color=lines_color))
#
#modelplot <- deltaplot + distplot + plot_layout(guides="collect") & theme(plot.background=element_rect(fill=background_color,color=background_color))
#
#ggsave(paste0(manuscript_plot_directory,"aridity_speciation.png"),modelplot,dpi=600,width=21,height=15)

both_plot <- total_plot / deltaplot + plot_layout(heights=c(4,14)) & theme(plot.background=element_rect(fill=background_color,color=NA))
ggsave(paste0(manuscript_plot_directory,"aridity.png"),both_plot,dpi=600,width=21,height=15.5)
set_plot_theme("dark")
```

## References

### Phylogenetic Tree

Title, P. O., Singhal, S., Grundler, M. C., Costa, G. C., Pyron, R. A., Colston, T. J., Grundler, M. R., Prates, I., Stepanova, N., Jones, M. E. H., Cavalcanti, L. B. Q., Colli, G. R., Di-Poï, N., Donnellan, S. C., Moritz, C., Mesquita, D. O., Pianka, E. R., Smith, S. A., Vitt, L. J., & Rabosky, D. L. (2024). The macroevolutionary singularity of snakes. Science, 383(6685), 918–923. https://doi.org/10.1126/science.adh2449

---

### Range Maps

Roll et. al. 2017 The global distribution of tetrapods reveals a need for targeted reptile conservation. Nature Ecology & Evolution 1:1677-1682

Caetano, et al. 2022. Automated assessment reveals that the extinction risk of reptiles is widely underestimated across space and phylogeny. PLoS Biology, 20(5): e3001544.

---

### Climate Rasters

Pohl, A., Wong Hearing, T., Franc, A., Sepulchre, P., & Scotese, C. R. (2022). Dataset of Phanerozoic continental climate and Köppen–Geiger climate classes. Data in Brief, 43(108424), 108424. https://doi.org/10.1016/j.dib.2022.108424

http://www.bom.gov.au/climate/maps/averages/rainfall/

---

### GPlates Model

Scotese, C.R., 2016. PALEOMAP	PaleoAtlas for GPlates and the PaleoData Plotter Program, PALEOMAP Project, http://www.earthbyte.org/paleomappaleoatlas-for-gplates/ DOI: 10.13140/RG2.2.34367.00166
